item.title: 100% PCR Kraft Telescopic-Lid Eco Candle & Home Fragrance Box
item.description: 100% PCR kraft telescopic-lid eco candle and home fragrance box — the ultimate circular-economy packaging for conscious consumer brands, from Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a 23-year packaging manufacturing leader. This two-piece telescopic box (separate lid + base) is constructed entirely from 100% post-consumer recycled (PCR) kraft paperboard, delivering authentic eco-credentials without compromising on structural integrity or print quality. The natural kraft aesthetic with visible recycled fiber flecks communicates genuine sustainability — not greenwashed marketing. Suitable for soy candles (8oz, 12oz, 16oz), reed diffusers, wax melts, room sprays, essential oil sets, and incense gift collections. Customization includes die-cut display windows (with compostable PLA film option), soy-based ink printing, FSC-compatible metallic foil stamping, and embossing. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 4-color and Heidelberg CD 102 7+1 UV offset presses with water-based adhesive assembly. Our 18,000 sqm facility delivers 1.7M boxes daily under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Recycled certification. OK Compost INDUSTRIAL certified (EN 13432 compliant).

item.title: Auto-Lock Bottom Folding Carton with Die-Cut Window Artisan Chocolate Confectionery
item.description: Auto-lock bottom folding carton with die-cut PET window, designed for artisan chocolate and confectionery packaging by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The auto-lock bottom mechanism enables rapid assembly — simply push the sides and the bottom locks into place without tape or glue. The die-cut PET window showcases the product while protecting it from dust and handling. Ideal for artisan chocolatiers, bakeries, and premium confectionery brands. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility. Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Auto-Lock Bottom Folding Carton with Die-Cut Window for Bakery and Pastry
item.description: Auto-lock bottom folding carton with precision die-cut window, designed and manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com and Audited Supplier with 23 years of folding carton expertise. The auto-lock bottom mechanism enables instant pop-up assembly: simply squeeze the sides and the bottom locks into place automatically — no manual folding, no tape, no glue required. This saves 60%+ labor time compared to conventional tuck-bottom cartons and is ideal for high-volume bakery, patisserie, and food-service operations where speed at the filling station matters. The die-cut window showcases the product — croissants, donuts, cookies, pastries, or confectionery — while the food-grade PET or compostable PLA film keeps contents fresh and visible. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 and Heidelberg CD 102 presses with food-safe low-migration inks across our 18,000 sqm facility. Daily output: 1.7 million boxes.

item.title: Auto-Lock Bottom Folding Carton with Tear-Strip Tamper Seal for Frozen Food Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The auto-lock bottom folding carton with integrated tear-strip tamper seal is engineered for frozen food packaging — from premium frozen meals and ice cream to frozen seafood and ready-to-bake goods. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing (founded 2003, Foshan, 18,000 sqm, ISO 9001:2015 & FSC-C147399 certified), this carton combines moisture-resistant PE-coated SBS board with a patented tear-strip opening that provides visible tamper evidence — consumers can see at a glance if the package has been opened. The auto-lock bottom pops open for high-speed filling lines, and the tear strip eliminates the need for scissors or knives at point of use. Daily output reaches 1.7 million boxes on KBA Rapida 105 and Heidelberg CD 102 7+1 UV presses with Bobst SP 102 BMA/E die-cutters, Bobst Visioncut 106 LER, and Bobst Expertfold 145 folder-gluer.

item.title: Book-Style Magnetic Closure Photography Portfolio Box with Archival Acid-Free Linen Wrap
item.description:
Product Overview

The book-style magnetic closure photography portfolio box with archival acid-free linen wrap is purpose-built for professional photographers, fine art printers, and galleries who require museum-grade storage and presentation. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing (founded 2003, Foshan, 18,000 sqm, ISO 9001:2015 & FSC-C147399 certified), this box features acid-free, lignin-free, pH-buffered materials throughout — from the 3.0mm archival greyboard core to the Belgian linen wrap and pH-neutral adhesive. The book-style magnetic closure with N52 neodymium magnets opens like a fine volume, and the spine can be foil-stamped with the photographer’s name or collection title. Compatible with ISO 18902:2013 imaging materials storage standards. Daily output reaches 1.7 million boxes on KBA Rapida 105 and Heidelberg CD 102 7+1 UV presses.

item.title: Chocolate Brown Velvet LED Ring Jewelry Display Gift Box
item.description: Chocolate brown velvet LED ring jewelry display gift box by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). This luxurious chocolate brown velvet jewelry box features an integrated warm-white LED ring light that illuminates the ring when the lid opens, creating a breathtaking reveal moment for engagement rings, wedding bands, and fine jewelry. The velvet exterior, gold foil branding, and precision LED engineering make this the definitive choice for luxury jewelry brands. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory, 2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Christmas 3D Pop-Up Gift Box with LED Lighting Magnetic Closure
item.description: Spectacular Christmas 3D pop-up gift box with integrated LED illumination — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of manufacturing expertise (founded 2003). When opened, the box reveals a multi-layered 3D paper-engineered pop-up scene — a winter wonderland, Santa’s workshop, or a custom brand tableau — internally illuminated by a warm-white LED module (CR2032 battery, CE certified) that brings the laser-cut scene to life. The rigid box construction uses 1200gsm FSC-certified greyboard wrapped in matte-laminated art paper with magnetic closure for a satisfying reveal. Bobst SP 102 BMA laser die-cutting ensures precision-fit pop-up layers. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across Bincai’s 18,000 sqm dual factory (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory) in Foshan, Guangdong. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified. Daily output 1.7 million boxes. MOQ 500 with free pre-production samples.

item.title: CMYK Litho-Laminate Folding Carton for Premium Retail Display Packaging
item.description: CMYK litho-laminate folding carton for premium retail display packaging — delivering photo-quality print on a rigid-feel substrate, from Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (23 years, founded 2003). This carton combines two packaging technologies into one premium solution: offset lithographic printing on 157gsm C2S (coated-two-sides) art paper, laminated to 1.5mm E-flute micro-corrugated board. The result is a folding carton with the visual impact of a luxury rigid box — 200-line screen CMYK printing with Pantone spot colors and UV coating on Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV press — with the structural protection and flat-shipping efficiency of corrugated. The auto-lock bottom pops open instantly with tuck-top closure for quick assembly. Surface enhancement options include hot foil stamping (gold/silver/copper/rose gold), spot UV gloss coating, sculpted embossing, and soft-touch matte lamination. Our 18,000 sqm facility delivers 1.7M boxes daily under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Compostable Kraft Paper Chocolate Gift Box with PLA Window Soy Ink Printing
item.description: Compostable kraft paper chocolate gift box with PLA bioplastic window — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience. Every component — from the FSC-certified kraft board and PLA window to the soy-based inks and water-based adhesive — is certified industrially compostable under EN 13432 and ASTM D6400 standards. This box provides artisan chocolatiers and eco-conscious confectionery brands with packaging that decomposes into biomass, water, and CO₂ within 90 days in commercial composting facilities, leaving zero microplastics behind.

item.title: Corrugated Heavy-Duty E-Commerce Shipping Box — Double-Wall — Tear Strip — Bincai Industrial Packaging
item.description: The heavy-duty double-wall corrugated e-commerce shipping box with integrated tear strip is engineered for direct-to-consumer brands that demand both protection and presentation. Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. manufactures this product in our 18,000 sqm dual-factory complex in Foshan, China, using the BHS 2.5m Corrugator for board production, Bobst SP 102 BMA for precision die-cutting, and Emmeci MC2004 for automated box making. With ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certifications and a daily output of 1.7 million boxes, Bincai delivers industrial-grade corrugated packaging at e-commerce scale.

item.title: Corrugated Heavy-Duty Industrial Parts Shipper with Custom Foam Partition and Pallet Base Export Grade
item.description:
Product Overview

This heavy-duty corrugated industrial parts shipper is engineered for the most demanding B2B logistics: export-grade machinery components, automotive OEM parts, precision tooling, and industrial equipment that requires absolute protection during international freight. Constructed from BC-flute double-wall corrugated on Guangdong Bincai’s BHS 2.5m Corrugator line, the shipper delivers ECT 44+ lb/in edge crush strength and 275+ psi burst resistance. A custom CNC-cut PE or EPE foam partition system secures each component in its own isolated cavity, while the integrated pallet base enables direct fork-lift handling without secondary palletization. Each shipper is ISTA 3E certified for parcel delivery and LTL freight, and manufactured under ISO 9001:2015 quality management with FSC Chain-of-Custody materials. With 23 years of corrugated manufacturing expertise (founded 2003), Bincai produces 1.7 million boxes daily from an 18,000 sqm integrated facility in Foshan, Guangdong.

item.title: Corrugated Literature Mailer with Self-Seal Adhesive Closure & Tear Strip
item.description:
Product Overview

The Corrugated Literature Mailer with Self-Seal Adhesive solves the two biggest pain points in book and catalog fulfillment: taping labor and frustrated recipients struggling to open packages. The integrated self-seal adhesive strip eliminates manual tape application — simply peel the release liner, fold, and press for a permanent bond that exceeds ISTA 3A shipping standards. On the receiving end, dual tear strip perforations allow the recipient to open the mailer cleanly in under 3 seconds without scissors or box cutters, preserving the contents in pristine condition. Manufactured on Bincai’s BHS 2.5m corrugator line with B-flute (3mm caliper, ECT 32), this mailer provides the ideal balance of crush protection and lightweight shipping economics for books, catalogs, magazines, and document sets.

item.title: Corrugated Wine Bottle Shipper — 3-Bottle Die-Cut with Molded Pulp Dividers
item.description: Corrugated wine bottle shipper for 3-bottle die-cut with molded pulp dividers — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. Purpose-designed for direct-to-consumer (DTC) wine club shipments, this B-flute corrugated shipper features precision die-cut bottle cradles and molded pulp dividers that isolate each bottle from impact during transit. The integrated die-cut carry handle provides retail-ready convenience, while full-color flexo or litho label printing transforms a protective shipping box into a branded unboxing experience. ISTA 6-FEDEX-A tested and approved for single-parcel wine shipments. Produced on our BHS 2.5m corrugator across 18,000 sqm with 1.7M daily output capacity.

item.title: Custom Auto-Bottom Folding Carton with Soft-Touch Lamination for Premium Electronics Accessories

This folding carton features an auto-lock bottom mechanism that assembles in under 2 seconds without glue, tape, or tools — dramatically reducing fulfillment labor costs. The soft-touch matte lamination delivers a luxurious velvety tactile experience that communicates premium quality before the customer even opens the box. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory) (2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Custom Die-Cut Handle Folding Carton with Hot Foil Stamping for Luxury Retail
item.description: Custom die-cut handle folding carton with hot foil stamping and soft-touch lamination — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience. The integrated die-cut handle eliminates the need for plastic or paper bags at retail checkout, providing a complete branded packaging solution in a single piece. The soft-touch lamination delivers a velvety tactile experience that communicates luxury, while gold or silver hot foil stamping adds metallic brilliance to your brand elements on the front, back, and handle surfaces.

item.title: Custom Double-Wall Corrugated Candle Shipping Mailer with Die-Cut Foam Insert
item.description: Custom double-wall corrugated candle shipping mailer with die-cut PE foam insert by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). Engineered specifically for the e-commerce candle industry, this mailer combines BC-flute double-wall corrugated strength with a precision die-cut foam cradle that immobilizes candles during transit. The self-locking bottom and tear-strip opening create a frustration-free unboxing experience. Corrugated board is produced in-house on our BHS 2.5m corrugator, ensuring consistent quality and shorter lead times. item.title: Custom Double-Wall Corrugated Wine Shipper 12-Bottle with Die-Cut Pulp Dividers and Pallet Base
item.description:
Product Description

Custom double-wall corrugated wine shipper 12-bottle with die-cut pulp dividers and pallet base by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). This heavy-duty wine shipping solution is engineered for international export logistics — protecting 12 standard 750ml wine bottles through ocean freight, air cargo, and last-mile delivery. The double-wall BC-flute construction provides exceptional stacking strength (ECT 44+), while the molded pulp dividers cradle each bottle individually with shock-absorbing protection. An integrated pallet base enables forklift handling without secondary palletization.

item.title: Custom Folding Carton for Electronics Accessories — Die-Cut Insert + CMYK Print
item.description:
Product Overview

Custom folding carton for electronics accessories with precision die-cut insert and full-color CMYK offset printing — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). Engineered for earphones, USB chargers, data cables, power banks, phone cases, screen protectors, smartwatch bands, and small consumer electronics where product protection and retail shelf appeal are equally critical. The flat-packed folding design minimizes shipping volume by up to 80% versus rigid boxes, while the precision die-cut cardboard insert — cut to ±0.3mm tolerance on Bobst SP 102 BMA flatbed die-cutters — secures products against movement during transit and positions them perfectly for retail display. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset (15,000 sheets/hour) and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses with inline aqueous or UV coating across our 18,000 sqm dual-factory complex (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, commissioned 2025) in Foshan, Guangdong. Daily output of 1.7 million boxes. ISO 9001:2015, FSC Chain-of-Custody, and Sedex SMETA certified. MOQ 1000 units with free pre-production samples in 5-7 working days.

item.title: Custom Folding Carton with Euro Hang Tab Retail Display
item.description:
Product Overview

A versatile folding carton with an integrated Euro hang tab — engineered for retail pegboard display while maintaining the structural integrity and print quality of premium folding carton packaging. The Euro hang tab is die-cut in-line during production on the Heidelberg cylinder die-cutter, ensuring perfect registration with the carton body and zero additional assembly cost. This eliminates the need for secondary retail-ready packaging — the shipping carton IS the display carton. Produced on the KBA 1050 4-color offset press at Guangdong Bincai’s 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory), this carton delivers vibrant CMYK printing with optional Pantone spot colors on board stocks from 300gsm to 500gsm. Daily folding carton output reaches 1.7 million units across four high-speed production lines.

item.title: Custom Folding Carton with Hidden Magnetic Closure Luxury Cosmetics Packaging Soft-Touch
item.description: Discreetly luxurious folding carton with hidden magnetic closure — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of manufacturing expertise (founded 2003). The carton appears as a minimalist monolithic block with no visible closure — two N35 neodymium magnets are embedded between the paperboard layers during lamination, creating an invisible magnetic clasp that snaps the flap shut with satisfying precision. The 350gsm FSC-certified SBS board is wrapped in soft-touch lamination that feels like suede to the fingertips — fingerprints wipe clean and the tactile experience signals luxury before the product is even seen. Spot UV accents and hot foil stamping on Kolbus DA270 add branding brilliance. The auto-lock bottom erects in one motion with no adhesive required. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across Bincai’s 18,000 sqm dual factory (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory) in Foshan, Guangdong. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified. Daily output 1.7 million boxes. MOQ 1,000.

item.description: Hexagonal rigid gift box with magnetic closure and gold foil embossing — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience. The six-sided geometric design commands attention on retail shelves and conveys premium quality before the box is even opened. Each hexagon face provides a generous branding canvas for gold foil logo embossing, debossed patterns, or full-color CMYK printing. The magnetic closure delivers a satisfying snap-and-seal experience, while the flocked velvet interior cradles your product in luxury.

item.description: Custom hexagonal tea gift box with magnetic closure and satin ribbon pull by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). This distinctive hexagonal rigid box combines the elegance of traditional tea ceremony aesthetics with modern luxury packaging engineering. item.description: Luxury custom logo watch display box with integrated LED light and premium suede interior — engineered to elevate the unboxing moment for discerning watch enthusiasts. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003), our 18,000 sqm Foshan factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory) runs KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses, producing 1.7 million boxes daily. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified. The magnetic reed switch activates warm LED illumination the moment the lid opens — no buttons, no cables, just an instant premium presentation.

item.title: Custom Magnetic Closure Humidor-Style Cigar Box with Spanish Cedar Lining and Digital Hygrometer
item.description:
Product Description

This humidor-style magnetic closure cigar box bridges the gap between functional humidor and luxury presentation packaging. Lined with genuine Spanish cedar (Cedrela odorata) — the gold standard for cigar aging — the interior naturally regulates humidity while imparting the characteristic cedar aroma prized by aficionados. An integrated digital hygrometer displays real-time humidity levels, and the N52 neodymium magnetic seal with full-perimeter silicone gasket maintains 68–72% RH for short to medium-term cigar storage (3–6 months with proper humidification device). The exterior is wrapped in premium leatherette or linen with gold/silver hot foil debossing for brand elevation. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing with 23 years of rigid box expertise, every box passes through 15 precision QC checkpoints. ISO 9001:2015 quality management and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified, produced in an 18,000 sqm integrated facility with 220,000+ daily rigid box output.

item.title: Custom Magnetic Closure Premium Fountain Pen Display Box with Satin Tray
item.description: Magnetic closure fountain pen display box with individual satin-lined slots — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience. This presentation box combines the satisfying snap of a magnetic closure with the visual drama of a satin-lined interior that elevates any writing instrument to heirloom status. Designed for fountain pen manufacturers, luxury corporate gift programs, and collector editions, the box provides exceptional protection and presentation from retail shelf to recipient’s desk.

item.title: Custom Octagonal Rigid Gift Box with UV Spot Pattern and Magnetic Book-Style Closure
item.description:
Product Overview

This custom octagonal rigid gift box combines the geometric sophistication of an eight-sided shape with UV spot pattern detailing and a book-style magnetic closure — a standout packaging format for premium brands seeking differentiation. Unlike standard rectangular boxes, the octagonal form creates visual intrigue that commands attention on retail shelves and in unboxing moments. Each box is manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing on Heidelberg 7+1 UV offset presses with Bobst SP 102 BMA precision die-cutting for ±0.2mm edge accuracy. The book-style magnetic flap opens like a hardcover book, revealing the gift with deliberate, luxury-paced reveal. With over 23 years of rigid box expertise, ISO 9001:2015 quality management, FSC Chain-of-Custody certification, and 220,000+ daily rigid box output across an 18,000 sqm integrated facility, Bincai delivers octagonal packaging that combines structural innovation with manufacturing reliability.

item.title: Custom Printed Corrugated Shipping Mailer Box with Tear Strip for E-Commerce
item.description: Custom printed corrugated shipping mailer box with integrated tear strip — engineered for e-commerce, subscription services, and direct-to-consumer (DTC) fulfillment. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. with 23 years of packaging expertise. The self-locking bottom eliminates the need for tape during assembly, while the easy-open tear strip provides a frustration-free unboxing experience that modern consumers expect. Full-color flexographic or offset printing on kraft or white-top liner transforms your shipping box into a branded marketing asset. Produced on our in-house BHS 2.5m corrugator line — one of the few packaging factories in Southern China with integrated corrugated board production. ISTA-tested for transit durability. 18,000 sqm factory in Foshan, Guangdong.

item.title: Custom Reverse Tuck End Folding Carton with Holographic Cold Foil Border for Luxury Scented Candle
item.description:
Product Overview

This reverse tuck end (RTE) folding carton elevates scented candle packaging with holographic cold foil border detailing and soft-touch matte lamination — a tactile and visual combination that communicates luxury before the customer even lights the wick. The RTE structure (top tucks in reverse direction from bottom) provides secure closure while enabling efficient automated filling on candle production lines. Each carton is printed on Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses with in-line cold foil transfer capability, then die-cut to ±0.15mm precision on Bobst SP 102 BMA flatbed systems. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing with over 23 years of folding carton expertise, ISO 9001:2015 quality management, FSC Chain-of-Custody certification, and daily output of 1.7 million color boxes from an 18,000 sqm integrated facility in Foshan, Guangdong.

item.description: The custom tuck-top folding carton is the workhorse of retail packaging — produced by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, 23 years) on KBA Rapida 1050 4-color and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified, with daily output of 1.7 million boxes. MOQ 500 units.

item.title: Custom Tuck-Top Auto-Bottom Folding Carton with Gold Foil for Luxury Cosmetics
item.description: Custom tuck-top auto-bottom folding carton with gold hot foil stamping designed for luxury cosmetics, skincare, and fragrance packaging — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified. item.title: Custom Window Folding Carton for Gourmet Bakery and Dessert Display
item.description: Custom window folding carton for gourmet bakery and dessert display by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The crystal-clear PET or compostable PLA window lets the product sell itself, while the rigid SBS board provides crush resistance. Food-grade aqueous coating ensures direct food contact safety. item.title: Die-Cut Corrugated Glassware Shipper with Honeycomb Divider — 6-Bottle Wine Glass Export Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

This die-cut corrugated glassware shipper incorporates an integrated honeycomb kraft divider system that isolates each of six wine glasses or stemware pieces in individual protective cells — eliminating glass-to-glass contact during transit. The honeycomb grid absorbs lateral shock while the outer corrugated shell (B-flute single-wall or BC-flute double-wall for heavier crystal) provides structural crush resistance. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing on a BHS 2.5m Corrugator line with high-speed flexo printing and Bobst die-cutting, every shipper undergoes ISTA 3A drop-test protocol validation. With 23 years of corrugated packaging expertise, ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification, and 180,000+ daily corrugated box output across an 18,000 sqm integrated facility, Bincai delivers glassware shipping solutions that combine protection with export-ready compliance.

item.title: Dome-Shaped Rigid Gift Box with Clear PVC Window Gold Foil Edge Banding
item.description: Architecturally stunning dome-shaped rigid gift box with transparent PVC viewing window — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of manufacturing expertise (founded 2003). The gracefully curved dome lid, thermoformed from rigid greyboard and wrapped in premium art paper, creates a museum-display aesthetic that elevates any product inside. A 0.5mm clear PVC window spans the dome’s face, allowing the product to be admired without opening the box. Gold foil edge banding traces the perimeter of the dome and lid seam, catching light and adding a halo-like premium accent. Magnetic closure with N35 neodymium magnets provides a satisfying snap. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across Bincai’s 18,000 sqm dual factory (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory) in Foshan, Guangdong. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified. Daily output 1.7 million boxes. MOQ 500.

An LED spotlight automatically activates when the lid opens, illuminating your pieces with warm white light for maximum visual impact at retail counters and gift presentations.

item.title: Double Wall Corrugated Shipping Mailer Heavy Duty Ecommerce Packaging
item.description: Double-wall BC-flute corrugated shipping mailer designed for heavy-duty ecommerce fulfillment by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The BC-flute double-wall construction provides superior crush resistance for fragile and high-value items, while the integrated tear strip and self-seal adhesive strip enable quick, tool-free opening and secure closure without additional tape. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory, 2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Double-Wall Corrugated E-Commerce Mailer Box with Tear Strip and Self-Seal
item.description: Double-wall BC-flute corrugated e-commerce mailer box with integrated tear strip and self-seal closure, manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com and Audited Supplier with 23 years of corrugated packaging expertise. The double-wall BC-flute construction (B-flute 3mm for crush resistance + C-flute 4mm for shock absorption = 7mm total) delivers ECT 44+ lb/in edge crush and BCT 800+ lbs stacking strength — tested to survive 10+ ISTA 3A drop cycles without product damage. The self-seal adhesive strip with silicone release liner eliminates tape entirely — peel the liner, fold the flap, press to seal in under 3 seconds. The integrated tear strip (PET or PP) enables tool-free consumer opening — no box cutter needed. All board is produced in-house on our BHS corrugator line, ensuring consistent quality, fresh board, and no third-party supply chain delays. Daily output: 1.7 million boxes including 500,000+ corrugated mailers.

item.title: Double-Wall Corrugated E-Commerce Shipper with Perforated Tear Strip ISTA 3A
item.description:
Product Overview

The double-wall BC-flute corrugated e-commerce shipper with perforated tear strip is engineered for high-volume DTC and B2B e-commerce operations that demand ISTA 3A-certified protection with a frustration-free customer unboxing experience. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing (founded 2003, Foshan, 18,000 sqm, ISO 9001:2015 & FSC-C147399 certified), this shipper runs on our BHS 2.5m corrugator with in-line flexo printing and die-cutting. Daily output reaches 1.7 million boxes.

item.title: Double-Wall Corrugated Heavy-Duty E-Commerce Shipping Mailer
item.description: Double-wall BC-flute corrugated heavy-duty e-commerce shipping mailer — engineered for direct-to-consumer brands shipping fragile, heavy, or high-value products, from Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003). This BC-flute double-wall construction (7mm combined thickness) features a 5-ply structure: 125gsm Kraft liner → 110gsm Medium (B-flute) → 125gsm Kraft liner → 110gsm Medium (C-flute) → 125gsm Kraft liner. The result: 2.5× the burst strength of single-wall B-flute and an Edge Crush Test (ECT) rating of 44 lb/in — suitable for products up to 25kg. Integrated features include a self-locking crash-lock bottom (no tape required, assembles in 2 seconds), dual tear-strip opening for recipient convenience, and dust flaps for secure closure. Produced on Bincai’s BHS 2.5m corrugator line — the world’s most advanced corrugated production system — with inline 4-color flexo printing, rotary die-cutting, and automatic gluing. Our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility delivers 1.7M boxes daily under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

Engineered with double-wall BC-flute construction (6–7mm combined caliper) for maximum crush resistance and puncture protection, this box meets ISTA 3A performance testing and Amazon Frustration-Free Packaging (FFP) Tier 3 certification. Produced on our BHS 2.5m corrugator and KBA 1050 4-color flexo press across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory, 2025 expansion). item.title: Kraft Paper Artisan Candle Gift Box with Hemp Rope Handle & Soy Ink Botanical Print
item.description:
Product Overview

The Kraft Paper Artisan Candle Gift Box brings together uncompromising sustainability credentials with artisanal aesthetics. Every material in this box has been selected for end-of-life circularity: the 1.5mm rigid greyboard is 100% post-consumer recycled, the exterior wrap is FSC-certified 157gsm kraft paper printed with soy-based botanical inks (zero petroleum solvents), the carry handle is natural undyed hemp rope, and the interior candle tray is molded from PLA (polylactic acid) certified to EN 13432 for industrial composting. The botanical print series — featuring six nature-inspired illustrations (lavender fields, eucalyptus sprigs, heritage roses, citrus groves, pine forests, chamomile blooms) — is printed on our KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press using soy-based inks that produce rich, matte colors without the chemical odor of conventional petroleum inks. When the candle is enjoyed and the box has served its gifting purpose, the entire package (minus the hemp rope, which is reusable) can be composted or recycled in standard paper streams.

item.title: Kraft Paper Box with Soy-Based Ink Printing for Organic Skincare Packaging
item.description: Fully recyclable kraft paper box with soy-based ink printing — purpose-designed for organic skincare, clean beauty, and sustainable wellness brands. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified. Every component is chosen for end-of-life recyclability: FSC-certified unbleached kraft board, vegetable-based soy ink (VOC-free, unlike petroleum inks), water-based adhesive, and an optional PLA (polylactic acid) biodegradable window film derived from corn starch. No plastic lamination — the natural uncoated kraft surface communicates eco-authenticity to the growing segment of sustainability-conscious consumers (73% of Gen Z and Millennials willing to pay more for sustainable packaging, per First Insight). 18,000 sqm factory in Foshan, Guangdong. 23 years of manufacturing experience.

item.title: Kraft Paper Coffee Bean Gift Box with One-Way Degassing Valve Window and Compostable PLA Liner
item.description:
Product Overview

This kraft paper coffee bean gift box is purpose-engineered for the specialty coffee industry — combining the functionality of a one-way degassing valve with the sustainability credentials of FSC-certified kraft board, soy-based ink printing, and a home-compostable PLA inner liner. Freshly roasted coffee beans release CO₂ for days after roasting; without a degassing valve, rigid packaging would balloon or burst. The integrated one-way valve window on this kraft box allows controlled CO₂ release while blocking oxygen ingress, preserving the beans’ volatile aromatic compounds and extending peak flavor window by 2–4 weeks. Every box is manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing using KBA Rapida 1050 4-color offset with soy-based inks, Bobst SP 102 BMA die-cutting, and 350gsm FSC-certified kraft board. With 23 years of paper box manufacturing, ISO 9001:2015 quality management, FSC Chain-of-Custody, and 1.7 million daily box output from an 18,000 sqm facility, Bincai delivers packaging that specialty coffee roasters can trust for quality and sustainability.

item.title: Kraft Paper Eco-Friendly Soap Packaging Box with Window Soy-Based Ink
item.description: Kraft paper eco-friendly soap packaging box with die-cut window and soy-based ink printing by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003). Designed for handmade soap bars, organic skincare products, natural deodorants, bath bombs, and eco-conscious cosmetic brands. Made from FSC certified kraft paper with compostable PLA window film or recyclable PET window. Printed with vegetable-based soy ink for full environmental compatibility. The entire package is curbside recyclable in paper streams. Produced across 18,000 sqm facility. Daily output: 1.7 million boxes.

item.title: Kraft Paper Essential Oil Gift Set Box with Bamboo Fiber Insert and Soy-Based Ink Printing
item.description: The kraft paper essential oil gift set box with bamboo fiber insert is Bincai’s answer to the clean beauty industry’s demand for packaging as pure as the product inside. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, 23 years) at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility, this fully compostable gift box combines five sustainable materials — FSC-certified kraft board, molded bamboo fiber tray, soy-based ink, jute twine closure, and PLA (corn starch) window film — into one petroleum-free packaging solution. The natural kraft exterior printed with vibrant soy-based inks delivers shelf appeal without environmental compromise, while the thermoformed bamboo fiber insert cradles each essential oil bottle in precision-molded cavities. Produced on KBA Rapida 1050 4-color (soy-ink optimized) and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified. Daily output 1.7 million boxes. MOQ 500.

With 23 years of packaging expertise, ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification, and 220,000+ daily output across an 18,000 sqm integrated facility, Bincai delivers eco-packaging at industrial scale without compromising quality or aesthetics.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Dual-Layer Presentation Box with Foam Tray — Corporate Gift & Award Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

This magnetic closure presentation box features a dual-layer design combining a top display compartment with a bottom pull-out drawer — engineered for corporate gifting and award presentations where the recipient discovers layered contents across a deliberate unboxing sequence. The top layer presents the primary gift item (watch, pen set, award medal) in a precision die-cut EVA foam tray, while the lower drawer reveals supporting materials (certificate, warranty card, accessory). N52 neodymium magnets embedded in the lid flap provide a satisfying 15N closure with soft-close feel. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing on Heidelberg 7+1 UV offset presses with Bobst SP 102 BMA die-cutting, every box achieves furniture-grade assembly precision. With 23 years of magnetic closure box expertise, ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification, and 220,000+ daily output across an 18,000 sqm integrated facility, Bincai delivers corporate presentation packaging that reflects brand prestige.

The magnetic snap closure provides a satisfying premium feel while keeping the contents secure. Gold foil logo stamping on the cover and spine creates a luxury boutique presentation perfect for corporate gifting, pen collector editions, and retail display. item.title: Magnetic Closure Multi-Layer Tea Chest Gift Box with Gold Foil Embossing
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Multi-Layer Tea Chest with Gold Foil Embossing reimagines the traditional tea cabinet as a precision-engineered luxury gift box. Designed for premium tea brands, boutique tea houses, and corporate gifting programs, this 3-tier magnetic closure chest delivers an unboxing experience that communicates heritage, craftsmanship, and exclusivity before the first tea leaf is seen.

Each of the three satin-lined drawers slides on precision die-cut tracks (±0.2mm tolerance) engineered on our Bobst Visioncut 106 LER flatbed die-cutter. The drawers are independently secured by concealed N52-grade neodymium magnets — the highest commercially available grade — providing a consistent 800g+ holding force tested on every unit. The book-style lid opens to reveal a gold foil embossed brand plate, while brass-finish drawer pulls (customizable to antique bronze, chrome, rose gold, or matte black) add vintage character.

Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. manufactures this product in our 18,000 sqm dual-factory complex in Foshan, China, utilizing KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses alongside BHS 2.5m Corrugator and Bobst SP 102 BMA die-cutting equipment. With ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certifications and a daily output of 1.7 million boxes, Bincai delivers distillery-grade packaging at global scale.

item.description: Magnetic closure round cylindrical hat box with satin ribbon pull and custom CMYK printing, manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The round cylindrical design with N52 neodymium magnetic closure provides a premium unboxing experience — the lid snaps securely shut and opens smoothly with the satin ribbon pull. Ideal for luxury fashion accessories, premium gift sets, and boutique retail packaging. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, 2025 expansion). item.title: Magnetic Closure Watch Collector Box with 12-Slot Suede Tray & Tempered Glass Lid
item.description:
Product Overview

The Magnetic Closure Watch Collector Box with 12-Slot Suede Tray combines gallery-quality display with secure, dust-protected storage for serious watch collections. The full-width tempered glass lid (5mm, polished edges) provides a crystal-clear view of all 12 timepieces while protecting against dust, humidity, and accidental contact. Each of the 12 removable suedette pillows (70×40×35mm) is individually wrapped and sized to accommodate watches from slim dress pieces (32mm case) to oversized dive watches (52mm case). Four N52 neodymium magnets create a satisfying, secure closure with zero lid sag, while the stainless steel hinges include a 90° stop mechanism that prevents over-opening. Whether displayed on a dresser, used as retail point-of-sale presentation, or gifted as a corporate milestone award, this collector box communicates the value of the watches inside.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Wood-Grain Premium Wine & Spirit Box
item.description: Magnetic closure wood-grain premium wine and spirit box — the definitive packaging solution for luxury beverage brands, from Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, 23 years). Engineered with a 3mm heavy-duty rigid greyboard structure wrapped in realistic wood-grain textured paper, this magnetic closure box delivers the gravitas of a wooden humidor at a fraction of the cost. Six wood-grain finishes are available: American white oak, French walnut, Honduran mahogany, cherry wood, African ebony, and Scandinavian pine. Each features high-definition wood-grain texturing with authentic knot and grain reproduction, finished with a matte protective laminate. The N52 neodymium magnetic closure (4 magnets) provides a premium snap-close experience while the die-cut bottle cradle insert with satin ribbon lift securely holds standard 750ml bottles, magnum 1.5L formats, and custom spirits bottle shapes. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 4-color and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV offset presses with Bobst SP 102 BMA foil stamping for brand logos and vintage markings. Our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility delivers 220,000+ rigid boxes daily under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certifications.

item.title: Matte Black Magnetic Flip-Lid Box with Hot Foil Logo for Premium Electronics
item.description: Matte black magnetic flip-lid rigid box with custom hot foil logo — engineered by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. for premium consumer electronics packaging that demands both protection and presentation. The deep matte black surface, achieved through our soft-touch or matte lamination process, provides a fingerprint-resistant, scratch-concealing finish that stays pristine through retail handling. The hot foil stamped logo — in gold, silver, copper, rose gold, or holographic — creates a striking contrast against the matte black background, elevating brand perception. Inside, a precision die-cut EVA foam tray (CNC-routered to ±0.3mm) cradles the device securely, while the microfiber or suede-effect lining prevents scratches and conveys luxury. N52 neodymium magnets deliver a satisfying, authoritative closure with ≥8N retention force — tested to 10,000+ open/close cycles. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 and Heidelberg CD 102 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm dual-factory. 23 years of manufacturing excellence, 1.7M boxes daily. See why 200+ global brands choose Bincai as their packaging partner.

Manufactured in our 18,000 sqm dual-factory (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, 2025 expansion) in Foshan, Pearl River Delta, with daily output of 1.7M boxes.

The beveled-edge mirror on the lid underside reflects the illuminated ring from above, creating depth and brilliance that enhances diamond sparkle and gemstone color. The ring sits in a precision-cut velvet cushion with elastic retention that holds the ring securely at the optimal display angle. Exterior wrapped in premium PU leatherette (30+ colors and textures) with optional hot foil stamped logo. Manufactured by 50+ specialist craft workers in our dedicated jewelry box assembly zone, with full electrostatic velvet flocking at 1.5mm pile height. 23 years of luxury packaging expertise, ISO 9001:2015, FSC, SGS, and CPSIA certified. 1.7M boxes daily from 18,000 sqm dual-factory.

This dual-tier jewelry box combines luxury aesthetics with functional LED illumination, designed for high-end jewelry retailers, boutique brands, subscription box services, and direct-to-consumer fine jewelry brands. The box features a 2.5mm rigid greyboard structure precision-wrapped in Italian-imported flocked velvet with 14 color options (midnight black, royal sapphire, burgundy red, champagne gold, blush pink, emerald green, ivory white, charcoal grey, navy blue, plum purple, teal, chocolate brown, slate, and pearl white). The integrated LED ring mirror on the inner lid features touch-dimming technology (3 brightness levels) powered by a replaceable CR2032 battery delivering 200+ hours of illumination. Produced on German-engineered KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press (15,000 sheets/hour) and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV press (inter-deck UV curing, single-pass CMYK+spot+coating) with Bobst SP 102 BMA foil stamping (±0.15mm registration).
