item.title: Velvet Jewelry Presentation Box with LED Spotlight and Dual-Layer Drawer
item.description: The Velvet Jewelry Presentation Box with LED Spotlight and Dual-Layer Drawer represents the pinnacle of jewelry packaging engineering. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. in their 18,000 sqm Foshan facility, this box transforms the unboxing moment into a theatrical experience: a magnetic reed switch triggers an automatic LED spotlight the instant the lid opens, illuminating the jewelry against a luxurious satin backdrop. The dual-layer sliding drawer — a Bincai signature design — provides a hidden lower compartment for certificates, care guides, or additional pieces without compromising the clean top-level presentation.

item.title: Velvet Jewelry Roll Travel Organizer — 6-Compartment Zipper Closure
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s velvet jewelry roll travel organizer brings the elegance of a boutique display case into a portable format. Six individually designed compartments — elastic band loops for necklaces, a removable ring bar, zippered mesh pocket for earrings, bracelet snap strap, brooch panel, and watch cushion slot — keep every piece tangle-free and protected. The exterior is wrapped in premium velvet over 2mm rigid paperboard with a suede tie closure and full YKK zipper. Manufactured on Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses with precision die-cutting in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility. 23 years of luxury packaging expertise.

item.title: Velvet Men's Cufflink Tie Clip Set Box Dual Compartment Magnetic Closure
item.description: Dual-compartment velvet men’s cufflink and tie clip set box with magnetic closure — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). Designed for men’s accessories including cufflinks, tie clips, lapel pins, collar stays, and pocket squares, this premium display box offers separate velvet-lined compartments that keep each piece organized and protected. Custom logo embossing and gold foil stamping make it ideal for luxury retail, corporate gifting, and groomsman gift sets. KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses deliver precision printing across 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory). Daily output 1.7 million boxes.

item.title: Velvet Multi-Row Watch Display Box 10-Slot with Glass Lid Push-Button Hardware
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Velvet Multi-Row Watch Display Box with 10 slots delivers museum-grade presentation for fine watch retailers and discerning collectors. Each box features a 3mm tempered glass viewing lid, deep plush velvet flocking throughout, removable watch pillows, and precision antique brass push-button latch hardware. Manufactured at our 18,000 sqm integrated facility in Foshan, Guangdong, Bincai leverages 23 years of paper box expertise and ISO 9001:2015 quality systems to produce over 1.7 million color boxes and 220,000+ gift boxes daily across KBA 1050 and Heidelberg 7+1 UV press lines.

item.title: Velvet Necklace Pendant Display Box with Transparent Window Lid
item.description:
Product Overview

Elegant velvet necklace pendant display box featuring a crystal-clear PET transparent lid that allows full product visibility without opening — ideal for retail shelf display and e-commerce photography. The interior is precision-flocked with electrostatic black velvet and includes two necklace hooks (with silicone retention caps) plus a recessed foam cushion for pendants up to 50mm diameter. The magnetic snap closure keeps the box securely shut during transport while providing an effortless open-close experience. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) — 23 years elevating jewelry packaging across our 18,000 sqm integrated facility.

item.title: Velvet Ring Presentation Box — LED Spotlight with Certificate of Authenticity Drawer & Satin Pillow
item.description: The velvet ring presentation box with LED spotlight and certificate drawer is designed for the most significant jewelry moment — the reveal. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a 23-year Foshan paper box specialist with 18,000 sqm across two facilities — this box wraps 1.5mm rigid greyboard in premium velvet with a magnetic closure that opens with satisfying precision. A warm white LED spotlight automatically illuminates the ring as the lid opens, while the concealed pull-out drawer elegantly presents the certificate of authenticity, diamond grading report, or brand story.

item.title: Velvet Solitaire Ring Display Box with Magnetic Closure & LED Mirror
item.description:
Product Overview

This velvet solitaire ring display box is purpose-built for jewelry retailers and engagement ring presentations. The lid-integrated LED spotlight activates automatically upon opening, illuminating the ring from above while the built-in mirror reflects light from below — creating a dramatic jewelry showcase effect. The single ring sits in a precision die-cut groove lined with premium satin, ensuring the ring stays perfectly centered and protected during transport. Produced by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing — manufacturing premium packaging since 2003 — each box combines 2.5mm greyboard structural integrity with soft-touch velvet flocking on the exterior for an unmistakable luxury hand feel. Our 18,000 sqm facility with daily output of 1.7 million boxes ensures consistent quality at any order volume. The magnetic N35 neodymium closure provides a satisfying snap when closing and reliable security when the box is stored or stacked. Ideal for engagement rings, wedding bands, anniversary rings, and luxury ring retail displays.

item.title: Velvet Three-Tier Jewelry Trainer Display Box — LED Mirror, Lock & Key, Travel Case
item.description: The Velvet Three-Tier Jewelry Trainer Display Box is a comprehensive jewelry presentation and storage solution designed for professionals who need to showcase, transport, and secure valuable collections. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, 23 years experience) at our 18,000 sqm dual-factory facility in Foshan, this display case combines the elegance of a luxury consumer jewelry box with the functionality of a professional trade-show trainer. Produced on our KBA Rapida 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses with 220,000+ rigid boxes daily output, we deliver consistent quality at any volume.

item.title: White Corrugated E-Commerce Mailer with Tear Strip Self-Seal Shipping
item.description: White kraft-faced corrugated e-commerce shipping mailer with integrated tear strip and self-seal adhesive closure by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The dual perforated tear strips enable frustration-free opening without scissors or knives, while the self-seal adhesive strip eliminates the need for packing tape — reducing packaging time by 40% in fulfillment operations. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory) (2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Window Die-Cut Folding Carton for Tea Sachet Display Retail
item.description: Die-cut window folding carton with clear PET film for tea sachet display at retail by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The precision die-cut window with optically clear PET film allows customers to see the tea sachets inside, building trust and conveying product quality at the point of sale. The food-grade SBS board and adhesive meet FDA and EU food contact standards. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory) (2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: 2-Tier Drawer-Slide Velvet Jewelry Display Box with Lock and Key
item.description:
Product Overview

The two-tier drawer-slide velvet jewelry display box represents the pinnacle of luxury jewelry presentation — an heirloom-quality storage solution engineered for fine jewelry brands, luxury retailers, and discerning consumers. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier, founded 2003), this box combines old-world jewelry-box charm with modern precision manufacturing.

The upper tier features a hinged lift-up lid revealing a fully flocked interior with ring roll channels (accommodating 4–12 rings), earring stud strips, necklace hooks, and a velvet-lined pendant well. The lower drawer operates on precision ball-bearing slides — tested to 5,000+ open/close cycles with ≤2N consistent pull force — and reveals compartmented channels for bracelets, bangles, and larger pieces. An antique brass lock and key mechanism (100% pairing verified) provides both security and classic jewelry-box aesthetics, with hardware finish options including polished chrome, rose gold, and matte black.

item.title: 360° Rotating Velvet Ring Display Box with LED Spotlight — Custom Logo
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s 360° rotating velvet ring display box brings kinetic presentation to fine jewelry showcasing. A motorized rotating platform delivers a full 360° product reveal under 3-point LED spotlight illumination — ideal for retail counters, trade show exhibits, and premium unboxing experiences. Push-button activation with auto-off after 60 seconds. Manufactured with KBA 1050 4-color offset printing and precision die-cutting in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility. 23 years of luxury packaging expertise.

item.title: Bamboo-Fiber Kraft Eco Gift Box with Seed Paper Tag Biodegradable
item.description: Innovative bamboo-fiber kraft eco gift box — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier with 23 years of experience. The board combines 30% fast-renewable bamboo fiber with 70% post-consumer recycled (PCR) content, printed with soy-based inks for full biodegradability. The crowning feature is a detachable plantable seed paper hang tag embedded with wildflower or herb seeds — after unboxing, the recipient plants the tag and grows flowers, creating a memorable circular-economy brand moment. Every component is home compostable within 90–180 days. Ideal for eco-conscious beauty, wellness, organic food, and sustainable fashion brands that want packaging to match their values. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across 18,000 sqm factory.

item.title: Christmas Advent Calendar Gift Box with 24 Pull-Out Drawers for Chocolate and Candy
item.description:
Product Overview

Our Christmas advent calendar gift box is a premium 24-drawer countdown packaging solution for chocolates, candies, mini toys, cosmetics, and spirits samplers. Each numbered drawer pulls out smoothly to reveal a compartment sized for truffles, pralines, or miniature products. The rigid outer shell — constructed from 2.5mm greyboard wrapped in 157gsm C1S art paper — maintains structural integrity through the full 24-day countdown, while festive CMYK printing with gold foil accents creates an irresistible holiday retail display. Outer graphics are printed on our KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press for rich, vibrant Pantone-matched colours, and drawer wraps run on the Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV line for instant-cure gloss and scratch resistance. All drawer blanks are precision-cut on the Bobst SP 102 BMA flatbed die-cutter with ±0.15mm registration for consistent slide-fit across all 24 positions.

item.title: Christmas Advent Calendar Rigid Box with 24 Die-Cut Windows and Foil Accents — Holiday Gift Packaging
item.description: The 24-window Christmas advent calendar rigid box is one of the most technically demanding products in paper packaging — 24 precisely die-cut windows, each requiring consistent alignment with printed numbering, backed by clear PET film, and integrated into a rigid box structure that must open and close smoothly through a month of daily use. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. at its 18,000 sqm Foshan facility, this advent calendar box showcases the full range of Bincai’s manufacturing capabilities: KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset for vibrant holiday graphics, Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV for spot UV and metallic accents, Bobst hot-foil for gold window numbering, precision die-cutting for 24 identical window apertures, and N52 neodymium magnet closure engineering.

item.title: Christmas Gift Box — Die-Cut Window LED Light Holiday Gift Packaging
item.description: The Christmas Gift Box with die-cut window and integrated LED light is a premium illuminated holiday packaging solution that transforms gift presentation into a memorable experience. Produced by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a 23-year manufacturer operating 18,000 sqm of ISO 9001 & FSC certified production space in Foshan — this box features a precisely die-cut PET window that reveals the product within, illuminated by a concealed LED spotlight module. The warm LED glow highlights jewelry, confectionery, or luxury accessories while the magnetic closure and plush velvet interior deliver a premium unboxing experience. Bincai’s KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses apply vivid holiday graphics with foil-stamped snowflake or star patterns on the lid.

item.title: Christmas Gift Box — Snowflake Embossed Magnetic Closure with Velvet Interior
item.description: The Christmas Gift Box with snowflake embossing and magnetic closure is a premium rigid holiday packaging solution designed for luxury seasonal gifting. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a 23-year Foshan-based factory with 18,000 sqm of production space — this box combines seasonal aesthetics with durable construction. The lid features deep snowflake embossing with hot foil stamping, while the interior is fully lined with soft velvet flocking to cradle delicate items. Bincai’s KBA 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses ensure crisp, vibrant holiday graphics with ΔE ≤ 2.0 color consistency. Each box is assembled with N52 neodymium magnets for a satisfying closure and can be customized with brand logos, custom snowflake patterns, or alternative interior linings.

item.title: Christmas Gift Box Snowflake Hot Foil Magnetic Closure Luxury Holiday
item.description:
Christmas gift box with all-over snowflake hot foil pattern and magnetic closure — the definitive premium holiday packaging solution. The richly textured snowflake foil design creates festive elegance while the magnetic flip-lid with satin ribbon pull delivers a memorable unboxing experience. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., combining 23 years of rigid box expertise with state-of-the-art hot foil technology.

Applications

Industry Product Category Typical Use
Jewelry Holiday Jewelry Collections Christmas-themed jewelry sets, holiday pendants, festive earrings
Fashion Seasonal Accessories Scarves, gloves, ties, cufflinks, holiday accessory sets
Gourmet Food Festive Treats Luxury chocolates, Christmas cookies, panettone, specialty teas
Beauty Holiday Beauty Sets Limited-edition skincare sets, festive makeup collections, fragrance gift sets
Corporate Client Holiday Gifts Executive gift sets, employee appreciation gifts, partner holiday presents
Home & Living Christmas Decor Ornament sets, candle collections, table decor gift sets

Customization Options

  • Exterior Design: All-over snowflake hot foil pattern (gold, silver, rose gold, holographic); single large snowflake foil centerpiece; alternating snowflake sizes with scattered foil stars; matte or soft-touch base paper finish
  • Color Palette: Classic Christmas red with gold foil; deep forest green with silver foil; midnight navy with silver snowflakes; winter white with holographic foil; burgundy with rose gold foil; champagne cream with gold foil
  • Foil Options: Traditional metallic gold/silver; holographic rainbow-effect foil; matte metallic foil for subtle elegance; multi-color registered foil (gold snowflakes with silver accents)
  • Interior Lining: Plush velvet in cream, black, or matching exterior color; quilted satin with diamond stitching; flocked foam insert with product-specific cavities
  • Closure & Accents: Hidden N52 neodymium magnetic flap; premium satin ribbon pull in matching or contrast color; decorative grosgrain ribbon belly band; wax seal-style closure accent
  • Logo Application: Gold/silver foil logo on interior lid; debossed logo with foil fill on exterior base; custom-printed gift card/tag included in box
  • Size Range: 100×100×50mm (small favor) to 350×250×100mm (large gift set)
  • Add-ons: Magnetic gift card holder; ribbon tie closure with gift tag; LED tea light insert for illuminated presentation

Production Specifications

  • Greyboard Construction: 1200–1600gsm greyboard core; 2.5mm wall thickness; precision miter-fold corners
  • Paper Lamination: 157–200gsm coated art paper; matte or soft-touch lamination; color-matched base paper for Christmas palette
  • Hot Foil Application: Bobst SP 102 BMA hot foil stamping; all-over snowflake pattern with ±0.15mm registration; multi-color foil options with sequential die application; holographic foil with 3D effect
  • Magnet System: N52 neodymium disc magnets (8–12mm); embedded in lid and base; polarity-aligned for consistent closure
  • Ribbon Pull: Premium satin ribbon (15–25mm width); heat-sealed ends to prevent fraying; color-matched to design
  • KBA Rapida 105 + Heidelberg CD 102 7+1 UV: CMYK + spot colors + UV coating; single-pass production
  • Lead Time: 15–20 working days (multi-color foil); 10–12 days for single-color foil
  • Daily Capacity: 25,000–45,000 rigid gift boxes

Quality Details

  • ISO 9001:2015 certified
  • FSC Chain-of-Custody certified
  • Foil Registration: All-over pattern alignment within ±0.15mm across entire lid surface; consistent foil density without voids or bridging
  • Foil Adhesion: 3M 610 tape test — zero foil lift-off; accelerated aging 72h at 57°C / 95% RH — no delamination
  • Magnet Pull Force: ≥2.0kg per magnet pair; 100% QC inspection; 5000+ cycles durability
  • Ribbon Attachment: Heat-sealed attachment tested to 5kg pull force; UV-resistant dye for colorfastness
  • Drop Test: ISTA 1A — box must remain closed and protect contents through 10-drop sequence from 760mm
  • Free pre-production sample — 7–10 working days with foil design

Factory

  • 23 years manufacturing experience (founded 2003)
  • 18,000 sqm factory (10,000 sqm main + 8,000 sqm smart factory)
  • KBA Rapida 105 + Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV
  • 3 Bobst hot foil stamping machines for high-volume foil production
  • Export to 40+ countries globally
  • Daily output: 1.7 million boxes total

FAQ

Q: What is the minimum order quantity for Christmas snowflake foil boxes?

item.title: Clamshell Magnetic Closure Presentation Box with Custom Foam Insert — Electronics Packaging
item.description: The clamshell magnetic closure presentation box with custom foam insert is the premium packaging standard for consumer electronics, delivering the unboxing experience that defines luxury tech brands. The clamshell design opens like a book to reveal the product nestled in a precision die-cut foam cradle, while concealed N52 neodymium magnets provide a satisfying, secure closure with an audible snap. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, 23 years) at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses, with ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certifications.

item.title: Collapsible Flat-Ship Rigid Gift Box — 2-Piece Magnetic Closure, Premium Custom Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The Collapsible Flat-Ship Rigid Gift Box solves the fundamental logistics challenge of rigid packaging: bulk. Traditional rigid boxes ship fully assembled, consuming up to 5× the freight volume of their flat counterparts. Our patented collapsible design — engineered by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. across 23 years of paper box manufacturing — ships completely flat and assembles by hand in under 10 seconds without glue, tape, or tools. The result: 70% freight savings without a single compromise on the structural integrity or premium feel customers expect from a rigid setup box.

item.title: Compostable Kraft Window Tea Box with PLA Film — Organic Loose Leaf Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s compostable kraft window tea box is engineered for the zero-waste supply chain. Every component — from the 350gsm FSC-certified kraft paperboard to the PLA window film derived from corn starch — biodegrades in commercial composting facilities. Printed with soy-based inks and assembled with water-based adhesives, this box meets EN 13432 compostability standards while delivering the shelf presence organic tea brands demand. Manufactured on KBA 1050 4-color offset presses in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility. 23 years of sustainable packaging expertise.

item.title: Corrugated Bottle Shipper with Die-Cut Foam Insert Wine Spirit Packaging
item.description: Corrugated bottle shipper with die-cut foam insert for wine and spirit packaging — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). Engineered for wineries, distilleries, and beverage e-commerce requiring ISTA 3A-certified single-bottle shipping. The double-wall B/C-flute corrugated construction (6.5mm combined thickness) provides crush resistance for transit while the precision die-cut EPE foam insert (20mm density) suspends the bottle neck and base, absorbing impact from all directions. Self-locking bottom eliminates tape, and the integrated tear strip allows recipients to open without tools. Tested and certified for 750ml wine bottles (Bordeaux, Burgundy, Champagne) and 700ml spirit bottles (whiskey, vodka, gin). Produced on automated corrugated converting lines at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility with ISTA 3A drop-test validation. Daily output: 1.5 million boxes under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Corrugated E-Commerce Shipping Mailer with Tear Strip for Apparel & Soft Goods
item.description:
Product Overview

The Corrugated E-Commerce Shipping Mailer with tear strip is engineered for apparel brands, textile retailers, and soft goods fulfillment operations that demand both product protection and an elevated unboxing experience. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — 23 years of packaging expertise across an 18,000 sqm ISO 9001 & FSC certified facility — this mailer eliminates the frustration of tape-sealed boxes with a clean, one-pull tear strip that opens smoothly without ripping the branding surface.

item.title: Corrugated Electronics Shipper Custom Foam Insert ESD-Safe Fragile
item.description: Corrugated electronics shipper with custom ESD-safe foam insert — engineered for the safe transit of sensitive electronic components and devices. The double-wall BC-flute construction provides crush resistance while the anti-static/conductive foam insert prevents electrostatic discharge damage. Produced on industry-leading KBA 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses at our 10,000 sqm ISO 9001 & FSC certified factory. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. with 23 years of experience, daily output of 1.7 million boxes, trusted by electronics manufacturers worldwide.

item.title: Corrugated Flat-Pack Furniture Mailer for Ready-to-Assemble Kit Shipping
item.description:
Product Overview

Purpose-engineered corrugated mailer for ready-to-assemble (RTA) furniture kit shipping — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with mandatory on-site audit verified. 23 years of Guangdong packaging manufacturing (founded 2003) serving 200+ global furniture, home goods, and e-commerce brands.

Die-cut internal corrugated partitions create dedicated compartments for wood/MDF panels, hardware packs (screws, dowels, Allen keys, cam locks), assembly instructions, and accessories — everything the consumer needs arrives organized in one damage-free box. Double-wall BC (6mm) or EB (8mm) flute construction delivers edge crush resistance (ECT ≥ 44 lb/in) for pallet stacking in warehouse and container shipping while the fluted structure absorbs transit shock and vibration. Full-overlap flaps or self-locking crash-lock bottom eliminates tape during assembly line packing — reducing fulfillment center labor by up to 40%. Integrated tear strip allows tool-free consumer opening.

item.title: Corrugated Laptop Shipping Box — Custom Foam Insert for Electronics Protection
item.description:
Product Overview

Heavy-duty corrugated shipping box purpose-engineered for laptop and electronics protection. Double-wall B/C-flute construction with a custom die-cut foam insert that suspends the device in a shock-absorbing cradle — isolating it from impact, vibration, and compression during transit. Self-locking crash-bottom design assembles in seconds with no tape, while the perforated tear strip enables tool-free recipient opening. Optional ESD-safe pink foam for sensitive electronics. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. at 1.7M boxes daily output, serving laptop OEMs, IT asset recovery firms, and electronics repair centers worldwide.

item.title: Corrugated Tablet iPad Mailer with Die-Cut Foam Cradle Electronics Shipping Box
item.description:
Corrugated Tablet iPad Mailer with Die-Cut Foam Cradle — Electronics Shipping Solution

Protect valuable electronics during e-commerce fulfillment with Bincai’s precision-engineered corrugated tablet mailer. Designed for the rigorous demands of direct-to-consumer electronics shipping, this mailer combines structural integrity with a custom die-cut foam cradle that suspends the tablet away from all six box walls.

Why This Mailer is Essential for Electronics E-Commerce

Tablets and iPads are high-value, impact-sensitive products. Standard brown boxes with void fill lead to damage claims, returns, and disappointed customers. Bincai’s tablet mailer eliminates these risks through engineered protection.

item.title: Corrugated Triangle Tube Mailer for Posters and Artwork with Crush-Proof End Caps
item.description: Corrugated triangle tube mailer for posters, artwork, and large-format prints — designed and manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience. The triangular prism design provides superior crush resistance compared to traditional round tubes — three reinforced edges distribute impact forces, and the rigid end caps lock into position to prevent telescoping during transit. Constructed from 200lb test ECT-32 B-flute corrugated board with kraft or white-top liner, each mailer features a self-sealing adhesive strip (peel-and-seal) and a perforated tear strip for frustration-free recipient opening. Ideal for e-commerce poster sellers, art galleries, photographers, architects, and print-on-demand businesses. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 4-color and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Custom Corrugated Half-Slotted Container with Die-Cut Partitions for Glass Bottles
item.description:
Product Overview

Our custom half-slotted container (HSC) with die-cut partitions is engineered specifically for the safe transport of glass bottles — wine, spirits, olive oil, gourmet beverages, and pharmaceutical liquids. The HSC design features an open top with flaps on one face only, combined with precisely die-cut interlocking dividers that isolate each bottle and prevent glass-to-glass contact during transit. Manufactured from double-wall B/C flute corrugated board for superior crush resistance, each container is assembled with industrial hot-melt adhesive for structural integrity. Bincai’s 23 years of packaging expertise and ISO 9001-certified quality system ensure every shipper meets ISTA performance standards.

item.title: Custom Folding Carton Auto-Bottom with PET Window Candle Soap Food
item.description:
Custom folding carton with auto-lock bottom and PET window — the workhorse of retail packaging combining quick assembly, product visibility, and premium print quality. The auto-bottom design erects in under 2 seconds without manual folding, making it ideal for high-volume production lines. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd.

Applications

Industry Product Category Typical Use
Home Fragrance Scented Candles Single and multi-wick candles, candle gift sets, wax melts
Personal Care Artisanal Soaps Handmade soaps, soap gift sets, bath bombs, solid shampoo bars
Gourmet Food Specialty Foods Artisan cookies, chocolates, tea bags, coffee pods, dried fruits
Health & Wellness Natural Products Essential oil sets, herbal supplements, natural cosmetics
Pet Products Pet Treats Dog treats, catnip toys, pet accessory sets
Stationery Gift Sets Pen sets, notebook + pen combos, desk accessory kits

Customization Options

  • Board Grade: 350–450gsm C1S (coated one side) or C2S (coated two sides); FBB (folding box board) 350–500gsm; SBS (solid bleached sulfate) for food contact; kraft-back board for eco positioning
  • Surface Finish: Gloss lamination (standard); matte lamination; soft-touch velvet lamination; aqueous coating; UV spot varnish for logo/texture highlight
  • Window Options: Die-cut window with 0.3–0.5mm clear PET panel; full-face window for maximum product visibility; shaped window (circle, heart, brand silhouette); frosted PET for subdued look
  • Printing & Effects: Full CMYK offset on KBA 1050 + Heidelberg 7+1 UV; spot Pantone colors; gold/silver hot foil stamping; holographic cold foil; embossing/debossing
  • Closure: Auto-lock bottom (standard); tuck-top with friction lock; tuck-top with thumb tab; straight tuck or reverse tuck
  • Size Range: 60×60×50mm (small tea light) to 300×200×250mm (large gift set)
  • Add-ons: Tear-away euro slot for pegboard retail; hang-tab for shelf display; perforated tear strip; QR code printing; sequential numbering

Production Specifications

  • Board Material: 350–450gsm C1S/C2S board; FSC certified options available; food-grade SBS for direct food contact per FDA 21 CFR / EU 1935/2004
  • Auto-Bottom Design: Pre-glued auto-lock bottom with hot melt adhesive; erects in <2 seconds on assembly line; 4-corner glued bottom with reinforced construction
  • Window Construction: Die-cut window opening; PET panel heat-sealed or adhesive-applied; edge-to-edge registration within ±0.5mm
  • Printing: KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset (15,000 sheets/hour); Heidelberg CD 102 7+1 UV (CMYK + spot + coating in single pass); 175–200 LPI screen ruling
  • Die-Cutting: Steel-rule die cutting with ±0.3mm tolerance; creasing for clean fold lines without cracking; waste stripping included
  • Gluing: Automatic folder-gluer with hot melt adhesive; 4-corner and 6-corner gluing capability
  • Lead Time: 10–15 working days (standard); 15–20 working days (with foil/embossing)
  • Daily Capacity: 150,000–300,000 folding cartons

Seven-Stage QC Gates

  1. Incoming Raw Materials — Board grammage/caliper/moisture content; PET sheet thickness, clarity, and UV resistance; adhesive batch certification; ink viscosity and color calibration
  2. Pre-Press — Plate inspection and registration check; color proof against Pantone standards; die-cutting steel rule verification; window die-cut alignment proof
  3. Print Run — Inline spectrophotometer every 500 sheets; KBA/Heidelberg color density monitoring; ΔE ≤ 2.0 for brand colors; 175–200 LPI screen ruling inspection
  4. Post-Print — Surface inspection under 1000 lux; lamination adhesion cross-hatch tape test (ASTM F2252, 5B rating); foil stamping registration verification; coating uniformity check
  5. Die-Cutting & Window Patching — First-off approval for die-cut precision (±0.3mm); PET window alignment and adhesion verification; creasing depth check for clean fold lines without cracking
  6. Gluing & Assembly — Auto-bottom lock mechanism test (100% sampling); hot melt adhesive bond strength; 4-corner bottom reinforcement inspection; dimensional accuracy check
  7. Final Audit — AQL 2.5 sampling per ISO 2859-1 Level II; ISTA 1A drop test (10 drops from 760mm); window peel test (5N/25mm); bottom load test (150% rated capacity); food-grade migration certificate verification where applicable

Sustainability & Compliance

Standard Certification Scope
ISO 9001:2015 Certified — annual third-party audit Full factory quality management system
FSC Chain-of-Custody FSC CXXXXXX — independently audited Paperboard traceability from responsible forestry
FDA 21 CFR Compliance — food-grade SBS board Direct food contact for dry and fatty foods
EU 1935/2004 Migration testing available Food contact materials — overall and specific migration limits
REACH (EC 1907/2006) Compliance documentation Inks, adhesives, coatings — restricted substances below threshold
CPSIA (US) Compliance certificate available Total lead ≤ 100 ppm in surface coatings and substrates
Soy-Based Inks Standard on all offset printing Low-VOC, renewable resource, vibrant color gamut
Recycled Content Up to 85% post-consumer in kraft-back board Verified by supplier certification
PLA Window Option Industrially compostable (EN 13432) Plant-based window film replacing PET for fully plastic-free packaging
Waste Management 98% paper waste recycled In-house baling; Nine Dragons recycling partner

Why Choose Bincai for Folding Cartons

Guangdong Bincai Color Printing brings 23 years of precision folding carton manufacturing to every project. Here’s why global brands trust us for their auto-bottom window cartons:

item.title: Custom Folding Carton Reverse-Tuck Perfume Sleeve with Spot UV Matte Lamination
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Custom Reverse-Tuck Perfume Sleeve combines the efficiency of folding carton production with luxury cosmetics aesthetics. Crafted from 350gsm SBS board with matte lamination, a precision spot UV gloss pattern overlay, and gold foil hot-stamped branding — this reverse-tuck sleeve elevates perfume bottle presentation while remaining cost-effective for volume production. The custom die-cut window allows the fragrance bottle’s design to shine through, while the reverse-tuck closure provides secure retail-ready presentation. Manufactured at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility producing over 1.5 million folding cartons daily.

item.title: Custom Folding Carton with Crush-Lock Bottom and Metallic Foil Logo — Bincai Premium Retail Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Our custom crush-lock bottom folding carton combines efficient assembly with premium branding. The patented crush-lock base snaps into place in seconds — no glue, no tape, no machine setup — dramatically reducing fulfillment labor while maintaining a rigid, flat-bottom structure that stands securely on retail shelves. Manufactured on our KBA 1050 4-color press with Heidelberg 7+1 UV for vibrant CMYK reproduction, each carton features precision hot foil stamping for your metallic logo and soft-touch matte lamination for a luxurious tactile finish. With 10,000 sqm of production space and daily output capacity exceeding 1.5 million boxes, Bincai delivers consistent quality at scale.

item.title: Custom Folding Carton with Window Cutout for Artisan Chocolate Display
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Custom Folding Carton with Window Cutout is purpose-designed for artisan chocolate makers, patisseries, and premium confectionery brands who need their handcrafted products to be visible at retail. The die-cut window with crystal-clear PET film creates a display case effect — customers see the glossy temper, cocoa dusting, and hand-decoration before opening. Printed on 350gsm CCNB (Clay Coated News Back) with matte lamination on our KBA 1050 4-color press, this carton combines food-safe materials with luxury aesthetics at volume-friendly pricing. Bincai produces 1.7 million color boxes daily with ISO 9001:2015 quality systems.

item.title: Custom Heart-Shaped Rigid Gift Box with Magnetic Closure and Velvet Interior
item.description:
Product Overview

Our custom heart-shaped rigid gift box combines romantic design with premium craftsmanship. The distinctive heart silhouette is constructed from 2.5mm rigid greyboard, wrapped in luxurious art paper with a plush velvet-flocked interior. A discreet magnetic closure keeps contents secure while the satin ribbon adds an elegant opening experience. Manufactured on our Heidelberg 7+1 UV press with precision die-cutting for consistent heart contours — ideal for Valentine’s Day, wedding proposals, anniversary gifts, and luxury jewelry presentation.

item.title: Custom Kraft Paper Pyramid Gift Box with Cotton Drawstring — Reusable Eco-Luxury Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The Kraft Paper Pyramid Gift Box with Cotton Drawstring Closure is a packaging object that consumers keep. Its architectural silhouette — a four-sided pyramid with a soft cotton drawstring emerging from the apex — transforms product packaging from disposable wrapper to reusable keepsake. Unlike conventional boxes that are discarded seconds after unboxing, this pyramid box becomes a jewelry holder, a desk organizer, a bathroom cotton-ball container, or simply a decorative object on a shelf — extending the brand’s presence in the consumer’s life for months or years.

item.title: Custom Magnetic Closure Fountain Pen Display Box with Faux Leather Wrap
item.description:
Product Overview

Our custom magnetic closure fountain pen display box wraps premium greyboard in elegant faux leather, creating a sophisticated presentation befitting luxury writing instruments. The book-style lid opens on a hidden magnetic closure to reveal a plush suede-lined interior with a precision die-cut pen tray — cradling each fountain pen, rollerball, or ballpoint in its own sculpted recess. The faux leather exterior is available in classic black, rich cognac brown, deep navy, or custom colors with optional debossing and hot foil stamping for brand logos. Manufactured in our 10,000 sqm ISO 9001-certified facility with Heidelberg 7+1 UV printing for any interior branding, each box reflects Bincai’s 23 years of premium packaging expertise.

item.title: Custom Printed Corrugated Subscription Box — Full-Color Wrap with Tear Strip & Self-Locking Base
item.description:
Product Overview

Custom printed corrugated subscription box engineered for direct-to-consumer (DTC) brands shipping curated products monthly. The single-wall B-flute construction provides lightweight strength with full-color litho-laminated art paper wrapping for premium unboxing impact. An integrated tear strip enables frustration-free opening, while the self-locking crash-lock bottom assembles in under 3 seconds — saving fulfillment center labor. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) in our 18,000 sqm Foshan dual-factory complex. Daily output of 1.7 million boxes under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Custom Rigid Trunk-Style Gift Box with Metal Corners & Leather Handle
item.description:
Product Overview

The Custom Rigid Trunk-Style Gift Box fuses old-world travel-trunk aesthetics with modern precision manufacturing. Produced by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — operating an 18,000 sqm facility (10,000 sqm main factory + 8,000 sqm smart factory commissioned 2025) with 23 years of paper packaging expertise — this trunk box features real metal corner protectors, a stitched full-grain leather carry handle, and a telescopic lid that evokes vintage steamer trunks. It transforms any product into an heirloom unboxing experience that consumers keep and repurpose.

item.title: Custom Two-Tier Telescopic Rigid Gift Box with Magnetic Closure
item.description:
Product Overview

Our custom two-tier telescopic rigid gift box delivers an elevated unboxing experience through its dual-level presentation. The telescopic lid lifts off to reveal two stacked trays — each foam-lined and wrapped in luxury art paper — creating a dramatic reveal for premium products. Constructed from 2.5mm rigid greyboard and manufactured on our Heidelberg 7+1 UV press with precision Bobst die-cutting, this box combines structural integrity with visual sophistication. The soft-touch matte lamination adds a velvet-like tactility while the hidden neodymium magnetic closure ensures the lid seats perfectly every time. Produced at Bincai’s 18,000 sqm integrated factory with 23 years of premium packaging expertise, each box undergoes a rigorous 7-stage quality control process — from incoming board inspection (ISO 186) to final packaging audit. Perfect for gourmet chocolate collections, corporate gift sets, premium cosmetics duo packs, and luxury confectionery assortments.

item.title: Custom Window Folding Carton with Gold Foil Stamping Bakery Pastry Box
item.description: Custom window folding carton with gold foil stamping for bakery and pastry packaging — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). Engineered for bakeries, patisseries, and food brands requiring premium shelf presentation with product visibility. The die-cut PET window (0.3mm food-grade) allows customers to see the product while maintaining structural integrity. Gold foil stamping on kraft or white art paper stock creates an artisanal, premium aesthetic. Auto-lock bottom eliminates glue and speeds up assembly in high-volume environments. Produced on German-engineered KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press with Bobst SP 102 CER flatbed die-cutting for precise window and crease registration. Our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility delivers 1.7 million folding cartons daily under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certification — from a single-source manufacturer with in-house design, prepress, printing, die-cutting, and gluing.

item.title: Die-Cut Corrugated Display Mailer with Window — Retail Shelf-Ready Packaging
item.description: The die-cut corrugated display mailer with window is a dual-purpose packaging solution that transitions seamlessly from protective shipping mailer to point-of-sale display unit. Designed for brands shipping directly to retail shelves — subscription boxes, beauty products, snack assortments, and consumer electronics — this box eliminates the need for separate shipping and display packaging, reducing material waste, handling labor, and total packaging cost. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, 23 years) at our 18,000 sqm factory in Foshan, China, with ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certifications.

item.title: Double-Layer Slide-Out Velvet Necklace Display Box with Magnetic Closure
item.description:
Product Overview

The double-layer slide-out velvet necklace display box features an innovative dual-tray design: a top compartment for pendant display with die-cut flocked insert, and a pull-out lower drawer for chain storage — both lined in premium satin. The 2mm rigid greyboard construction wrapped in 180gsm velvet flocking delivers luxury tactility, while the hidden magnetic side closure keeps both trays securely in place. Ideal for jewelry retailers, e-commerce brands, and bridal gifting where necklace presentation matters.

item.title: Double-Layer Velvet Jewelry Box with Magnetic Flap Ring Earring Display
item.description:
Product Overview

Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — founded 2003 in Foshan’s Shunde district with 23 years of packaging manufacturing heritage — presents this premium double-layer velvet jewelry box with magnetic flap closure, purpose-engineered for jewelry brands and retailers seeking elegant, organized display for ring and earring collections. The double-layer architecture features a removable upper tray with precision Bobst die-cut ring slots (configurable 8–24 positions) and vertical earring card holders, plus a spacious lower compartment for necklaces, bracelets, certificates, and care cards. Black premium electrostatic flocked velvet interior (1.2mm nylon pile height with anti-shed treatment) cradles each piece in non-abrasive luxury. The N42 neodymium magnetic flap provides a satisfying, silent closure with invisible magnet integration — no visible hardware disrupts the clean exterior aesthetic. Produced on German-engineered KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press with fingerprint-resistant soft-touch matte lamination at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory expansion completed 2025). Daily output of 220,000+ luxury gift boxes under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Double-Wall Corrugated Champagne Shipper with Die-Cut Foam Cradle 6-Bottle Export
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Double-Wall Corrugated Champagne Shipper solves the most demanding challenge in wine logistics: delivering six glass bottles intact across continents. Built from BC-flute double-wall corrugated with a precision die-cut EPE foam cradle that isolates each bottle with 25mm foam walls between compartments. ISTA 3A certified for international courier transit (DHL, FedEx, UPS), this shipper has been drop-tested at 1.2m on all faces and edges with full bottle weight. The self-locking bottom assembles in seconds without tape, and the tear-strip opening provides a premium unboxing experience for direct-to-consumer champagne sales.

item.title: Double-Wall Corrugated Export Pallet Box for Industrial Machinery Parts
item.description:
Product Overview

Double-wall corrugated export pallet box engineered for heavy industrial machinery parts — engine components, gearboxes, hydraulic cylinders, motor assemblies, automotive spares, and construction equipment accessories. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) in our 18,000 sqm Foshan dual-factory complex (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory). Our heavy-duty export boxes combine BC/BE flute double-wall or triple-wall 7-ply construction with reinforced bottom pallet integration, providing up to 1,500kg dynamic stacking strength for ocean freight and intermodal container transport. Daily output of 1.7 million boxes under ISO 9001:2015 quality management and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Double-Wall Corrugated Shipping Mailer with Tear Strip for E-Commerce
item.description: Double-wall BC-flute corrugated shipping mailer with integrated tear strip for frustration-free e-commerce fulfillment — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The patented tear strip design allows end consumers to open packages in under 2 seconds without tools, reducing customer frustration and return rates. BC-flute construction delivers exceptional crush resistance for apparel, books, cosmetics, electronics, and subscription box fulfillment. Produced on our KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV offset presses with in-line flexo capability across 18,000 sqm of ISO-certified factory space (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory expansion, 2025). ISTA 3A transit-tested for drop, vibration, and compression.

item.title: Double-Wall Corrugated Wine Shipping Box with Custom Foam Insert (2-Bottle)
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Double-Wall Corrugated Wine Shipping Box with Custom EPE Foam Insert is engineered for wineries, wine clubs, and DTC (Direct-to-Consumer) wine e-commerce who need bottles to arrive intact — every time. BC-flute double-wall construction provides structural rigidity that single-wall boxes cannot match, while the precision die-cut EPE foam insert cradles each bottle with 360° shock absorption. ISTA 1A drop-test certified and manufactured at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility with 1.5 million corrugated boxes daily capacity, this is the shipping solution that serious wine sellers trust for their vintage Bordeaux and cult Napa Cabs alike.

item.title: Drawer-Style Rigid Watch & Accessory Gift Box — Dual Compartment Velvet Interior
item.description:
Product Overview

Premium drawer-style rigid watch and accessory gift box with dual compartments — designed and manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). This innovative two-tier design combines a top-level watch display platform with a smooth-gliding pull-out drawer for accessories, merging premium presentation with functional storage that watch collectors and luxury brands demand. The top compartment features a custom die-cut EVA or PU foam watch pillow (±0.2mm tolerance) in your choice of velvet, suede, or leatherette lining, while the drawer below accommodates extra straps, bracelet tools, warranty cards, and owner’s manuals. The magnetic slide-lock mechanism uses N42 neodymium magnets for secure closure with a satisfying glide action — tested for 20,000+ open/close cycles with zero degradation. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset (15,000 sheets/hour) and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses (inter-deck UV curing, single-pass CMYK+spot+coating) with Bobst SP 102 BMA hot foil stamping at ±0.15mm registration at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility. CNC corner wrapping ensures ±0.3mm precision at all four corners. Daily output of 220,000+ rigid boxes under ISO 9001:2015, FSC Chain-of-Custody, and Sedex SMETA certification.

item.title: Folding Carton Sleeve & Tray Combo for Candle & Soap Gift Sets
item.description:
Product Overview

The Folding Carton Sleeve & Tray Combo is purpose-built for the booming premium candle and artisan soap market — a packaging format that combines retail shelf impact with practical product protection. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (23 years of paper box expertise, 18,000 sqm ISO 9001 & FSC certified facility), this two-piece system pairs a rigid-feel printed sleeve with a precisely scored fold-up tray that cradles candles, soap bars, bath bombs, or skincare sets without additional inserts.

item.title: Folding Carton Sleeve and Tray Combo — Premium Confectionery Retail Display Packaging
item.description:

Folding carton sleeve and tray combo designed for premium confectionery retail display — artisan chocolates, macarons, luxury biscuits, nougats, dragées, and fine patisserie products.
