Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) in our 18,000 sqm Foshan dual-factory complex (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory). Printed on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses using food-safe, low-migration inks with optional PET or PLA window patching. Daily output of 1.7 million boxes under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Folding Carton Sleeve Wrap for Luxury Chocolate Bar — Foil-Stamped Window Display
item.description: Elegant folding carton sleeve wrap for luxury chocolate bars and premium confectionery, manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier. 350gsm SBS (solid bleached sulfate) board with soft-touch matte lamination, hot foil-stamped decorative border, and a clear die-cut PET window that showcases the chocolate bar inside. Slide-on sleeve design — the inner tray slides out revealing the confectionery in a premium presentation.

item.title: Folding Carton with Built-in Product Stand for Retail Counter POP Display
item.description: Innovative dual-function folding carton that transforms from shipping mailer to countertop display stand — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier with 23 years of experience. The patented crease-and-fold structure ships flat as a standard carton for product protection during transit, then unfolds at retail into an angled display stand that elevates the product for maximum visibility. Die-cut locking tabs hold the display position without glue, tape, or tools — pure structural engineering from Bincai’s in-house design team. Eliminates the need for separate retail display fixtures, reducing packaging waste and store labor. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 4-color and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses across 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, 2025 expansion).

item.title: Folding Carton with Die-Cut Blister Tray — Custom Pharma & Supplement Retail Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Pharmaceutical-grade folding carton with custom die-cut blister tray for pill, capsule, tablet, and vial packaging. The reverse-tuck or straight-tuck carton design with integrated blister insert provides organized product presentation while meeting pharmaceutical retail display requirements. Full CMYK offset printing on SBS board with aqueous coating for moisture resistance. Optional tamper-evident seal, child-resistant closure, and braille embossing. Manufactured in our ISO 9001:2015 certified facility with GMP-ready production environment, supporting 1.7 million boxes daily.

item.title: FSC Certified Kraft Paper Drawer Box — Bamboo Pull Handle & Soy-Based Ink Printing
item.description:
Product Overview

FSC certified kraft paper drawer box designed for eco-conscious brands seeking fully sustainable luxury packaging. The slide-out drawer mechanism features a natural bamboo pull handle and an internal cotton ribbon stop to prevent drawer separation. Exterior printing uses soy-based inks on uncoated kraft paperboard for a tactile, organic aesthetic that communicates environmental commitment. The entire box — board, ink, adhesive, and handle — is 100% recyclable in standard paper waste streams and home-compostable (EN 13432 compliant materials). Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) in our FSC Chain-of-Custody certified Foshan facility with 1.7M daily output capacity.

item.title: Full-Overlap Corrugated Mailer for Heavy-Duty Industrial Parts Shipping
item.description: Heavy-duty full-overlap slotted container (FOL) engineered for industrial parts shipping — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier with 23 years of experience. The full-overlap design extends all top and bottom flaps to the full depth of the box, creating a double-thickness top and bottom that dramatically increases stacking strength — critical for warehouse palletization and container shipping. Double-wall BC or EB flute construction absorbs shock and vibration while maintaining edge crush resistance. Ideal for automotive components, machinery replacement parts, metal fabrications, and heavy industrial goods. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color flexo and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory).

item.title: Fully Custom Printed Triangular Gift Box for Holiday Gifting
item.description:
Product Overview

The custom printed triangular gift box breaks away from rectangular convention — its distinctive geometric silhouette commands attention on retail shelves, under Christmas trees, and in social media unboxing content. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com and Audited Supplier with 23 years of rigid box expertise — each box is built with 1200-1600gsm greyboard cores wrapped in premium art paper and finished on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg Speedmaster XL 7+1 UV presses.

item.title: Gable-Top Folding Carton for Gourmet Food Takeaway Packaging — Bincai Food-Grade
item.description:
Product Overview

The classic gable-top folding carton — the universally recognized shape for premium gourmet food takeaway — engineered for assembly-line efficiency and consumer delight. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member and Audited Supplier on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). The iconic peaked roof with integrated carry handle provides instant brand recognition and practical portability — distinguishable from across a farmers market or café. The self-locking base snaps into place without adhesive, enabling rapid filling on bakery, deli, and confectionery production lines. Food-grade barrier coating protects contents from moisture migration and grease penetration while maintaining full recyclability. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset (15,000 sheets/hour) and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm dual-factory complex (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, commissioned 2025) in Foshan, Guangdong. Daily output of 1.7 million boxes serves 200+ global food brands.

item.title: Heavy-Duty Corrugated TV Monitor Shipping Box with EPE Foam Corner Protectors
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s heavy-duty corrugated TV/monitor shipping box is engineered for the most demanding electronics logistics. Double-wall BC-flute construction delivers exceptional crush resistance (ECT ≥7.5 kN/m), while custom die-cut EPE foam corner blocks cradle the display at its four most vulnerable points. Top and bottom cushion pads absorb vertical impact forces during transit. The self-locking bottom eliminates the need for additional assembly labor, and reinforced H-tape closure ensures the box stays sealed through multi-leg distribution. ISTA 3A certified for parcel delivery and LTL freight environments.

item.title: Hexagonal Corrugated Candle Shipping Mailer with Die-Cut Foam Insert — Glassware Protection
item.description:
Product Overview

Glass candle jars are among the most challenging products to ship. A single drop from sorting-conveyor height can shatter a $35 artisanal candle into unusable fragments — and the brand pays for it twice: once in product loss and again in customer disappointment. The Hexagonal Corrugated Candle Shipping Mailer is engineered from the ground up to solve this problem, and manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — 23 years of paper packaging expertise, 10,000 sqm ISO 9001:2015 & FSC certified dual-factory operation, with 1.5 million boxes daily output capacity on Heidelberg Speedmaster XL 7+1 UV and KBA Rapida 105 offset press lines.

item.title: Hexagonal Double-Layer Jewelry Box — Magnetic Closure with Velvet Flocking
item.description: The Hexagonal Double-Layer Jewelry Box is a sophisticated six-sided rigid packaging solution engineered for multi-piece jewelry presentation. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. at its 18,000 sqm dual-factory complex in Foshan, China, this box combines distinctive hexagonal geometry with practical dual-layer storage. The upper tray features die-cut velvet-lined cavities for rings and earrings, while the lower compartment accommodates necklaces, bracelets, or a watch. The magnetic closure uses four N52 neodymium magnets for secure, satisfying closure, and the exterior can be wrapped in art paper with foil stamping, embossing, or full-color printing via Bincai’s KBA 1050 and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses.

item.title: Hexagonal Rigid Gift Box Magnetic Closure Custom Die-Cut Window Wedding
item.description:
Hexagonal rigid gift box with magnetic closure and custom die-cut window — a sophisticated geometric packaging solution that stands out on retail shelves. The six-sided design creates natural visual interest while the die-cut window provides product visibility without compromising structural integrity. Perfect for wedding favors, luxury chocolates, premium cosmetics, and corporate gift sets. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd.

Applications

Industry Product Category Typical Use
Wedding Wedding Favors Individual guest favors, bridal party gifts, table centerpiece boxes
Confectionery Premium Chocolates Artisan chocolate collections, truffle assortments, macaron gift sets
Cosmetics Luxury Skincare Sets Serum + cream duo sets, travel-size product collections
Corporate Executive Gifts Branded gift boxes for clients, employee recognition, holiday gifts
Tea & Coffee Specialty Tea Collections Loose-leaf tea samplers, tea bag collections, coffee capsule sets
Candles Premium Candle Gifts Single luxury candle presentation, candle + accessory sets

Customization Options

  • Exterior Finish: Matte or gloss lamination on 157–200gsm art paper; soft-touch velvet lamination; linen-texture embossed paper; metallic foil paper (gold, silver, rose gold, copper)
  • Window Design: Custom die-cut window shape (hexagonal, circular, heart, brand logo silhouette); 0.3–0.5mm clear PET window panel; anti-scratch PET coating; frosted PET for diffused product visibility
  • Interior Lining: Black, cream, or custom-color velvet; satin with quilted stitching pattern; die-cut foam insert with flocked surface; magnetic product retention system
  • Closure: Hidden N52 neodymium magnets in lid rim; magnetic flap with decorative ribbon pull-tab; side-snap magnets for seamless exterior
  • Logo Application: Gold/silver foil stamping on lid center or one hexagonal face; full-wrap foil stamping on all 6 sides; debossed logo pattern; UV spot varnish on logo
  • Size Range: 80mm across flats (small favor size) to 250mm across flats (collection box)
  • Ribbon/Band: Satin ribbon belly band; elastic gold cord band; custom-printed paper band with brand messaging
  • Additional: Double-layer hexagonal tray for 2-tier product display; removable insert tray

Production Specifications

  • Greyboard Core: 1200–1800gsm greyboard; 2.5mm wall thickness; precision die-cut hexagonal panels with 120° corner angles, ±0.3mm tolerance
  • Paper Lamination: 157–200gsm C1S/C2S art paper; full-wrap printing on all 6 exterior faces; registered graphics across panel boundaries
  • Window Construction: Die-cut opening in greyboard + art paper; PET window panel heat-sealed or adhesive-bonded; edge-to-edge window clearance for product visibility
  • Magnet System: N52 neodymium disc magnets (6–10mm diameter) embedded in lid rim; polarity-aligned for consistent closure force; 5000+ cycle durability
  • Foil Stamping: Bobst SP 102 BMA hot foil (±0.15mm registration); single or multi-color foil application
  • KBA Rapida 105 + Heidelberg CD 102 7+1 UV: CMYK + spot color + UV coating in single pass
  • Lead Time: 15–20 working days (new tooling for custom window shapes); 10–12 days for standard hexagonal
  • Daily Capacity: 15,000–25,000 hexagonal special-shape boxes

Quality Details

  • ISO 9001:2015 certified quality management
  • FSC Chain-of-Custody certified
  • Panel Alignment: 120° corner matching within ±0.5mm; lid-to-base alignment within ±0.5mm on all 6 faces
  • Window Clarity: PET panel light transmission ≥90% (ASTM D1003); no haze or yellowing after 72h accelerated aging at 57°C / 95% RH
  • Magnet Pull Force: Each magnet pair tested to ≥2.0kg pull force; 100% QC inspection
  • Foil Adhesion: 3M 610 tape test — no foil lift-off; scratch resistance per ISO 1518 (500g load)
  • Drop Test: ISTA 1A protocol — box must protect contents through 10-drop sequence; PET window must not crack
  • Free pre-production sample — 7–10 working days

Factory

  • 23 years manufacturing experience (founded 2003)
  • 18,000 sqm factory (10,000 sqm main + 8,000 sqm smart factory)
  • KBA Rapida 105 4-color + Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV
  • Specialized die-cutting department with 10+ automatic die-cutters
  • Export to 40+ countries globally
  • Daily output: 1.7 million boxes total

FAQ

Q: What is the minimum order quantity for hexagonal rigid gift boxes?

item.title: Hexagonal Rigid Gift Box with Magnetic Closure and Satin Ribbon for Premium Confectionery
item.description: Elegant hexagonal rigid gift box with magnetic closure and satin ribbon for premium confectionery — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of luxury packaging expertise (founded 2003). The six-sided geometry creates an instantly recognizable premium silhouette that elevates chocolates, macarons, truffles, and artisan sweets from commodity to luxury gift. N52 neodymium magnets hidden in the lid edge provide a seamless invisible closure — no visible clasps or hinges. A hand-tied satin ribbon in your brand color adds a tactile finishing touch that invites untying. Inside, a food-grade PET tray with individual cavities cradles each chocolate or macaron, preventing movement and preserving delicate decorations. Produced on Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 4-color presses across 18,000 sqm factory. FDA-compliant food contact materials throughout.

item.title: Hexagonal Tea Presentation Box with Ribbon Closure — Custom Rigid Gift Packaging
item.description: The hexagonal tea presentation box is a premium rigid packaging solution designed for tea brands that demand geometric distinction. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003), this six-sided gift box combines the structural integrity of 2.5mm greyboard with the refined aesthetic of 157gsm C1S art paper wrapping. Each box features a hinged lid secured by a satin ribbon tie closure, creating an unboxing experience that matches the ceremony of premium tea. Bincai’s Foshan facility spans 18,000 sqm across dual factories, equipped with KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses, delivering 1.7 million boxes daily under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Hexagonal Velvet Earring Box with Transparent Window and Satin Lining
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s hexagonal velvet earring box reimagines jewelry packaging with its distinctive six-sided geometry and integrated transparent PET window — allowing customers to see the earrings without opening the box. The 2mm rigid greyboard construction wrapped in 180gsm velvet flocking provides a luxurious hand feel, while the die-cut foam insert holds earrings securely in dedicated slots. Satin-lined interior and magnetic front-flap closure complete the premium unboxing experience. Perfect for retail display, e-commerce shipping, and bridal party gifting.

item.title: Kraft Brown Gift Box with Jute Twine Handle — Handmade Soap & Candle Eco Packaging
item.description: The kraft brown gift box with jute twine handle represents Bincai’s commitment to sustainable packaging without compromising on structural integrity or brand presentation. Constructed from 350gsm FSC-certified kraft paperboard with water-based PVA adhesive and printed with soy-based inks, this box is 100% recyclable in standard paper streams and fully biodegradable. The natural jute twine handle — sourced from renewable jute fiber — provides both functional carrying convenience and a tactile, rustic aesthetic that resonates with eco-conscious consumers. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, 23 years) at our ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified 18,000 sqm Foshan facility.

item.title: Kraft Eco-Friendly Gift Box with Soy-Based Ink and Natural Jute Handle
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Kraft Eco-Friendly Gift Box represents our commitment to sustainable packaging without compromising on premium presentation. Constructed from 100% post-consumer recycled kraft board, printed with soy-based inks on our state-of-the-art KBA 1050 4-color offset press and Heidelberg 7+1 UV press, assembled with biodegradable water-based adhesive, and finished with a natural jute rope handle — this box contains zero plastic from board to handle to adhesive. The uncoated kraft surface provides a tactile, organic feel that resonates with eco-conscious consumers, while the jute handle adds functional elegance. Perfect for brands that put sustainability at the center of their identity. Manufactured across our 18,000 sqm Foshan smart factory and 10,000 sqm production base, with FSC Recycled (FSC-R) Chain-of-Custody certification, ISO 9001:2015 quality management, and a daily output of 1.7 million units backed by 23 years of paper packaging expertise.

item.title: Kraft Paper Bento Lunch Box with Bamboo Cutlery Compartment — Biodegradable Food Packaging
item.description:
Sustainable kraft paper bento lunch box with integrated bamboo cutlery compartment, manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier. Made from FSC-certified kraft board with PLA (polylactic acid) moisture barrier, printed with soy-based inks. Fully compostable in industrial composting facilities within 90 days. Designed for takeaway, meal prep delivery, corporate catering, and eco-conscious food service.

Features

  • FSC-certified 350-450gsm kraft board — natural brown kraft with visible fiber texture
  • PLA (polylactic acid) interior coating — plant-based moisture and grease barrier, no petroleum plastics
  • Soy-based ink printing — non-toxic, renewable, compostable alongside the board
  • Integrated bamboo cutlery slot — holds disposable bamboo fork, knife, and spoon set
  • 3-compartment or 4-compartment tray design — separates main course, sides, and sauce/dressing
  • Locking tab closure — no adhesive, no plastic, fully mechanical closure
  • Optional clear PLA window for product visibility without plastic
  • Microwave-safe (up to 100°C) and refrigerator/freezer safe
  • ISO 9001:2015 quality management, EN 13432 compostable certified, EU 1935/2004 food-safe
  • 23 years experience, 18,000 sqm factory, 1.7M boxes daily output

Applications

Industry Application Key Feature
Meal Prep Delivery Weekly meal prep subscription services Compostable — aligns with sustainability-focused meal prep brand values
Corporate Catering Office lunch boxes for corporate events and daily catering Integrated cutlery compartment eliminates need for separate plastic utensil packs
Takeaway & Food Delivery Restaurant takeaway bento boxes — Asian, Western, fusion cuisines PLA coating handles hot, saucy, and oily foods without leaking for 4+ hours
School & Institutional School lunch programs, hospital meal service, senior care Food-safe certified (EU 1935/2004), no BPA, phthalate-free
Eco-Conscious Retail Pre-packaged fresh meals in supermarket deli and grab-and-go sections Clear PLA window option allows customers to see food without opening
Made-in-China B2B Wholesale OEM sustainable food packaging for global food service brands MOQ 1000, custom print and compartment design, competitive factory-direct pricing

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Board Weight 350gsm (light-duty, cold food), 400gsm (standard), or 450gsm (heavy-duty, hot food)
Barrier Coating PLA coating (standard — compostable), aqueous dispersion coating, or PE-free water-based barrier
Compartments 2-compartment, 3-compartment (standard), or 4-compartment with sauce/dressing cup recess
Cutlery Slot Single slot for fork, double slot for fork + spoon, or triple slot for fork + knife + spoon
Bamboo Cutlery Included with box — fork, knife, spoon, or chopsticks — wrapped in kraft paper band
Printing 1-color soy ink (standard), 2-color, or full CMYK flexo — brand logo, nutritional info, heating instructions
Exterior Finish Natural kraft (standard), white kraft top layer, or clay-coated for sharper print quality
Window No window (standard), PLA window (top or side), or die-cut open window
Closure Locking tab (standard), tuck-top, or sleeve band
Custom Sizes 200×150×50mm (single meal) to 280×200×65mm (large bento) — custom die tooling available
MOQ 1000 units (standard), 3000+ (custom compartment layout or specialty barrier coating)

Production Specifications

Specification Detail
Kraft Board FSC-certified kraft — 350-450gsm, virgin long-fiber kraft, natural brown color
PLA Coating Aqueous PLA dispersion — 15-20 g/m² application weight, heat-sealable, compostable per EN 13432
Die-Cutting Bobst automatic flatbed die-cutter — ±0.3mm precision for compartment dividers and cutlery slot
Creasing & Folding Automatic folder-gluer with pre-creasing — sharp fold lines, ±0.5mm fold registration
Soy-Based Ink Vegetable-based offset ink — >20% soy oil content, low VOC, compostable pigment load
Bamboo Cutlery Natural bamboo — untreated and food-safe, 160mm length, individually kraft-wrapped
PLA Window 30μm transparent PLA film — heat-sealed to interior, compostable, clarity >90% transmission
Adhesive Water-based PVA adhesive, solvent-free — used only on exterior tabs, no food contact
Compostability EN 13432 certified — ≥90% disintegration in 12 weeks, ≥90% biodegradation in 6 months
ISO 9001 Full batch traceability — board FSC certificate, PLA lot, ink batch, QC sign-off

Quality Assurance

Inspection Point Method Standard
Board weight Grammage scale — 10 samples per batch As specified ±5%
Board caliper Digital micrometer As specified ±0.05mm
PLA coating weight Gravimetric — coat vs uncoat 15-20 g/m²
Grease resistance Kit test — 3M Cobb test Kit level ≥8 at 60°C, 30 min
Water resistance Cobb test — 30 min ≤20 g/m² absorption
Leak test Fill with water, 60° tilt — 4 hours No leakage through seams or corners
Compartment fold accuracy Fold and assemble — 20 units per batch All compartments form correctly, no tearing at crease lines
Bamboo cutlery fit Insert cutlery into slot — 20 units Snug fit, no forced insertion, cutlery wrap intact
Print legibility Visual under D50 All text readable, no smudging, soy ink fully cured
Compostability EN 13432 third-party certification Valid certificate on file, renewed annually
Food contact safety EU 1935/2004 migration test Overall migration ≤10 mg/dm², specific migration limits met
Overall appearance Visual under D50 No stains, crease defects, or coating irregularities

FAQ

Q: Is this bento box truly compostable — what happens to the PLA coating?

item.title: Kraft Paper Cosmetic Skincare Set Box with Die-Cut Tray — Eco Luxury Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

FSC-certified kraft paper cosmetic skincare set box with custom die-cut tray — designed for clean beauty brands, organic skincare lines, and eco-conscious cosmetic companies seeking premium presentation with genuine sustainability credentials. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) in our 18,000 sqm Foshan dual-factory complex (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory). The natural kraft board (300–400gsm) is printed with soy-based inks and features an optional PLA compostable window for product visibility. The custom die-cut tray secures multiple skincare products — serum bottles, cream jars, and roller applicators — in precision-fit cavities. Fully recyclable in standard paper streams and industrially compostable to EN 13432. Daily output of 1.7 million boxes under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Kraft Paper Drawer Box with Cotton Handle for Sustainable Gift Sets
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s kraft paper drawer box with natural cotton rope handle embodies the sustainable packaging philosophy — every component from board to handle to ink is chosen for minimal environmental impact without compromising functionality or aesthetics. The 1.5mm rigid kraft greyboard wrapped in 200gsm unbleached kraft paper delivers a warm, organic tactile experience that resonates with eco-conscious consumers. The sliding drawer design — operated by a natural cotton rope pull — combines utility with rustic charm. Printed with soy-based inks and protected by water-based varnish, the entire box is 100% recyclable in standard paper streams and industrially compostable. FSC Chain-of-Custody certified throughout, manufactured in our 18,000 sqm factory with 23 years of expertise serving sustainable brands in 60+ countries.

item.title: Kraft Paper Drawer Box with Rope Handle Eco-Friendly Gift Packaging
item.description: Kraft paper drawer box with jute rope handle for eco-friendly gift packaging — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). Designed for sustainable brands seeking plastic-free, fully recyclable gift packaging with a natural aesthetic. The slide-out drawer mechanism with thumb notch provides smooth, tool-free access to contents. A natural jute rope handle (6mm diameter) integrated through reinforced eyelets offers a rustic, tactile carrying experience. Printed with water-based inks on FSC-certified kraft board for complete biodegradability — zero plastic, zero lamination, zero compromise on aesthetics. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press with water-based ink system at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility. Daily capacity: 1.7 million boxes under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Kraft Paper Eco Gift Box with Seed-Embedded Hang Tag and Soy-Based Ink Printing
item.description:
Product Overview

Packaging that outlives its purpose — quite literally. The Kraft Paper Eco Gift Box with Seed-Embedded Hang Tag is designed for brands that understand sustainability is not a checkbox but a brand statement. The box is made from 100% recycled kraft board, printed with soy-based inks, assembled with water-based adhesives, and closed with natural cotton twine. But the defining feature is the hang tag: embedded with a mix of wildflower seeds, it transforms from packaging into a garden when planted.

item.title: Kraft Paper Folding Carton with Soy-Based Ink for Organic Skincare Packaging
item.description: Eco-friendly kraft paper folding carton printed with soy-based inks for organic skincare and natural cosmetics — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of sustainable packaging expertise (founded 2003). Every element is chosen for environmental integrity: FSC-certified recycled kraft board (300-450gsm), soy-based CMYK inks (low-VOC, renewable), water-based aqueous coating (plastic-free), and compostable starch-based adhesive. Optional PLA (polylactic acid) window film — plant-derived and industrially compostable to EN 13432 — replaces traditional petroleum-based PET windows. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses with dedicated eco-ink lines across our 18,000 sqm dual-factory (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, 2025 expansion). OK Compost and EN 13432 certified for industrial composting.

item.title: Kraft Paper Gift Box with Natural Cork Lid and Jute Strap Closure — Bincai Earth-Luxury
item.description:
Product Overview

The earth-luxury kraft paper gift box with natural cork lid and jute strap closure represents the pinnacle of sustainable packaging design — zero plastic, fully biodegradable, and home-compostable without compromise on premium aesthetics. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, 23 years), a Diamond Member and Audited Supplier on Made-in-China.com. FSC-certified kraft paperboard forms the box body — printed with low-VOC soy-based inks on our KBA Rapida 105 4-color press with Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV for premium finish options. The lid is precision waterjet-cut from 3-5mm natural cork composite — a renewable material harvested from cork oak bark without harming the tree. The closure is a hand-tied 3mm jute twine strap with a simple loop-and-button fastening. Every component is home-compostable (OK Compost HOME certified by TÜV Austria) or recyclable in standard paper streams. Produced across our 18,000 sqm dual-factory complex (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, commissioned 2025) with 1.7 million boxes daily output.

item.title: Kraft Paper Perfume Rigid Box with Magnetic Closure — Eco-Luxury Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The Kraft Paper Perfume Rigid Box with Magnetic Closure definitively proves that luxury and sustainability coexist — without compromise. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — 23 years of paper packaging mastery across an 18,000 sqm eco-conscious manufacturing campus — this box wraps 2.0mm recycled greyboard (85%+ post-consumer content) in FSC certified kraft paper (128gsm, 100% virgin fiber from responsibly managed forests), printed with soy-based inks, and finished with a recycled PET velvet-flocked interior. Every material choice is intentional: the kraft exterior signals environmental stewardship while the magnetic closure and plush interior deliver the premium unboxing that fragrance consumers demand.

item.title: Kraft Paper Planter Gift Box Seed Paper Liner Biodegradable
item.description:
Product Overview

A revolutionary dual-purpose kraft paper gift box that transforms into a planter after use. The removable seed-infused paper liner — embedded with a mix of wildflower seeds (poppy, daisy, cornflower, baby’s breath) — can be placed in soil, watered, and within 7–14 days sprouts into a living wildflower garden. The kraft outer box, printed with soy-based ink and assembled with water-based adhesive, is 100% biodegradable and home-compostable. Manufactured at Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., this box delivers a zero-waste unboxing experience that literally gives back to the earth.

item.title: Kraft Paper Pyramid Gift Box with Compostable PLA Window Soy Ink Dried Flower Tea
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Kraft Paper Pyramid Gift Box redefines sustainable packaging with a design that’s beautiful, functional, and 100% home compostable. The distinctive pyramid shape is formed from 350gsm FSC-certified kraft paperboard printed with soy-based inks on our Heidelberg Speedmaster XL 7+1 UV and KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press lines. A compostable PLA (polylactic acid) window allows the contents — premium loose-leaf tea, dried lavender, chamomile flowers, or artisan botanicals — to be fully visible while maintaining the box’s structural integrity. A natural jute drawstring at the peak doubles as closure and handle. Every component breaks down in a home compost environment within 180 days (EN 13432 certified).

item.title: Kraft Paper Sandwich Wrap Box with PLA Window and Soy-Based Ink for Food Service
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s kraft paper sandwich wrap box with PLA compostable window combines sustainability with food service functionality. The 350gsm unbleached kraft board provides a natural, earthy brand aesthetic while the PLA window — derived from renewable corn starch — offers product visibility and full compostability. Printed with soy-based inks and featuring a water-based grease-resistant interior coating, this box meets EN 13432 and ASTM D6400 standards for industrial and home composting. The auto-lock bottom design enables rapid assembly, making it ideal for high-volume food service operations.

item.title: Kraft Paper Seed-Infused Plantable Gift Box with Biodegradable Soy-Ink Printing
item.description: Kraft paper seed-infused plantable gift box with biodegradable soy-ink printing — a packaging innovation from Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. that transforms from protective packaging into a garden. Each box is made from 100% post-consumer recycled kraft paperboard embedded with a curated blend of non-GMO wildflower seeds (typically a mix of poppy, daisy, cornflower, and black-eyed Susan). After the recipient enjoys the gift, they soak the box in water overnight, plant it in soil, and within 7-21 days the seeds germinate — leaving zero waste. Every element is biodegradable: the board decomposes within 90 days in soil, soy-based inks (heavy-metal-free, VOC-free) break down naturally, and starch-based adhesive dissolves without residue. No plastic windows, no synthetic lamination, no petroleum-based inks. Manufactured at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility under ISO 9001:2015, FSC Chain-of-Custody, and seed quality certification — 23 years of Guangdong manufacturing since 2003.

item.title: Kraft Paper Shopping Bag — Foil Stamping with Matte Lamination Luxury Retail
item.description: The Kraft Paper Shopping Bag with foil stamping and matte lamination is a premium retail packaging solution that combines eco-friendly kraft paper aesthetics with luxury finishing techniques. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a 23-year packaging specialist operating 18,000 sqm of FSC-certified production space in Foshan, China — this bag features 150g–200g kraft paper stock with full-surface matte lamination for a soft, premium tactile feel. Hot foil stamping in gold, silver, or rose gold applies brand logos and decorative elements with ±0.15mm precision. Twisted kraft paper rope handles provide comfortable carrying and complement the natural aesthetic, while the reinforced gusset base and cardboard bottom insert ensure load-bearing capacity up to 5 kg. Bincai’s KBA 1050 and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses enable full-color printing on kraft stock for vibrant brand reproduction on natural surfaces.

item.title: Kraft Paper Soap Sleeve Box with Die-Cut Window and Soy-Based Ink
item.description:
Product Overview

Our kraft paper soap sleeve box combines minimalist eco-design with product visibility — the die-cut window lets customers see and smell your artisanal soap, bath bomb, or natural skincare product before purchase while the sleeve format keeps packaging material to an absolute minimum. Printed with soy-based offset inks for vibrant yet fully biodegradable graphics, each sleeve is manufactured from FSC-certified kraft board using water-based adhesives. The result: a 100% recyclable, home-compostable package that aligns with the values of eco-conscious brands and consumers. Produced in our ISO 9001-certified facility with daily capacity of 1.5 million boxes, Bincai delivers sustainable packaging at competitive scale.

item.title: Kraft Paper Wine Bottle Carrier — 6-Pack Die-Cut Handle Eco Wine Gift Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — 23-year packaging manufacturer founded 2003 in Foshan’s Shunde district — delivers this eco-engineered kraft paper wine bottle carrier, purpose-built for wineries, wine clubs, and premium retailers who need sustainable packaging that performs as beautifully as it presents. The self-locking die-cut design with integrated carry handle assembles in seconds without glue, tape, or staples, while interlocking divider tabs keep six standard 750ml wine bottles separated and protected during transport. Printed exclusively with soy-based vegetable inks on FSC Chain-of-Custody certified kraft board, this carrier is 100% recyclable in standard paper streams — no plastic windows, no synthetic coatings, no lamination to separate. The natural kraft aesthetic communicates authentic eco-conscious brand values at first glance, while custom CMYK or single-color printing tells your brand story. Manufactured at 1.7 million boxes daily output across 18,000 sqm of ISO 9001:2015 certified production space with state-of-the-art flat-pack shipping design that reduces freight volume by up to 80%.

item.title: Kraft Paper Wine Tote Bag with Die-Cut Handle and Gold Foil Stamp — Eco-Luxury Wine Packaging
item.description: The kraft paper wine tote bag bridges two seemingly opposing demands: rustic eco-authenticity and luxury presentation. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. at its 18,000 sqm Foshan facility, this single or double-bottle carrier is crafted from 200gsm FSC-certified kraft paper with a die-cut integrated handle — no glue, no separate handle attachment, no mixed-material waste stream at end of life. The KBA Rapida 105 4-color press prints brand graphics with the warmth and texture that kraft’s natural fiber surface demands, while the Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV press and Bobst hot-foil machine add the gold foil-stamped logo that elevates the bag from utilitarian to gift-worthy.

item.title: LED-Lit Velvet Jewelry Display Box with 360° Rotating Platform for Retail
item.description: Premium LED-lit velvet jewelry display box with 360° motorized rotating platform — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). Integrated warm-white LED strip lighting (2835 SMD, 2700K-3000K) illuminates jewelry from all angles while the silent DC motor platform rotates at 1-3 RPM — the combination creates a mesmerizing retail display that stops customers in their tracks. Built on 1600-2000gsm greyboard wrapped in premium velvet paper available in 20+ colors (black, navy, burgundy, emerald, blush pink, ivory). The platform features a velvet-flocked surface with ring slots, necklace hooks, and a flat display area for bracelets and watches. Powered by rechargeable lithium battery (8+ hours continuous) or USB-C for permanent countertop display. Produced on Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 4-color presses across 18,000 sqm factory. CE, RoHS, and CPSIA certified.

item.title: Luxury Brooch Pin Display Box with Velvet Lining & Satin Pillow — Magnetic Flap
item.description:
Elegant brooch and lapel pin display box with plush velvet-lined interior and removable satin pillow insert, manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com. Magnetic flap closure, custom hot-foil logo on the lid, and a satin-covered foam pillow that secures the brooch with a precision pin slot. Rigid 2.0mm greyboard construction ensures long-term protection for collectible and vintage pieces.

Features

  • Rigid 2.0mm greyboard construction with 157gsm art paper wrap and matte lamination
  • Plush velvet flocking interior — available in black, navy, burgundy, ivory, or custom Pantone
  • Removable satin-covered foam pillow insert with precision pin slot for brooch security
  • Magnetic flap closure — opens flat for full brooch visibility, closes securely
  • Custom logo hot foil stamping on lid — gold, silver, rose gold, or copper
  • Optional debossing or blind embossing for understated luxury branding
  • KBA 1050 4-color offset + Heidelberg 7+1 UV for spot coatings and varnish
  • ISO 9001:2015 certified quality management, FSC certified sustainable materials
  • 23 years experience, 18,000 sqm factory, daily output 1.7 million boxes

Applications

Industry Application Key Feature
Antique & Vintage Jewelry Display and storage for collectible brooches, cameos, and lapel pins Satin pillow secures delicate pin mechanisms without stress or bending
Luxury Fashion Brands Branded brooch packaging for designer fashion houses Custom embossed logo + premium velvet interior reflects brand prestige
Corporate Recognition Employee service pins, achievement brooches, and lapel pin awards Elegant presentation elevates the perceived value of recognition awards
E-Commerce Jewelry Sellers Protective packaging for online brooch and pin sales Rigid box construction + velvet interior prevents transit damage
Museum & Gallery Shops Reproduction brooch and cameo pin packaging Archival-quality materials — acid-free options available for long-term preservation
Made-in-China B2B Wholesale OEM brooch box manufacturing for global jewelry distributors MOQ 500, full customization, competitive factory-direct pricing

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Pillow Style Single satin pillow (standard), double pillow for brooch sets, or custom die-cut multi-cavity insert
Pillow Fabric Satin (standard), velvet, suede, linen, or faux leather
Pin Slot Type Single horizontal slot, vertical slot, T-bar slot, or custom-cut to your brooch clasp design
Exterior Material 157gsm art paper (matte/gloss), 120gsm textured paper, 200gsm specialty board, or PU leather wrap
Exterior Color Any Pantone — classic black, navy, burgundy, cream, or custom
Logo Application Hot foil stamping, blind embossing, debossing, UV spot, full-color offset printing, or screen printing
Closure Magnetic flap (standard), ribbon tie, or elastic band
Additional Features Document/certificate pocket inside lid, printed insert card, ribbon pull tab, custom-printed tissue
Custom Sizes 100×80×35mm (small brooch) to 200×150×50mm (large statement brooch)
MOQ 500 units (standard), 1000+ (custom pillow design or specialty exterior materials)

Production Specifications

Specification Detail
Greyboard 1200-1600gsm rigid greyboard — 2.0mm caliper, density 0.65-0.75 g/cm³
Die-Cutting Bobst automatic flatbed die-cutter — ±0.3mm precision for flap hinge and magnetic alignment
Wrap Application Automatic wrapping machine — hot-melt adhesive, zero-bubble finish on 157gsm art paper
Velvet Flocking Electrostatic flocking — 0.5-0.8mm nylon/polyester fibers, adhesion ≥5N/25mm
Satin Pillow Die-cut foam core + satin wrap — RF-welded edges, no visible glue lines; pin slot reinforced with bar-tack stitching
Magnet Insertion Neodymium disc magnets Ø8mm×2mm — press-fit into greyboard cavities, pull force ≥4N
Foil Stamping Heidelberg hot foil press — KURZ foil, 120-140°C, gold/silver/metallic on art paper
Flap Hinge Scored greyboard + wrap — tested to 5,000 open/close cycles without board fatigue
Edge Finishing Turned-edge construction — wrap folded over board, no raw edges exposed
ISO 9001 Full batch traceability — board lot, flocking batch, magnet supplier, pillow fabric lot

Quality Assurance

Inspection Point Method Standard
Board caliper Digital micrometer — 5 points per sheet 2.0mm ±0.15mm
Wrap adhesion Cross-hatch tape test No delamination, ≤5% removal
Flocking adhesion Tape pull test — 3M 810 tape ≥5N/25mm, no fiber pull-out
Pillow pin slot strength Pin insertion/extraction — 50 cycles No fabric fraying, foam compression ≤10%
Magnet pull force Force gauge — perpendicular ≥4N per magnet pair
Flap alignment Visual + gauge — closed box Gap ≤1mm, flush edges
Foil adhesion Tape test on foil No peeling, clean edges
Flap hinge durability Open/close cycle — 500 cycles No board cracking, no wrap delamination at hinge
Color consistency Spectrophotometer — D50 ΔE ≤2.0 versus approved swatch
Overall appearance Visual under D50 No scratches, glue marks, or wrapping defects

FAQ

Q: Can the satin pillow accommodate different types of brooch pin backs — standard safety catch, trombone clasp, or double-pin?

item.title: Luxury Cigar Humidor-Style Rigid Gift Box with Spanish Cedar Lining
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Luxury Cigar Humidor-Style Rigid Gift Box brings humidor-grade presentation to cigar gifting without the humidor price tag. Built on a 2.5mm greyboard rigid base with woodgrain-textured art paper exterior and genuine Spanish cedar veneer interior lining — the same aromatic cedar used in premium walk-in humidors. Gold foil-stamped custom branding, magnetic flip-lid closure, and a recessed Boveda humidity pack holder make this the definitive cigar gift box for tobacconists, hotel gift shops, and premium cigar brands. Manufactured at our 18,000 sqm integrated facility with 23 years of paper box expertise and 220,000+ gift boxes daily output.

item.title: Luxury Hexagonal Wine Bottle Gift Box with Satin Ribbon — Custom Embossing
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s hexagonal wine bottle gift box combines architectural geometry with premium presentation — a six-sided design that commands attention on retail shelves and creates an unforgettable unboxing experience. The rigid construction wraps around a precision die-cut EVA foam cradle that secures standard 750ml wine or spirit bottles, while the satin ribbon bow closure and brushed gold foil exterior deliver luxury at every touch point. Manufactured at Bincai’s 18,000 sqm integrated facility with KBA 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses, each box passes through 7 rigorous QC gates — from incoming board inspection (ISO 186) to ISTA 1A transit testing. Backed by 23 years of premium packaging expertise (founded 2003) and ISO 9001:2015 + FSC Chain-of-Custody certification, this hexagonal box is the definitive packaging solution for wineries, distilleries, corporate gifting, wedding favors, and luxury retail.

item.title: Luxury Watch Winder Display Box — Magnetic Closure with Japanese Mabuchi Motor & Suede Interior
item.description:
Product Overview

Premium single-watch winder display box combining luxury presentation with precision watch care. The magnetic flip lid opens to reveal an acrylic viewing window and a suede-effect watch cushion mounted on a whisper-quiet Japanese Mabuchi motor. Four programmable rotation modes (650/900/1200/1800 TPD) accommodate all automatic watch movements. The carbon-fiber-textured exterior with soft-touch matte lamination and hidden neodymium magnetic closure creates a sophisticated unboxing experience worthy of luxury timepieces. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility with 1.7M daily box output capacity.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Acrylic-Lid Fountain Pen Display Gift Box — Velvet Tray, Custom Embossing
item.description:
Product Overview

A luxury fountain pen demands packaging that does more than protect — it must showcase. The Magnetic Closure Acrylic-Lid Pen Display Gift Box achieves both with a transparent 2mm cast acrylic lid that transforms the box into an instant display case. When the customer opens the outer shipping carton, the pen is already visible, presented on a velvet-flocked tray in a museum-quality arrangement. No unwrapping, no unboxing puzzle — just an immediate emotional connection between the recipient and the writing instrument.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Book-Style Gift Box for Corporate Welcome Kits
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Magnetic Closure Book-Style Gift Box elevates corporate gifting from ordinary to exceptional. Opening like a hardcover book, this 2.5mm rigid greyboard box features a satisfying magnetic closure that snaps shut with precision — the tactile experience that luxury brands demand. Inside, a recessed tray with ribbon pull-tab organizes welcome kit contents: branded notebook, pen, company swag, welcome letter, and onboarding materials. Exterior wrapped in premium art paper with gold foil logo stamping on our Heidelberg 7+1 UV press. With 23 years of rigid box manufacturing expertise and 220,000+ gift boxes daily from our Foshan facility, Bincai is the partner behind some of the world’s most recognized corporate welcome experiences.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Cigar Humidor Box with Spanish Cedar Lining and Custom Embossing
item.description:
Product Overview

Our magnetic closure cigar humidor box combines 23 years of precision rigid-box manufacturing with authentic Spanish cedar interior lining — the gold standard for cigar storage. The 3mm rigid greyboard construction with full-perimeter neodymium magnetic seal strip maintains a stable 65–72 % RH internal environment, while the 5mm Spanish cedar (Cedrela odorata) veneer lining naturally regulates humidity, repels tobacco beetles, and imparts the classic cedar aroma that enhances cigar flavor over time. A precision hygrometer slot and humidification element compartment complete the functional design. Custom deep-embossed branding on the lid surface — printed on a KBA Rapida 105 and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV line, then foil-stamped on a Bobst hot-foil press at ±0.15 mm registration — adds unmistakable brand prestige to every box.

The Magnetic Closure Luxury Perfume Gift Box with Die-Cut Satin Window solves all three challenges in one elegant design.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Premium Headphone Gift Box with Custom Foam Cradle — Audio Brand Packaging
item.description:
Premium magnetic closure gift box engineered for high-end headphones and audio accessories, manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier with 23 years of experience. Rigid 2.5mm greyboard with soft-touch matte lamination, custom die-cut EVA or PU foam cradle that cradles headphones in a sculpted presentation. Magnetic snap closure opens flat for a premium retail unboxing experience.

Features

  • Rigid 2.5mm greyboard construction — heavier caliper for substantial premium feel
  • Soft-touch matte lamination on 157gsm art paper wrap — fingerprint-resistant velvet-like surface
  • Custom die-cut EVA or PU foam cradle — precisely sculpted to your headphone model
  • Strong magnetic snap closure — dual neodymium magnets for secure closing
  • Custom logo embossing, debossing, or hot foil stamping on lid
  • Available in single-tier (headphones only) or double-tier (headphones + accessories compartment)
  • Interior cable management channel in foam — keeps audio cable and accessories organized
  • KBA 1050 4-color offset + Heidelberg 7+1 UV for brand graphics and spot coatings
  • ISO 9001:2015 certified quality management, FSC certified sustainable materials
  • 18,000 sqm dual factory, 1.7M boxes daily output, serving 200+ global brands

Applications

Industry Application Key Feature
Consumer Audio Over-ear, on-ear, and in-ear monitor (IEM) headphone retail packaging Custom foam cradle provides zero-movement protection during shipping + showroom-grade presentation
Pro Audio Studio monitor headphones, DJ headphones, broadcast headsets Heavy-duty 2.5mm board with reinforced corners for touring and trade show transport
Gaming Gaming headset gift packaging with accessory compartments Double-tier option stores headset + detachable mic + USB dongle in organized foam layout
Luxury Tech Gifts Premium headphone gift sets for corporate gifting and special editions Soft-touch lamination + embossed logo delivers luxury unboxing experience
E-Commerce Audio Brands Direct-to-consumer headphone fulfillment packaging Rigid construction + foam cradle passes ISTA 1A drop testing for courier shipping
Made-in-China B2B Wholesale OEM headphone packaging for audio brands worldwide MOQ 500, full custom foam design, competitive factory-direct pricing

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Foam Type EVA foam (standard — firm, durable), PU foam (softer, luxury feel), or PE foam (lightweight, budget-friendly)
Foam Color Black, charcoal, white, navy, or custom — matched to your brand palette
Foam Surface Smooth, textured, or fabric-laminated (velvet, suede, or microfiber)
Tier Configuration Single-tier (headphones only) or double-tier (headphones + cable/USB dongle/accessories compartment)
Cable Management Integrated foam channel for audio cable routing, or elastic strap retention system
Exterior Material 157gsm art paper with matte/gloss lamination, soft-touch coating, linen-textured paper, or PU leather wrap
Exterior Color Any Pantone — black, charcoal, navy, white, or custom brand color
Logo Application Hot foil stamping, blind embossing, debossing, UV spot, full-color offset, or screen printing
Magnetic Closure Dual neodymium magnets (standard), or single large-format magnetic strip for full-width closure
Additional Features Ribbon pull tab, magnetic certificate/document pocket, custom-printed sleeve/band, QR code printing
Custom Sizes 220×200×80mm (on-ear) to 300×250×120mm (over-ear) — custom die tooling available
MOQ 500 units (standard), 1000+ (custom foam tooling or specialty exterior materials)

Production Specifications

Specification Detail
Greyboard 1600gsm rigid greyboard — 2.5mm caliper, density 0.65-0.75 g/cm³
Die-Cutting Bobst automatic flatbed die-cutter — ±0.3mm precision for hinge and magnet pockets
Wrap Application Automatic wrapping machine — 157gsm art paper with hot-melt adhesive, bubble-free finish
Soft-Touch Lamination Aqueous soft-touch coating — 2-3μm thickness, velvet-like tactile, fingerprint-resistant
Foam Cradle CNC-machined EVA/PU foam — 2D CAD → 3D CAM toolpath, ±0.5mm cavity tolerance
Foam-to-Board Bonding Permanent pressure-sensitive adhesive on foam backer — full-surface coverage, peel ≥8N/25mm
Magnet Insertion Neodymium disc magnets Ø10mm×3mm — press-fit into die-cut greyboard cavities, pull force ≥6N each
Foil Stamping Heidelberg hot foil press — KURZ foil, 120-140°C, on art paper or soft-touch surface
Hinge Construction Scored greyboard + wrap — reinforced with cloth tape at hinge for 10,000+ cycles
Edge Finishing Turned-edge construction — wrap folded over board, no raw edges exposed
ISO 9001 Full batch documentation — board lot, foam batch, lamination lot, magnet supplier, QC per batch

Quality Assurance

Inspection Point Method Standard
Board caliper Digital micrometer — 5 points per sheet 2.5mm ±0.2mm
Wrap adhesion Cross-hatch tape test No delamination, ≤5% removal
Soft-touch coating uniformity Visual + glossmeter at 60° Gloss ≤5 GU, no streaks or blotches
Foam cavity fit Test insert with customer headphone sample Snug fit, ≤1mm lateral movement, no compression of ear cushions
Foam adhesion to board Peel test at 180° ≥8N/25mm, no foam delamination
Magnet pull force Force gauge — perpendicular ≥6N per magnet (≥12N closure force)
Magnet alignment Test close — 100 cycles Consistent self-alignment, no scratching of wrap
Hinge durability Open/close cycle — 500 cycles No board cracking, no wrap delamination at hinge
Drop test ISTA 1A — 76cm free-fall with headphone payload No structural failure, foam cradle intact, headphones undamaged
Color consistency Spectrophotometer — D50 ΔE ≤2.0 versus approved swatch
Overall appearance Visual under D50 No scratches, glue marks, foam debris, or wrapping defects

FAQ

Q: How do you design the foam cradle to fit our specific headphone model accurately?

Bincai Manufacturing Excellence

Our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000 sqm main plant + 8,000 sqm smart factory) in Guangdong, China, combines decades of craftsmanship with modern automation:

item.title: Magnetic Closure Tri-Fold Wallet Box for Gift Card & Certificate Packaging

item.title: Pharmaceutical Folding Carton with Child-Resistant CR Lock — Tamper-Evident Tablet Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Child-resistant (CR) pharmaceutical folding carton engineered for tablet, capsule, and lozenge packaging requiring certified child-safe access. The integrated push-and-turn CR lock mechanism meets ISO 8317 child-resistant packaging standards, while the tamper-evident perforated tear strip provides visible proof of first-opening integrity. Raised Braille dots embossed directly into the SBS board ensure accessibility compliance with EU Falsified Medicines Directive (2011/62/EU) requirements. Full CMYK offset printing on pharmaceutical-grade solid bleached sulphate (SBS) board for crisp barcode readability and regulatory text clarity. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) in our ISO 9001:2015 and FSC-certified Foshan facility with 1.7M daily output capacity.

item.title: Portfolio Magnetic Closure Presentation Kit for Corporate Brand Documents
item.description: Premium portfolio-style magnetic closure presentation kit — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier with 23 years of experience. Designed in a horizontal or vertical folio format with a wraparound magnetic flap that opens to reveal a precision die-cut foam interior. Each cavity is custom-molded to cradle brochures, pens, USB drives, business cards, and product samples — creating a cohesive, premium unboxing experience for corporate brand presentations, investor kits, and luxury sales collateral. The magnetic closure delivers a satisfying, authoritative snap that signals quality before the kit is even opened. Produced on Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 4-color presses across 18,000 sqm factory.

item.title: Premium Book-Style Magnetic Rigid Box with Gold Foil — Hardcover Luxury Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s book-style magnetic rigid box replicates the tactile elegance of a fine hardcover book — complete with spine debossing, gold foil accents, and a satisfying magnetic closure that snaps shut like closing a treasured volume. The dual-panel magnetic flap opens flat to 180°, revealing a velvet-lined interior tray that transforms unboxing into a curated experience.

Every box is hand-assembled with precision book-binding techniques in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility by an artisan team with 5–10+ years of rigid box wrapping experience. The 2.0mm greyboard core provides substantial weight and rigidity (true book-board heft), while the 157gsm art paper wrap receives vibrant CMYK printing on our KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press (15,000 sheets/hr). The Heidelberg Speedmaster XL CD 102 7+1 UV press adds selective spot UV on title and logo elements for dimensional contrast. The spine — 15–30mm wide with custom debossed title and optional ribbon headband — is engineered for shelf display, making the box itself part of the product collection rather than disposable packaging.

item.title: Premium Paper Shopping Bag with Twisted Rope Handles and Spot UV Logo — Luxury Retail Packaging
item.description: The premium paper shopping bag with twisted rope handles is the most visible piece of brand packaging a retailer deploys — it leaves the store, travels through public spaces, and serves as a walking advertisement long after the purchase. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. at its 18,000 sqm Foshan facility, this bag combines structural engineering with high-impact graphic execution. The KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press delivers full-coverage brand printing at 15,000 sheets/hour, while the Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV press enables spot UV logo treatment that creates a tactile, light-catching contrast between matte bag surface and glossy brand mark.

item.title: Premium White Kraft Paper Gift Bag with Die-Cut Handle and Spot UV Finish
item.description:
Product Overview

Our premium white kraft paper gift bag combines eco-friendly materials with luxury finishing techniques. Crafted from 200gsm white kraft paper with reinforced side and bottom gussets, this bag supports up to 5kg of merchandise while maintaining a crisp, high-end appearance. The die-cut handle eliminates metal or plastic hardware for a clean, sustainable design. Full CMYK offset printing with spot UV gloss highlights brand logos and design elements, creating contrast between matte kraft and glossy accents. Manufactured in our ISO 9001 certified factory on KBA 1050 and Heidelberg presses.

item.title: Reverse Tuck End Folding Carton for Pharmaceutical Supplement Packaging
item.description:
Reverse Tuck End Folding Carton — Pharmaceutical & Supplement Grade

Bincai produces reverse tuck end (RTE) folding cartons to pharmaceutical industry standards. Whether you’re packaging vitamin bottles, blister cards, supplement pouches, or clinical trial kits, our ISO 9001-certified manufacturing ensures consistency, cleanliness, and compliance.

Key Features

  • Reverse Tuck End Design: Top and bottom flaps tuck in opposite directions for secure closure and easy assembly. Compatible with automated cartoning lines.
  • Pharmaceutical-Grade Board: Solid Bleached Sulfate (SBS) C1S 12–18pt or C2S 14–24pt, coated recycled board (CRB) available for cost-sensitive projects.
  • Precision Printing: KBA 1050 4-color offset for crisp pharmaceutical text and branding, with Heidelberg 7+1 UV for high-gloss varnish or registered spot UV.
  • ISO 9001 Quality System: Documented quality control at every stage — incoming board inspection, printing density measurement, die-cut precision check, gluing integrity test.
  • FSC Certified Materials: Full chain of custody documentation for brands requiring sustainable sourcing claims.

Pharmaceutical & Supplement Applications

Product Type Carton Configuration
Vitamin Bottles RTE carton for 30–120 count HDPE/PET bottles with product window option
Blister Packs Carton designed for 7–30 cavity blister cards with insert leaflet retention
Supplement Pouches Stand-up pouch outer carton with tear-away perforation for retail display
Clinical Trial Kits Plain or coded cartons with sequential numbering, tamper-evident seals
OTC Drug Packaging Cartons meeting FDA 21 CFR Part 211 / EU GMP Annex 11 packaging requirements
Private Label Supplements Short-run capable RTE cartons for private label nutraceutical brands

Pharmaceutical Packaging Features

Feature Specification
Tamper Evidence Perforated tear strip, glue-sealed end flaps, or tamper-evident label area
Braille Embossing Pharmaceutical braille on carton face per EU Directive 2001/83/EC
Serialization Ready Area allocated for 2D DataMatrix, QR code, or human-readable serial numbers
Insert Retention Glue dot or friction-fit insert leaflet retention inside carton
Child Resistance CR-compliant structural design options meeting ISO 8317 / 16 CFR 1700
Batch Coding Area for inkjet or laser batch number, expiry date, and manufacturing date

Customization Options

Option Details
Board Grade SBS C1S (white back), SBS C2S (white both sides), CRB (grey back), or SUS (solid unbleached sulfate)
Thickness 12pt to 24pt depending on carton size and product weight
Printing CMYK offset (KBA 1050) + spot colors (Pantone)
Coatings Aqueous coating, UV gloss varnish, matte varnish, soft-touch coating
Window PET or PLA film window — die-cut with film glued from inside
Foil Stamping Gold, silver, or holographic foil on logo and brand elements
Embossing Raised or debossed areas for logo, product name, or decorative pattern
Perforation Tear-strip, hang-tab, or easy-open perforation
Gluing Cold glue (standard) or hot-melt for faster line speeds

Bincai Manufacturing Excellence

Specification Detail
Facility 18,000 sqm (10,000 + 8,000 smart factory), Guangdong, China
Pharma Printing KBA 1050 4-color offset — ±0.1mm registration for pharmaceutical text and barcodes
UV Finishing Heidelberg 7+1 UV press for registered high-gloss spot UV and pharmaceutical-grade coatings
Die-Cutting Automatic platen die-cutters with stripping station for clean edge quality
Folder-Gluer High-speed folder-gluer with barcode verification and ejection system
Capacity 1.7 million boxes daily across all product categories
Quality Control AQL 1.5 sampling (pharmaceutical grade), barcode verification (ISO 15416), color spectrophotometry
Cleanliness Dedicated pharma packaging area with HEPA-filtered air and UV sterilization
Certifications ISO 9001:2015, FSC Chain of Custody (FSC certified)
Experience 23 years — established 2003, pharmaceutical packaging since 2010
MOQ 1,000 units for standard sizes; 3,000 for custom dimensions
  • Lead Time: 15–25 days for custom carton orders

Why This Pharmaceutical RTE Carton vs Generic Folding Cartons

Pharmaceutical packaging is not commodity packaging. Reverse tuck end (RTE) cartons for pharma must meet dimensional precision, regulatory compliance, and tamper-evidence standards that generic folding cartons cannot satisfy. Bincai’s pharma-grade production environment delivers all three.

item.title: Reverse Tuck End Folding Carton for Premium Chocolate — Hot Foil Gold Stamping
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s reverse tuck end (RTE) folding carton delivers premium chocolate presentation at volume-friendly economics. The RTE structure — with top and bottom flaps tucking from opposite ends — provides secure closure while enabling flat-packed shipping for efficient logistics. Double-sided CMYK printing on 350gsm C2S (coated two sides) art board, enhanced with matte lamination and hot gold foil stamping. Manufactured on KBA 1050 4-color offset presses in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility. 23 years of folding carton expertise.

item.title: Reverse Tuck End Folding Carton with Matte Lamination for Organic Tea
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s reverse tuck end (RTE) folding carton is purpose-built for organic and premium tea brands that demand packaging as pure as their product. Constructed from 350gsm SBS C1S solid bleached sulfate board — renowned for its bright white surface and exceptional print fidelity — the carton features matte lamination with selective spot UV accents that catch light on shelf. The reverse tuck end closure provides secure retention without adhesives, while the interior food-grade aqueous coating ensures product safety without chemical migration. An optional window patch using PLA compostable film (certified to EN 13432) transforms the carton into a fully compostable package. Printed on KBA 1050 and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses in our ISO 15378 GMP-certified facility — the pharmaceutical-grade standard that guarantees the highest level of cleanliness and contamination control for food-contact packaging.

item.title: Reverse-Tuck Folding Carton for Gourmet Chocolate Bar with Hot-Stamp Foil Window
item.description:
Product Overview

A $10 chocolate bar on a shelf competes with every other $10 chocolate bar. The bar itself — hidden inside the wrapper — cannot sell itself. The packaging must tell the story, show the quality, and close the deal in 3 seconds of a shopper’s attention. The Reverse-Tuck Folding Carton for Gourmet Chocolate Bar does this with a precision die-cut window that reveals the actual chocolate inside — the swirls, the inclusions, the sheen of properly tempered cocoa butter — framed by hot-stamp foil that signals premium quality before the shopper reads a single word.

item.title: Reverse-Tuck Folding Carton with Matte Lamination & Gold Hot Foil — Cosmetics Packaging
item.description: The reverse-tuck folding carton with matte lamination and gold hot foil stamping delivers luxury cosmetics packaging that balances premium aesthetics with high-speed production economics. Reverse-tuck construction — where top and bottom flaps tuck from opposite sides — provides secure closure while allowing the carton to be erected rapidly on automated packaging lines. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) at our 18,000 sqm Foshan factory on KBA 1050 and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses with ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certifications.

item.title: Rigid Cylindrical Whiskey Bottle Box with Magnetic Closure Gold Foil Embossing

item.title: Rigid Paper Watch Display Box with Die-Cut Cushion and Glass Window Lid
item.description: The rigid paper watch display box with tempered glass window is the definitive packaging for luxury timepieces — where the unboxing experience must match the craftsmanship of the watch itself. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, 23 years) on KBA Rapida 1050 4-color and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility, this box combines four precision-engineered components: a rigid greyboard body (1200–1800gsm) wrapped in premium art paper or specialty finishes, a 2mm tempered glass viewing window (EN 12150-1 certified), a die-cut velvet or suede cushion that cradles the watch at exact dimensions, and a satisfying N52 magnetic closure or precision metal hinge. Bobst SP 102 BMA die-cutting at ±0.15mm and Emmeci MC2004 automatic box forming with ±0.1mm seam alignment ensure jewelry-grade precision. ISO 9001:2015, FSC Chain-of-Custody (FSC-C147399), and RoHS certified. Daily output 1.7 million boxes. MOQ 500.

item.title: Rigid Telescopic Two-Piece Flat-Pack Gift Box — Wholesale Bulk Shipping Optimized
item.description:
Product Overview

Rigid telescopic two-piece flat-pack gift box engineered for wholesale bulk shipping efficiency. The patented flat-pack score design allows the lid and base to ship completely flat — reducing shipping volume by up to 70% compared to pre-assembled rigid boxes — while assembling in seconds at the destination with no glue, tools, or skilled labor required. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) in our 18,000 sqm Foshan dual-factory complex (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory). The 2.0mm greyboard construction with 157gsm art paper wrapping delivers the same premium rigid-box feel and durability as fully assembled boxes at a fraction of the freight cost. Daily output of 1.7 million boxes under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Rigid Two-Tier Wedding Favor Gift Box — Satin Ribbon Closure & Gold Foil Monogram
item.description:
Product Overview

Elegant two-tier rigid wedding favor gift box designed for premium bridal gifting. The telescopic lid-and-base construction with integrated satin ribbon closure opens to reveal a removable upper tray and a deeper lower compartment — ideal for presenting jewelry, artisan chocolates, scented candles, or bespoke keepsakes. Gold hot foil monogramming on the lid creates a personalized, heirloom-quality presentation. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) in our 18,000 sqm Foshan dual-factory complex. Daily output of 1.7 million boxes under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Snap-Lock Bottom Folding Carton for Premium Loose Tea Gift Packaging — Custom CMYK
item.description:
Product Overview

The Snap-Lock Bottom Folding Carton for Premium Loose Tea Packaging has become the default format for specialty tea brands worldwide — and for good reason. The automatic snap-lock base deploys instantly with a single push, forming a rigid-bottom container capable of holding 100g to 500g of loose leaf tea, herbal infusions, or specialty coffee without the bottom collapsing under product weight once filled. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. in our 18,000 sqm ISO 9001 & FSC certified facility, this carton brings 23 years of paper packaging expertise to the booming global specialty tea market.

item.title: Straight Tuck End Folding Carton with Braille Embossing for Pharmaceutical OTC Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s straight tuck end folding carton with braille embossing serves the regulated pharmaceutical and OTC healthcare market. The 400gsm SBS C1S board provides rigid structural support with a bright white printing surface for full-color product graphics, while the aqueous coating adds moisture resistance for shelf stability. Compliant braille embossing on the face panel meets EU FMD (Falsified Medicines Directive) and FDA accessibility requirements. Optional tamper-evident tear strip and child-resistant tuck lock mechanisms complete the safety package. Manufactured on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses with Bobst die-cutting for ±0.2mm dimensional accuracy.

item.title: Straight Tuck End Folding Carton with Gold Foil Border and Debossing for Luxury Apparel
item.description:
Product Overview

Our straight tuck end folding carton elevates luxury apparel packaging with gold foil border detailing and custom debossed branding. Constructed from premium 18pt SBS (Solid Bleached Sulfate) board with soft-touch matte lamination, these cartons deliver the tactile and visual quality expected by high-end fashion brands. The straight tuck end closure with friction-lock tuck flap provides secure product retention while enabling elegant unboxing. Gold foil hot-stamped borders frame the debossed logo, creating depth and premium shelf presence. Manufactured on our Heidelberg 7+1 UV press in the 18,000m² ISO 9001 certified factory.

item.title: Straight-Tuck Folding Carton with Holographic Cold Foil for Luxury Cosmetics
item.description:
Product Overview

The Straight-Tuck Folding Carton with Holographic Cold Foil represents the cutting edge of folding carton aesthetics — where precision offset printing meets the iridescent shimmer of in-line cold foil transfer. Designed for luxury cosmetics, niche skincare, premium fragrance, and beauty brands that demand packaging as exceptional as their formulations, this carton delivers a dynamic visual presence on retail shelves and in unboxing social media content.

The holographic cold foil effect is achieved in-line on our Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV press using Kurz Luxor holographic foil — the foil is transferred during the printing pass with ±0.15mm registration against CMYK artwork. The iridescent rainbow shifts from silver through blue, pink, and gold depending on viewing angle and lighting conditions, creating a living, responsive surface that no static print can replicate. Because the cold foil process is in-line (not a separate offline stamping step), production cost is typically 25–40% lower than traditional hot foil stamping while delivering comparable visual impact.

item.title: Trapezoid Luxury Watch Box with Velvet Inlay and Magnetic Closure — Custom Presentation Packaging
item.description: The trapezoid luxury watch box defies the rectangular convention that dominates watch packaging. Its angled side panels create a dynamic, forward-leaning silhouette that draws the eye before the watch is even revealed. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) at its 18,000 sqm Foshan facility, this rigid box combines precision die-cutting with luxurious interior finishing. The KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses ensure brand-critical color accuracy, while ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification provide documented quality and sustainability assurance.

item.title: Triangular Champagne Presentation Box with Magnetic Closure and Gold Foil Embossing
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s triangular champagne presentation box transforms the classic bottle gift into a sculptural statement. The three-sided rigid construction with magnetic side-seal closure creates an elegant unboxing ritual, while gold foil embossing on the matte-laminated exterior catches light from every angle. A custom die-cut EVA foam cradle securely holds standard 750ml champagne or sparkling wine bottles. Flat-pack shippable design minimizes freight costs without compromising the premium presentation. Built with 23 years of rigid box manufacturing expertise in our 18,000 sqm ISO 9001 & FSC certified facility.

item.title: Triangular Prism Rigid Gift Box — Custom Embossing Unique Shape Packaging
item.description: The Triangular Prism Rigid Gift Box is a geometrically distinctive packaging solution that breaks away from conventional rectangular formats. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — operating 18,000 sqm of ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified production space in Foshan, China — this three-sided rigid box commands attention on retail shelves and elevates gift presentation. The triangular footprint with rounded or sharp corners creates a memorable unboxing experience, while the magnetic closure (three N52 magnets at each vertex) ensures secure closure. Bincai’s KBA 1050 and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses apply full-color graphics, foil stamping, and deep embossing across all three faces. The interior is fully lined with velvet flocking, with optional die-cut foam inserts for product-specific cavity layouts.

item.title: Two-Piece Rigid Gift Box with Ribbon Tie & Spot UV — Luxury Chocolate Packaging
item.description: The two-piece rigid gift box with ribbon tie and spot UV is a premium packaging solution engineered for luxury chocolates, artisan confectionery, gourmet foods, and upscale corporate gifting. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) at our 18,000 sqm dual-factory complex in Foshan, Pearl River Delta, China, these boxes are precision-built on KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset presses with finishing on Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV lines. Every box carries ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certifications, reflecting our 23-year commitment to quality and sustainable sourcing. Daily output capacity exceeds 1.7 million boxes, including 220,000+ rigid boxes, ensuring reliable supply for seasonal and high-volume orders.

item.title: Two-Tier Velvet Watch Display Box with Drawer and Valet Tray — Custom Logo
item.description:
Product Overview

A watch is not just a timepiece — it’s a statement, a milestone, a gift that carries weight. The packaging must match that significance. The Two-Tier Velvet Watch Display Box is designed and manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — 23 years of premium paper packaging expertise, ISO 9001:2015 & FSC® certified, operating from an 18,000 sqm facility with 1.7M boxes daily output capacity.

item.title: Velvet Bangle Bracelet Display Box Magnetic Closure Satin Pillow
item.description: Velvet bangle bracelet display box with magnetic closure and satin pillow — engineered for premium jewelry brands presenting hinged bangles, cuff bracelets, tennis bracelets, and charm bracelets. The soft-touch velvet exterior and plush satin pillow insert create an elevated unboxing experience that communicates luxury before the jewelry is revealed.
