item.title: Velvet Cufflink Display Box with Suede Tray & Magnetic Closure — Custom Embossing
item.description:
Premium velvet cufflink display box with precision die-cut suede tray and magnetic closure, manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier with 23 years of experience. Rigid 2.0mm greyboard construction with soft-touch velvet flocking interior and custom-logo embossing on the lid. Available in 2-pair, 4-pair, 6-pair, and 8-pair configurations.

Features

  • Rigid 2.0mm greyboard construction wrapped in 157gsm art paper with matte lamination
  • Soft-touch velvet flocking interior (black, navy, burgundy, ivory, or custom Pantone)
  • Precision die-cut suede tray with individual cufflink cavities — prevents contact between pairs
  • Magnetic snap closure — opens effortlessly, stays securely closed
  • Custom logo embossing or debossing on lid — gold/silver/rose gold hot foil stamping available
  • Optional satin ribbon hinge for a refined open-flat presentation
  • CMYK offset printing on KBA 1050 4-color press + Heidelberg 7+1 UV for spot coatings
  • ISO 9001:2015 certified quality management, FSC certified sustainable materials
  • 23 years experience, 18,000 sqm dual factory, daily output 1.7 million boxes

Applications

Industry Application Key Feature
Jewelry Retail Cufflink set display for in-store showcase and gift packaging Suede tray presents each pair individually — upscale retail presentation
Corporate Gifting Executive cufflink gift sets with logo-embossed lid Custom embossing reinforces brand identity for VIP corporate gifts
E-Commerce Jewelry Online cufflink sales — protective shipping + premium unboxing Rigid construction withstands courier handling; velvet interior prevents scratching
Wedding & Formal Groomsmen cufflink gift packaging Multi-pair configurations ideal for bridal party gifting sets
Luxury Department Stores Countertop display with stackable uniform sizing Consistent box dimensions enable clean countertop merchandising
Made-in-China B2B Wholesale Bulk OEM cufflink packaging for international jewelry brands MOQ 500, full customization from material to finish

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Capacity 2-pair, 4-pair, 6-pair, or 8-pair — tray cavities custom die-cut to your cufflink dimensions
Exterior Wrap 157gsm art paper (matte/gloss lamination), 120gsm textured paper, or 200gsm specialty board
Exterior Color Any Pantone — black, navy, burgundy, forest green, ivory, or custom
Interior Lining Velvet flocking (standard), suede, satin, or linen — any color
Tray Material Suede-wrapped board (standard), velvet-flocked board, or molded PU insert
Logo Application Hot foil stamping (gold/silver/rose gold/copper), blind embossing, debossing, UV spot, or screen printing
Closure Magnetic snap (standard), ribbon tie, or elastic band
Additional Features Satin ribbon hinge, certificate/document pocket inside lid, custom-printed tissue paper insert
Custom Sizes 120×90×35mm (2-pair) to 260×180×40mm (8-pair) — custom die tooling available
MOQ 500 units (standard configurations), 1000+ (custom tray or specialty materials)

Production Specifications

Specification Detail
Greyboard 1200-1600gsm rigid greyboard — 2.0mm caliper, density 0.65-0.75 g/cm³
Board Cutting Bobst automatic die-cutter — ±0.3mm precision for tray cavities and magnetic closure alignment
Wrap Application Automatic wrapping machine — 157gsm art paper with hot-melt adhesive, zero-bubble finish
Velvet Flocking Electrostatic flocking — 0.5-0.8mm fiber length, nylon/polyester blend, adhesion ≥5N/25mm
Suede Tray Die-cut greyboard + suede lamination — RF-welded cavity edges, no visible glue lines
Magnet Insertion Neodymium disc magnets Ø8mm×2mm — press-fit into greyboard, pull force ≥4N per magnet
Embossing Copper die embossing on Heidelberg cylinder press — 0.5-1.5mm relief depth, hot or cold process
Foil Stamping Heidelberg hot foil stamping — 120-140°C, gold/silver/metallic foil on KURZ foil feed
Edge Finishing Turned-edge construction — 157gsm wrap folded over greyboard edge, no raw board exposed
ISO 9001 Full batch traceability — board lot, flocking batch, magnet supplier, QC sign-off per batch

Quality Assurance

Inspection Point Method Standard
Board caliper Digital micrometer — 5 points per sheet 2.0mm ±0.15mm
Wrap adhesion Cross-hatch tape test No delamination, ≤5% removal
Flocking adhesion Tape pull test — 3M 810 tape ≥5N/25mm, no fiber pull-out
Tray cavity fit Test insert with standard cufflink Snug fit, no lateral movement ≥0.5mm
Magnet pull force Force gauge — perpendicular pull ≥4N per magnet pair
Magnetic alignment Test close — 100 cycles Consistent alignment, no scratching of wrap
Embossing depth Depth gauge As specified ±0.2mm
Foil adhesion Tape test on foil No peeling or lifting
Hinge durability Open/close cycle — 500 cycles No board cracking, ribbon intact
Color consistency Spectrophotometer — D50 light ΔE ≤2.0 versus approved swatch
Overall appearance Visual under D50 No scratches, glue marks, or wrapping bubbles

FAQ

Q: Can you match the suede tray cavities to our specific cufflink dimensions?

item.title: Velvet Earring Card Display Box with Easel Stand Custom Logo
item.description:
Product Overview

A dual-purpose earring packaging solution that functions as both a protective gift box and a retail countertop display. Inside, 12 die-cut slots hold earring cards securely, while the magnetic snap closure keeps everything protected during transport. Gold foil hot-stamped logo on the lid exterior and a satin ribbon pull tab complete the premium presentation. Manufactured at Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. with 23 years of packaging manufacturing expertise.

item.description:
Product Overview

Three pull-out drawers with precision velvet flocking and die-cut insert slots organize each jewelry type. The magnetic flap closure with gold foil logo branding creates a boutique unboxing experience. Optional LED-lit vanity mirror in the top lid adds retail display functionality. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. with 23 years of luxury packaging expertise.

item.title: Velvet Jewelry Gift Box with Hidden Message Compartment and Magnetic Closure
item.description:
Product Overview

Some gifts speak without words. The Velvet Jewelry Gift Box with Hidden Message Compartment is engineered for those moments — a beautifully crafted jewelry box that holds more than a ring, necklace, or bracelet. It holds a secret. A concealed drawer beneath the main jewelry tray slides open to reveal an engraved message: a proposal, an anniversary note, a brand story, or a personalized thank-you.

item.title: Velvet Necklace Multi-Strand Display Box Magnetic Closure Gold Embossing
item.description:
Product Overview

A premium multi-strand necklace display box engineered for jewelry retailers and luxury brands. Features three independent necklace hooks suspended behind a soft velvet backboard, each capable of holding a full 18–24 inch strand without tangling. The magnetic flip-lid closure opens to a 120° angle for retail countertop presentation, while the gold foil hot-stamped logo and border elevate brand perception. Manufactured at Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. with precision die-cutting and manual velvet flocking for a flawless interior finish.

item.title: Velvet Necklace Pendant Display Box with LED Light Custom Logo Jewelry Packaging
item.description:
Velvet Necklace Pendant Display Box with LED Light — Luxury Jewelry Packaging

Elevate your jewelry presentation with Bincai’s velvet necklace pendant display box featuring an integrated LED spotlight system. Each box combines premium materials, precision manufacturing, and thoughtful design to create an unforgettable unboxing experience.

Key Features

  • Integrated LED Spotlight: Battery-powered warm white LED illuminates the pendant when the lid opens, drawing attention to the jewelry piece. Auto-off magnetic sensor conserves battery.
  • Premium Velvet Flocking: Soft, non-abrasive velvet lining in black, navy, burgundy, or custom colors protects delicate chain and pendant surfaces from scratches.
  • Satin Interior Pillow: Removable satin-covered insert secures the necklace pendant at the display angle while the chain tucks neatly into a rear compartment.
  • Custom Gold Foil Stamping: Your brand logo, monogram, or pattern embossed in gold, silver, rose gold, or holographic foil on the exterior lid.
  • Magnetic Flip Lid: Strong neodymium magnets ensure a satisfying snap-close feel and prevent accidental opening during transport.

Applications

This display box is designed for:

item.title: Velvet Ring Presentation Box with LED Spotlight and 360° Rotating Platform
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s velvet ring presentation box with LED spotlight and 360° rotating platform transforms the moment of reveal into a theatrical experience. The 2mm rigid greyboard construction wrapped in premium velvet flocking provides luxurious tactility, while the magnetic front-flap opens to activate three warm-white LEDs that illuminate the ring from optimal angles. The motorized rotating platform (1 RPM) slowly turns the ring for a complete view — powered by a whisper-quiet Mabuchi micro motor with 50+ hours of battery life. Ideal for engagement proposals, luxury jewelry retail, and high-end ring presentations.

item.title: Book-Style Magnetic Flap Rigid Box for Premium Gifts
item.description:
Product Overview

The book-style magnetic flap rigid box elevates packaging to bibliophilic art — it opens like a treasured hardcover volume, with a wraparound flap secured by concealed magnets and a decorative spine that begs to be displayed on a shelf. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified, 23 years of luxury packaging — each box combines the structural integrity of 1600gsm greyboard with the elegance of book-cloth spine wrapping and gold foil spine titling. Our Heidelberg 7+1 UV press prints the cover art, and our artisan finishing team hand-applies spine reinforcement, magnetic flaps, and interior lining. For a technical deep dive into the engineering behind our magnetic flap systems, read our guide to magnetic closure box engineering.

item.title: Corrugated Flat Mailer Double-Wall — Heavy-Duty Industrial Parts Shipping
item.description: Corrugated flat mailer with double-wall BC-flute construction for heavy-duty industrial parts shipping — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). Engineered for heavy industrial components, automotive spare parts, machinery components, tools, and metal fabrications requiring robust shipping protection. The BC-flute double-wall construction (6mm total thickness) delivers 200# burst strength for superior stacking and puncture resistance. Self-locking tab closure eliminates tape while providing secure, tamper-evident sealing. The flat mailer design stacks efficiently for warehouse storage and ships flat to reduce freight costs. Custom flexographic post-print with KBA 1050 offset-printed labels provides brand identification. Our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility delivers corrugated packaging under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Custom Folding Carton Box CMYK Printing Retail
item.description:
Product Overview

Our custom folding cartons deliver premium shelf presence with vibrant CMYK offset printing on high-quality paperboard. Designed for retail, e-commerce, and brand packaging, these flat-shipped cartons fold into sturdy, precision-fit boxes. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) in our 18,000 sqm integrated factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory, commissioned 2025) in Foshan, Guangdong — operating KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses with closed-loop Prinect color management. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified, daily output 1.7 million boxes serving 200+ global clients.

item.title: Custom Printed Corrugated Pizza Box Food Delivery
item.description:
Product Overview

Our custom printed corrugated pizza boxes are engineered for food delivery brands that demand both performance and presentation. Manufactured in our 18,000m² ISO 9001 certified factory, each box combines structural integrity with vibrant brand printing — keeping pizzas hot, fresh, and perfectly presented from oven to doorstep. B-Flute, E-Flute, and BC-Flute options let you balance insulation, rigidity, and cost.

Design Features

  • Ventilation Design: Built-in vent holes prevent steam buildup, keeping crusts crispy during transport
  • Lock-Tab Closure: Secure self-locking tabs eliminate the need for tape or adhesives
  • Grease-Resistant Liner: Optional PE-coated or clay-coated interior prevents oil bleed-through
  • Stackable Construction: Uniform sizing and reinforced corners for stable stacking during delivery runs
  • Custom Window Cutouts: Optional die-cut windows showcase the pizza without opening the box

Applications

  • Restaurant and pizzeria takeout/delivery
  • Food truck and catering services
  • Frozen pizza retail packaging
  • Food delivery platforms (Uber Eats, DoorDash, Meituan)
  • Promotional and branded pizza events
  • Meal kit subscription boxes

Customization Options

Option Specification
Printing CMYK offset on Heidelberg/KBA presses, up to 4 colors + varnish
Flute Type B-Flute (3mm, light/rigid), E-Flute (1.5mm, fine print), BC-Flute (6mm, heavy-duty)
Liner Kraft, white-top, coated white, or recycled — single or double face
Closure Self-locking tabs, tuck-top, or tear-strip for tamper evidence
Finish Gloss/matte varnish, aqueous coating, or bare kraft natural
Size Range 6" (personal) to 18" (family/party) — custom dimensions available
Add-ons Die-cut windows, perforated tear-off lid, built-in sauce cup holder, QR code printing

Quality Assurance

Test Method / Standard Acceptance Criteria
Flute Compression Edge Crush Test (ECT) — TAPPI T-811 B-Flute ≥ 23 lb/in, E-Flute ≥ 18 lb/in, BC-Flute ≥ 44 lb/in
Grease Resistance 3M Kit Test — TAPPI T-559 Level 6 minimum (clay-coated), Level 8 (PE-coated)
Food Contact Safety FDA 21 CFR 176.170/180, EU 1935/2004 No detectable migration, sensory panel pass
Vent Effectiveness Steam chamber test — 15 min at 85°C ≤5% moisture gain inside box, crust remains crisp
Lock-Tab Retention 10 open/close cycles, pull-force test ≥2.5kg pull-to-open resistance
Color Consistency X-Rite eXact — ΔE vs. master on corrugated ΔE ≤ 2.5 (natural kraft liner variation)
AQL Sampling ISO 2859-1 Level II AQL 2.5 (major), AQL 1.0 (minor)
Stack Compression BCT (Box Compression Test) — TAPPI T-804 ≥150kg top-load for 18" box
Drop Test ISTA 1A — 10 drops from 760mm (loaded 1.5kg simulated) No structural failure, lock tabs remain engaged

7-Stage QC Gate

  1. Incoming Material Inspection — corrugated board ECT verification, liner grammage, food-grade ink certification (FDA/EU)
  2. In-Process Printing — CMYK color check every 500 sheets on KBA 1050, food-grade ink traceability per batch
  3. Die-Cutting & Scoring — slot/vent precision ±0.5mm, score line depth for clean fold
  4. Coating Application — grease-resistant coating coverage check, UV cure verification on Heidelberg 7+1
  5. Assembly QC — lock-tab engagement force, vent hole alignment, window seal integrity (if applicable)
  6. Finished Goods Audit — AQL 2.5 (major), AQL 1.5 (critical) per ANSI/ASQ Z1.4 under D65 lighting
  7. Pre-Shipment Inspection — random sample pull, full functional test, food-contact compliance documentation

Customer Success Scenarios

  • US Regional Pizza Chain (12 locations) — 50,000 units/month ongoing contract, B-Flute kraft with 2-color logo, lock-tab closure, 14" standard size, 7-day production cycle with weekly shipments FOB Shenzhen
  • Australian Frozen Pizza Brand — 20,000 units, E-Flute with 4-color CMYK full-wrap print on white-top liner, PE-coated interior for freezer-to-oven moisture barrier, custom QR code panel for cooking instructions, delivered in 10 days
  • Middle Eastern Cloud Kitchen Startup — 5,000 units, BC-Flute heavy-duty for stacked delivery runs, clay-coated grease barrier, custom die-cut vent pattern (branded star shape), flat-packed to save 60% freight, 5-day rush production

Why This Bincai Pizza Box vs Generic Takeout Box

Food delivery packaging isn’t just a container — it’s the last touchpoint before your customer eats. Here’s what separates Bincai’s engineered pizza box from generic corrugated takeout boxes:

item.title: Kraft Paper Gift Box with Window Display Eco

item.title: Leather-Finish Rigid Jewelry Box with Magnetic Clasp — Rings & Earrings
item.description: Leather-finish rigid jewelry box with magnetic clasp for rings and earrings — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). Constructed with 2.5mm greyboard walls and wrapped corners for long-lasting durability. Our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility delivers 220,000+ rigid boxes daily under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified, 23 years of packaging manufacturing since 2003 — each mailer is precision die-cut from E-flute or B-flute corrugated board for crush resistance during transit. item.description:
Product Overview

Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003) operating an 18,000 sqm facility (10,000 sqm main + 8,000 sqm smart factory commissioned 2025) — this mailer combines precision multi-depth scoring, automatic hot-melt adhesive application, and ISTA 1A drop-tested construction.

item.title: Corrugated Book Wrap Mailer — Self-Sealing E-Commerce Shipping Box
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s corrugated book wrap mailer eliminates the two biggest pain points of e-commerce fulfillment: taping boxes and customers struggling to open them. The pressure-sensitive hot-melt self-sealing adhesive strip bonds instantly on contact — press the flap down and it’s sealed, no water-activated tape, no packing tape dispenser, no labor. At the receiving end, the integrated tear-tape opening delivers a clean, frustration-free unboxing in one pull — your customer never reaches for scissors or a box cutter.

item.title: Corrugated Literature Mailer with Self-Seal Strip — Book and Catalog Shipping
item.description:
Product Overview

The perforated tear strip opens cleanly in one pull, giving customers a frustration-free unboxing. Sized for standard book formats, A4 catalogs, and flat merchandise. Custom flexo printing on the kraft exterior with your brand logo and messaging. For premium full-color graphics, we offer offset litho printing on our KBA 1050 4-color press and UV-coated finishes on our Heidelberg 7+1 UV press — delivering magazine-quality imagery on corrugated board. ISTA 3A drop-test validated for e-commerce shipping. 23 years of corrugated box manufacturing from our 10,000 sqm Foshan factory.

item.title: Corrugated Multi-Depth Shipping Box with Tear Strip for Subscription Fulfillment
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Multi-Depth Corrugated Shipping Box solves the subscription fulfillment industry’s biggest pain point: managing dozens of SKUs with seasonally varying contents. The variable-depth scoring allows a single box design to compress from 200mm down to 40mm — one box handles everything from a single lipstick to a full skincare regimen. The integrated perforated tear strip ensures frustration-free opening (no box cutter needed, no damaged products), while the auto-lock bottom assembles in under 3 seconds for high-throughput fulfillment centers. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified with 23 years of expertise — every box passes burst-strength testing (≥200 PSI Mullen for E-flute) and edge crush verification (ECT ≥ 32 lb/in). Our dual factories produce 1.7M+ boxes daily, shipping to e-commerce brands in 60+ countries.

item.title: Corrugated Tuck-Top Mailer with Perforated Tear Strip E-Commerce Shipping
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Corrugated Tuck-Top Mailer with perforated tear strip is purpose-built for e-commerce fulfillment centers shipping thousands of orders daily. The self-locking tuck-top closure eliminates tape — reducing packing time by 40% compared to standard RSC boxes — while the integrated perforated tear strip gives end customers a frustration-free unboxing experience.

Manufacturing Excellence & Equipment

Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. at our 18,000 sqm ISO 9001:2015 and FSC-certified dual-factory facility in Foshan (10,000 sqm main plant + 8,000 sqm smart factory commissioned 2025), each mailer combines E-flute (1.2mm) or B-flute (2.5mm) corrugated construction produced on our BHS 2.5m Corrugator line with custom CMYK printing. The KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press runs at 15,000 sheets/hour for photographic-quality brand printing, while the Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV with inter-deck UV curing delivers instant-dry special effects and scuff-resistant coatings. Precision die-cutting on the Bobst SP 102 BMA achieves ±0.15mm tolerance for perfect tear-strip alignment and tuck-tab geometry.

item.description:

(established 2003, Foshan, China), the carton is produced on German-engineered KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses for uncompromising print quality. The dual-finish approach — spot UV highlighting key design elements while soft-touch lamination wraps the entire surface — is the industry standard for luxury skincare, fragrance, and cosmetics brands seeking premium shelf presence. With daily capacity of 1.7 million boxes from our 18,000 sqm facility, Bincai delivers consistent quality from startup brand trials to multinational volume runs.

item.title: Custom Corrugated Mailer Box with Integrated Bubble Lining for Glassware Shipping
item.description: Custom corrugated mailer box with integrated bubble lining for glassware and fragile item shipping — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). The design combines double-wall B-flute corrugated board with an integrated bubble-film liner for dual-layer impact protection, eliminating the need for separate bubble wrap and reducing packaging labor by up to 40%. The bubble lining is factory-bonded to the inner walls during corrugation, ensuring the protective layer stays in position throughout the shipping journey. Ideal for direct-to-consumer wine glass, ceramic mug, candle jar, and fragile decor shipping. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color presses across 18,000 sqm factory floor (10,000+8,000 smart factory). Daily output 1.7 million boxes. ISO 9001 and FSC certified. ISTA 3A drop-test validated for e-commerce parcel shipping with edge crush test (ECT) ratings up to 44 lb/in for maximum stacking strength.

item.title: Custom Corrugated Mailer with Tamper-Evident Security Seal — E-Commerce & Pharma Shipping
item.description:
Product Overview

Custom corrugated mailer box with integrated tamper-evident security seal — engineered by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) for e-commerce, pharmaceutical, and high-security brands requiring visible proof of package integrity. The security seal system uses a destructible void-pattern adhesive strip that leaves irreversible fiber-tear evidence (‘VOID’/‘OPENED’ pattern) when removed, enabling end-customers to instantly verify their package has not been compromised in transit. The self-locking crash-lock bottom eliminates packing tape during assembly, speeding up fulfillment operations. Manufactured across 18,000 sqm (10,000+8,000 smart factory) on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses with 1.7 million daily box output capacity post-2025 smart factory expansion.

item.title: Custom Corrugated Subscription Box — Kraft Body + Full-Color CMYK Label with Tear Strip
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s custom corrugated subscription box combines the cost-efficiency of kraft corrugated board with a full-color CMYK offset litho label for vibrant branding. The self-locking crash-lock bottom assembles in under 3 seconds, and the tear-strip opening creates a premium unboxing moment. Ideal for beauty boxes, snack subscriptions, apparel bundles, and book-of-the-month fulfillment. 23 years of packaging manufacturing.

Manufacturing Specifications

  • Flute: B-flute (2.5mm) — optimal crush resistance for mixed-product boxes
  • Body: 125gsm kraft liner, natural brown finish
  • Label: 157gsm art paper, full-color CMYK offset litho, matte lamination
  • Label Size: Full top panel coverage or partial (customer-specified)
  • Bottom: Crash-lock self-locking with reinforced tabs
  • Opening: Integrated tear strip with pull-tab
  • Daily Output: 1.7 million color boxes (post-2025 smart factory expansion)
  • Certifications: ISO 9001:2015, FSC Chain-of-Custody

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Size Range 200×150×80mm to 400×300×150mm
Flute Type B-flute (2.5mm), E-flute (1.5mm), F-flute (0.8mm)
Label Print CMYK offset litho, Pantone spot, metallic ink, soft-touch
Label Finish Matte lamination, gloss lamination, soft-touch, UV spot
Kraft Color Natural brown, bleached white, black kraft
Opening Style Tear strip, perforated, zip strip, pull-tab
Interior Tissue paper, crinkle paper, custom divider insert
MOQ 1,000 units (standard), 3,000+ (custom die tooling)

Performance Testing

Test Standard Specification
Edge Crush Test (ECT) TAPPI T-811 32+ lb/in (B-flute)
Flat Crush (FCT) TAPPI T-825 140+ kPa
Burst Strength TAPPI T-810 1,200+ kPa
Label Adhesion Internal ≥3.5 N/cm peel at 23°C
Drop Test ISTA 1A 10-drop sequence

Industry Applications

Industry Box Type Recommended Spec
Beauty / Cosmetics B-flute, full-color label Soft-touch lamination
Snack / Food Subscription B-flute, food-grade liner Soy-based ink label
Apparel / Fashion B-flute, bleached kraft Embossed logo label
Book Subscription B-flute, adjustable depth Matte label finish
Pet Supplies E-flute, sturdy build Spot UV brand mark
Coffee / Tea Curation B-flute, rye-grain kraft Earth-tone label with natural texture
Kids Activity Kits B-flute, white kraft Bright CMYK label with rounded corners
Corporate Welcome Kits B-flute, premium white kraft Embossed logo + foil accented label

Quality Details

  • Edge Crush Testing: Every production batch sampled per TAPPI T-811 — B-flute minimum 32 lb/in ECT for stackability in warehouse and transit
  • Print Registration: Label-to-body alignment maintained at ±0.5mm through automatic label applicator with vision system verification
  • Tear Strip Performance: Initiation force calibrated to 12-20N — strong enough to survive transit, easy enough for consumer unboxing
  • Crash-Lock Durability: Bottom mechanism tested to 15+ open/close cycles without tab fatigue or adhesive failure
  • Glue Bond: Water-based PVA adhesive with ≥15N/cm peel strength on side seams — no hot-melt contamination risk for food-contact applications
  • Color Consistency: ΔE ≤ 2.0 across full production run monitored by inline spectrophotometer on KBA 1050 press
  • Moisture Resistance: Kraft liner with 8-10% equilibrium moisture content for dimensional stability in varying humidity conditions
  • ISTA 1A Drop Test: 10-drop sequence from 0.76m — zero structural failure, zero label delamination
  • Free Pre-Production Samples: 5-7 day turnaround with digital proof and physical sample for approval before mass production
  • MOQ: 1,000 units standard; 3,000+ for custom die tooling; lower trial quantities available for startup brands

Why Choose Bincai for Subscription Boxes

Bincai’s subscription box manufacturing is purpose-built for the DTC fulfillment workflow. Our automatic crash-lock folder-gluers produce ready-to-use boxes that assembly teams can erect in under 3 seconds each — dramatically reducing fulfillment center labor costs compared to tape-sealed alternatives. The kraft body + full-color label construction offers the ideal balance: the kraft base keeps material costs 30-40% lower than full-wrap litho-laminate, while the CMYK label delivers premium brand presence on the top panel — the only surface subscribers see in product photography and unboxing videos. With 23 years of corrugated engineering expertise across beauty, food, apparel, and publishing verticals, Bincai understands the unique structural requirements of each subscription category — from the grease-resistant liners needed for meal kits to the crush-resistant double-wall construction for heavy book bundles.

Die-Cutting Bobst flatbed ±0.3mm panel tolerance
Edge Alignment Visual + gauge check Gap ≤1mm at wrapped corners
Handle Attachment Pull-force test ≥15kg before failure (leather handle with rivet)
Magnetic Closure 100-cycle fatigue test Force remains 3.0–5.0kg throughout
Drop Test ISTA 1A — 10 drops from 760mm No structural failure, lid stays closed
Final Visual 100% under 5000K lighting No scratches, scuffs, wrap bubbles
AQL Sampling ISO 2859-1 Level II AQL 2.5 (major), AQL 1.0 (minor)

Seven-Stage Quality Control Gates

Gate Stage Inspection Defect Trigger
G1 Raw Material Incoming Greyboard GSM/caliper/moisture, art paper GSM, leather handle tensile strength, magnet grade N35, hot foil batch test, FSC documentation Out-of-spec → lot rejection
G2 Pre-Press Proofing Digital proof vs. master, foil die alignment, embossing die test impression, color calibration on selected art paper Color shift >ΔE 2.0 → recalibration
G3 Printing & Foil Stamping Color ΔE every 500 sheets, foil registration ±0.1mm, foil coverage uniformity, embossing crispness ΔE threshold → press stop; foil misregistration → die realignment
G4 Board Cutting & Die-Cutting Panel dimensions ±0.3mm, groove depth for hinge edges, corner radius consistency Deviation → die recalibration
G5 Lamination & Wrapping Lamination: zero bubbles/delamination; Wrap: corner fold precision, tension uniformity, no creases Defect → re-lamination or rewrap
G6 Hardware & Assembly Leather handle rivet attachment pull-test (sampling), magnet placement ±0.5mm, velvet/satin lining adhesion, insert fit Handle failure → batch rework; magnet offset → repositioning
G7 Final QC & Packing ISTA 1A drop, 100% visual under 5000K, handle pull (sampling), magnet cycle, count accuracy, polybag + master carton Drop failure → batch quarantine

Sustainability & Compliance

Standard Scope Status
ISO 9001:2015 Quality management system — design, production, delivery Certified
FSC Chain-of-Custody Fiber traceability — forest to finished box FSC certified
REACH EU chemical safety regulation Compliant — adhesives, inks, coatings, leather treatments
EN 71-3 Migration of heavy metals — inks, coatings, leather dyes Compliant
Prop 65 California Safe Drinking Water and Toxic Enforcement Act Compliant
Sedex SMETA Ethical trade and responsible sourcing audit 4-Pillar audit completed

Environmental Note: The rigid greyboard body and art paper wrap are fully recyclable in standard paper streams. The leather handle represents a complexity — while leather itself is a natural material, we offer several sustainable alternatives: (1) recycled leather composite handle (post-industrial leather fiber bonded with natural rubber latex — reduces virgin leather demand by 85%), (2) cork handle (FSC-certified, renewable, biodegradable), (3) cotton webbing handle (organic cotton, GOTS certified), or (4) die-cut kraft paper handle (fully recyclable in paper stream). For brands with strict plastic-free policies, we can replace the matte lamination with aqueous coating for equivalent scuff protection without plastic film.

item.title: Custom Printed Durable Corrugated Box for Clothing and Gifts
item.description:
Premium custom printed durable corrugated box for clothing and gifts manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier with 23 years of experience.

Applications

  • Fashion & Apparel: Durable shipping for folded clothing, denim, shirts, and designer garments — crush-resistant double-wall protection for garment integrity during transit
  • Gift & Retail: Premium presentation for gift sets, holiday hampers, and branded retail merchandise — unboxing experience matters
  • E-commerce Fulfillment: Self-locking bottom for rapid packing, tear strip for easy customer opening, flat-packed for warehouse efficiency
  • Subscription Box: Custom branded packaging for monthly subscription services — reusable, recyclable, memorable
  • Promotional Kits: Corporate gift sets, event merchandise, and product launch kits with full-surface branding

Customization Options

  • Flute & Construction: B-Flute (3mm), C-Flute (4mm), BC-Flute double-wall (6mm), or E-Flute micro (1.5mm) — matched to product weight from 500g to 30kg
  • Liner Options: Kraft brown (natural), white-top (offset print quality), test liner (economy), or recycled (eco-branding)
  • Printing: Full-color CMYK offset litho on KBA 1050 4-color press for white-top liners; flexo 1-3 color for kraft liners; Pantone spot color matching
  • Closure System: Self-locking crash-lock bottom, tuck-top with dust flaps, tear-strip opening, or self-sealing adhesive strip — eliminates plastic tape
  • Surface Finishing: Matte or gloss aqueous coating, spot UV varnish, hot foil stamping (gold/silver/rose gold/copper), embossing/debossing
  • Internal Features: Custom die-cut corrugated dividers, foam inserts, tissue paper lining, or PET window panels for product visibility
  • Size Range: From compact 150×100×50mm mailers to large 600×400×300mm shipping containers — fully custom dimensions

Production Specifications

  • Press: KBA 1050 4-color offset press with inline aqueous coating for white-top litho printing
  • Flexo Line: High-speed 3-color flexo post-print for kraft corrugated at 12,000 sheets/hour
  • Corrugator: In-house single-face and double-back corrugator producing B, C, E, and BC-flute combinations
  • Die-Cutting: Heidelberg cylinder die-cutter with automatic stripping for complex shapes and windows
  • Gluing: Automatic folder-gluer with crash-lock and 4-corner capability at 8,000 boxes/hour
  • Material: Virgin kraft linerboard 125-200gsm, medium 100-150gsm; recycled options available
  • Burst Strength: 200# (single-wall) to 350# (double-wall) — tested to Mullen standards

Production Quality & Testing

  • Burst Testing: Mullen burst strength tester — every batch verified to specification (200#–350#)
  • Edge Crush Test (ECT): 32–44 ECT for stacking strength in warehouse and container loading
  • Flat Crush Test (FCT): Corrugated medium flute integrity verification
  • Drop Testing: ISTA 1A certified drop tests from 0.6m–1.2m for e-commerce shipping simulation
  • Color Consistency: Heidelberg Prinect Inpress spectrophotometry on offset runs — ΔE ≤ 2.0
  • ISO 9001:2015: Full quality management system across all production stages
  • FSC Certified: Chain-of-custody certified paperboard from sustainably managed forests
  • 100% Visual Inspection: Under D50 standard lighting before palletizing and dispatch
  • SGS-Tested: Third-party verification for burst strength, stacking durability, and print adhesion — report available on request
  • Pre-Production Samples: Free 3D rendering + physical sample in 5-7 working days with full decoration and structural testing

Sustainability & Compliance

Aspect Detail
Paper Sourcing FSC Chain-of-Custody certified — every shipment traceable to responsibly managed forests
Recycled Content Up to 70% post-consumer recycled content available on kraft liners (OCC-sourced)
End-of-Life 100% recyclable in standard paper/cardboard streams — no mixed-material bonding
Adhesive Water-based PVA — biodegradable, VOC-compliant per GB/T standards
Ink Soy-based or water-based flexo — heavy-metal-free pigments
Waste Factory recycling program diverts 95%+ of production paper waste from landfill
Carbon Optimized press scheduling and LED factory lighting reduce energy consumption

Why Choose Bincai for Corrugated Boxes

Bincai’s corrugated division combines structural engineering with print excellence — a rare combination in the packaging industry. Our in-house corrugator (single-face + double-back) gives us control over flute profiles and board quality that contract manufacturers can’t match, while the KBA 1050 4-color offset press delivers litho-quality printing on white-top liners for brand-forward e-commerce packaging. For clothing and apparel brands shipping direct-to-consumer, Bincai’s self-locking design eliminates the need for plastic tape — reducing packaging time, material cost, and environmental impact in a single solution.

item.title: Folding Carton Die-Cut Display Tray — Retail Counter Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s die-cut folding carton display tray combines structural integrity with retail-ready presentation. The auto-lock (crash-lock) bottom provides rapid assembly in under 3 seconds without glue or tape, while precision Bobst flatbed die-cutting enables custom window cutouts for product visibility. Available in CCNB (350gsm), white-lined chipboard (400gsm), SBS (300gsm), or FSC-certified kraft (400gsm). The PET window (0.2mm, food-safe grade available) lets customers see the product without opening the tray — proven to increase impulse purchases by 23% in retail studies. Manufactured on KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset (15,000 sheets/hour) with Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV for specialty coatings (spot UV, soft-touch, glitter) in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility. Ideal for cosmetics, confectionery, consumer electronics accessories, and health/beauty counter displays serving 500+ global brands since 2003.

Each pillow box ships flat for space-efficient logistics and assembles in seconds with a simple tuck-and-lock mechanism.

item.description: Luxury folding carton with a continuous gold foil stamped border and soft-touch matte finish — the signature packaging for premium cosmetics, fragrances, and skincare. (founded 2003, 23 years), this carton delivers immediate luxury perception through the contrast of metallic gold precision against a velvety matte surface. The soft-touch coating provides a tactile, fingerprint-resistant surface that invites handling — a key differentiator in cosmetics where customers pick up and examine packaging before purchase. Available in reverse-tuck, straight-tuck, or auto-lock bottom configurations for assembly line efficiency. Produced on Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 offset presses with integrated Heidelberg cylinder foil stamping across 18,000 sqm (10,000+8,000 smart factory) of factory space in Foshan, Guangdong. item.title: Folding Carton with Tuck-Top and Auto-Lock Bottom for Confectionery Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Tuck-Top Auto-Lock Bottom Folding Carton is purpose-engineered for artisanal chocolatiers, macaron bakeries, and premium confectionery brands requiring food-safe packaging that protects delicate products while presenting them beautifully at retail. The auto-lock bottom pop-opens in a single motion — no tape, no folding gymnastics — enabling bakeries to assemble 30+ boxes per minute during peak production. The optional die-cut PET window (or compostable PLA alternative) showcases the product while keeping it hygienically sealed, and the soft-touch lamination creates the velvety tactile experience that signals “premium” before the customer even sees the price tag. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified with 23 years of expertise — every carton uses food-safe, low-migration inks and water-based adhesives compliant with EU Framework Regulation (EC) No 1935/2004 for food contact materials.

item.title: FSC Certified Kraft Paper Box with Custom Stamp Logo Natural Look
item.description:
Product Overview

item.title: FSC Certified Kraft Tray Box with Soy Ink Food-Safe Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Every component — from the FSC Chain-of-Custody certified kraft board to the soy-based offset inks to the water-based adhesive — is food-contact safe and fully compostable in industrial facilities (EN 13432 certified). Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified with 23 years of packaging expertise — this tray box is printed on our KBA 1050 4-color offset press with vegetable-based inks that contain zero petroleum-derived solvents. Our 18,000 sqm Foshan factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory) has a dedicated food-grade production zone with positive air pressure, UV-C sterilization, and full material traceability from forest to box. Read our comprehensive guide to sustainable packaging at Bincai and explore our cross-industry food packaging solutions. Browse all kraft eco boxes in our product line.

item.title: FSC Kraft Paper Hinged-Lid Box with Compostable Window Film for Food Display
item.description: FSC-certified kraft paper hinged-lid box with compostable PLA window film for food display and bakery packaging — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). This is the industry’s most complete end-to-end compostable packaging solution: FSC kraft board, PLA (polylactic acid) window film certified to EN 13432 industrial composting standard, soy-based ink (Müller Martini certified, low-VOC, heavy-metal-free), and water-based compostable coating — every component designed to return to soil in industrial composting facilities within 90 days. The hinged-lid design with locking tab opens and closes repeatedly without tearing, maintaining structural integrity through multiple customer interactions at farmers’ markets, bakeries, and retail displays. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color presses across 18,000 sqm factory floor (10,000+8,000 smart factory). Daily output 1.7 million boxes. ISO 9001 and FSC certified. Food-grade compliant per FDA 21 CFR and EU Regulation (EC) No. 1935/2004 for direct food contact.

item.title: Kraft Eco-Friendly Tuck-Top Mailer Box with Soy Ink Print
item.description:
Product Overview

This eco-friendly kraft tuck-top mailer box by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing delivers sustainable packaging without compromising on print quality or structural integrity. Made from 100% recycled kraft board (350gsm–400gsm) with FSC Chain-of-Custody certification, it features soy-based ink printing for a fully biodegradable packaging solution. The tuck-top closure eliminates the need for tapes or adhesives, simplifying both assembly and recycling. With 23 years of manufacturing expertise and daily output of 1.7 million boxes from our 18,000 sqm facility, Bincai serves e-commerce brands, subscription box companies, and retailers seeking verified sustainable packaging. Unlike many “eco” boxes that sacrifice print vibrancy, Bincai’s Heidelberg 7+1 UV press with soy-based inks achieves rich, solid colors on kraft surfaces — so your brand doesn’t look washed out. The natural kraft aesthetic resonates with today’s conscious consumers, communicating environmental responsibility before they even open the box. Available with optional FSC, REACH, and RoHS documentation for your compliance records.

item.title: Kraft Paper Eco Box with Seed-Embedded Tag Sustainable Gift Packaging

(founded 2003), our Foshan factory spans 18,000 sqm (10,000+8,000 smart factory) with KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses, delivering 1.7 million boxes daily. Manufactured at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility with 23 years of paper box expertise, Bincai produces 1.7 million boxes daily across KBA 1050 and Heidelberg 7+1 UV press lines while maintaining ISO 9001 and FSC chain-of-custody certifications. item.title: Kraft Paper Gift Box with Natural Hemp Rope Handle and Soy-Based Ink
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Kraft Paper Gift Box with Natural Hemp Rope Handle represents our commitment to plastic-free, fully biodegradable luxury packaging. Every component — from the 350gsm FSC-certified uncoated kraft board to the 5mm natural hemp rope handle to the soy-based CMYK inks — is chosen for end-of-life compostability and recyclability in standard paper streams. The hemp rope handle is threaded through reinforced die-cut slots (no metal eyelets, no plastic rivets), creating a rustic-meets-premium aesthetic that resonates with today’s eco-conscious consumers. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified with 23 years of expertise — this box is a bestseller for sustainable fashion brands, organic skincare companies, and artisan food producers across 60+ export markets. Our dual factories produce 1.7M+ boxes daily, with dedicated eco-production lines using water-based adhesives and renewable energy.

item.title: Kraft Paper Shoulder Box with Magnetic Snap Closure and Custom Divider — Eco-Friendly Gift Set Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Kraft Paper Shoulder Box with Magnetic Snap Closure bridges the gap between uncompromising eco-credentials and luxury gift presentation — proving that sustainability and premium branding are not mutually exclusive. The box body is crafted from FSC-certified kraft liner (250gsm) wrapped over 1600gsm recycled greyboard, creating a sturdy rigid structure with the warm, organic texture of natural kraft. The magnetic snap closure (concealed NdFeB magnets) provides the premium tactile experience buyers expect from gift packaging, while soy-based ink printing (1-2 colors) keeps the entire box 100% recyclable in standard paper streams — no de-lamination, no plastic film separation, no landfill. Inside, custom kraft card dividers (die-cut from the same FSC stock) organize multiple products — tea sachets, honey jars, soap bars, candle tins — into a beautifully organized gift set. At Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified with 23 years of manufacturing excellence — every box is produced on our dual-factory Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA Rapida 105 press lines, delivering 220,000+ boxes daily with full FSC chain-of-custody documentation.

item.title: Kraft Paper Watch Box with Cotton Strap Eco-Friendly Custom Logo
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Kraft Paper Watch Box combines sustainability with premium presentation — proving that eco-friendly doesn’t mean sacrificing quality. The natural kraft paperboard exterior, cotton pull strap, and soy-based ink printing create a 100% biodegradable packaging solution for environmentally conscious watch brands. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. in our FSC Chain-of-Custody certified facility, each box uses FSC-certified kraft paperboard, vegetable-based adhesives, and unbleached cotton strapping. Our 18,000 sqm Foshan factory (10,000 sqm original + 8,000 sqm smart expansion, 2025) produces 220,000+ gift boxes daily, with a dedicated eco-packaging line running 100% renewable energy for select production runs. ISO 9001:2015 quality management ensures every box meets the same rigorous standards as our luxury non-eco lines.

item.title: Luxury Candle Gift Set Rigid Box with Ribbon Tie and Foam Insert
item.description:
Luxury candle gift set rigid box with ribbon tie closure and custom foam insert — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory) with KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses. Daily output 1.7 million boxes.

Applications

  • Luxury scented candle gift sets (2-4 candle configurations)
  • Premium home fragrance and aromatherapy packaging
  • Spa and wellness gift collections
  • Holiday and seasonal candle gift promotions
  • High-end home décor retail display boxes

Customization Options

  • Satin ribbon tie closure in custom colors with brand logo printing
  • Precision die-cut foam insert with cavities for 2, 3, or 4 candles
  • Hot gold or silver foil stamping on lid and spine
  • Embossed/debossed brand logo with tactile texture
  • PU leather or velvet-wrapped exterior for ultra-premium feel
  • Magnetic side flap with hidden magnet design
  • Full CMYK + Pantone spot color with matte or gloss lamination
  • Custom sizes from 120×120mm to 300×300mm

Production Specifications

  • KBA 1050 4-color offset press with inline aqueous coating
  • Heidelberg 7+1 UV press for high-gloss spot UV accents
  • Fully automatic rigid box production line with corner wrapping
  • Greyboard core: 1000gsm–2000gsm for structural integrity
  • Surface wrapping: 157gsm art paper, specialty textured paper, or PU leather
  • Foam insert: custom die-cut EVA or PU foam in black, white, or custom colors
  • Ribbon: double-face satin, grosgrain, or cotton ribbon

Production Quality & Testing

  • Color consistency verified with Heidelberg Prinect Inpress spectrophotometry
  • ΔE ≤ 2.0 color accuracy across full production runs
  • Magnet pull-force testing at 3.5–5.0N for secure closure
  • Drop test certification for foam insert cavity retention
  • 100% visual inspection under D50 standard lighting
  • ISO 9001:2015 quality management throughout production
  • FSC-certified paperboard sourced from sustainably managed forests

Sustainability & Compliance

Aspect Detail
Paper Sourcing FSC Chain-of-Custody certified — each shipment traceable to responsibly managed forests
Recyclable Board Greyboard core and surface papers are 100% recyclable in standard paper streams
Adhesive Water-based PVA — biodegradable, VOC-free, compliant with GB/T and EU standards
Foam Insert EVA foam insert is reusable — designed for customer retention, not single-use
Ribbon Satin ribbon sourced from OEKO-TEX certified mills — tested for colorfastness
Factory Waste 95%+ of production paper waste recycled through closed-loop program

Why Choose Bincai for Luxury Candle Packaging

The home fragrance market demands packaging that communicates warmth, craftsmanship, and sophistication — before the customer even lights the candle. Bincai’s rigid box division brings 23 years of luxury packaging expertise to every candle gift set. Our Heidelberg 7+1 UV press creates luminous foil and spot UV effects that catch candlelight, while our in-house foam die-cutting ensures every candle sits securely in transit — no rattling, no breakage, no returns. For candle brands selling in department stores, boutiques, and direct-to-consumer channels, Bincai delivers the complete package: structural protection, sensory unboxing, and sustainability credibility.

item.title: Luxury Christmas Paper Gift Box with Gold Foil Snowflake
item.description: Luxury Christmas paper gift box with gold foil snowflake pattern — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified with 23 years of premium packaging expertise — this box combines 2.5mm greyboard structural integrity with Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV press spot coating. Each box is produced on our dedicated rigid box production line — 220,000+ gift boxes daily — at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility with fully automatic CNC corner wrapping, ensuring consistent quality from the first box to the 100,000th.

item.title: Luxury Square Rigid Gift Box with Gold Foil Stamping
item.description: Timeless luxury square rigid gift box with gold foil stamping — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of manufacturing expertise (founded 2003). Built with 2.5mm FSC-certified greyboard for a substantial hand-feel, the magnetic or two-piece lid-and-base construction creates a ceremonial unboxing experience. Multi-pass gold foil stamping on Bobst SP 102 BMA delivers crisp, reflective branding that never fades. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across Bincai’s 18,000 sqm dual factory (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory) in Foshan, Guangdong. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified. Daily output 1.7 million boxes. MOQ 500 with free pre-production samples.

item.title: Luxury Suede Jewelry Presentation Box with Magnetic Double-Door and LED Lighting
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Luxury Double-Door Jewelry Box represents the pinnacle of retail jewelry packaging — a ceremonial unboxing experience that transforms opening a necklace or ring into a memorable event. The dual magnetic doors swing open symmetrically, revealing a mirrored lid interior that reflects the jewelry from multiple angles while the integrated LED spotlight (warm white 3000K, auto-activating on door open) illuminates the piece with gallery-quality lighting. The entire interior is lined in premium synthetic suede (or genuine suede leather upgrade) with velvet-flocked side walls in a contrasting tone, creating depth and luxury that photographs beautifully for e-commerce listing images. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified with 23 years of expertise — every double-door box passes rigorous testing including LED cycle life verification (10,000+ activations), magnet force consistency, and suede colorfastness. Our dual-factory setup delivers 220,000+ gift boxes daily on Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 press lines.

item.title: Luxury Two-Piece Magnetic Gift Box with Ribbon Pull
item.description:
Product Overview

This luxury two-piece magnetic closure gift box combines premium materials with elegant functionality. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing — with 23 years of experience since 2003 — the rigid structure uses 2.0mm greyboard wrapped in 157gsm art paper for a smooth, durable finish. A satin ribbon pull under the lid ensures effortless opening, while the N35-grade neodymium magnets deliver a satisfying snap closure. Inside, soft velvet lining protects delicate items like jewelry, watches, or premium cosmetics. With a daily output capacity of 1.7 million color boxes and 220,000+ gift boxes from our 18,000 sqm integrated factory, Bincai delivers at scale without compromising quality. The two-piece construction — separate lid and base — is the gold standard for luxury unboxing, offering a dramatic reveal that elevates brand perception. Each box undergoes individual QC inspection for magnet alignment, ribbon tension, and velvet adhesion before leaving our Shunde facility.

item.title: Luxury Watch Case Rigid Paper Box with Pillow Insert Magnetic Closure
item.description:
Product Overview

A premium rigid paper watch case designed for luxury timepiece presentation and retail display. Features a velvet-flocked interior with removable watch pillow insert and hidden magnetic closure for a clean, premium unboxing experience. The rigid greyboard construction with art paper wrap provides excellent crush protection for shipping, while the satin-lined pillow cradles the watch securely. Manufactured in our ISO 9001 certified factory on Heidelberg and KBA presses with precision die-cutting and hand-finished assembly.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Book-Style Box with Satin Ribbon and Velvet Insert
item.description:

The Bincai Magnetic Closure Book-Style Box combines the elegance of a hardcover book with the security of embedded N42 neodymium magnets and the soft luxury of a satin ribbon tie. The spine-hinged construction opens like a treasured volume, revealing a custom velvet-flocked insert tray that cradles products in plush refinement. Designed for premium corporate gifts, executive stationery sets, luxury accessory presentation, and commemorative packaging, each box is built on 2.0-3.0mm rigid greyboard wrapped in 157gsm art paper with gold or silver foil stamping on both the cover and spine. Produced at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility running KBA 1050 and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses, Bincai delivers over 220,000+ gift boxes daily with ISO 9001 and FSC certifications.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Box with Clear Sleeve Window Premium Gift Packaging
item.description: Premium magnetic closure rigid box with a transparent PET sleeve window — crafted by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The clear sleeve window allows the product to be fully showcased without removal, creating a double-layer unboxing experience: the sleeve slides off to reveal the rigid box underneath, then the magnetic flap opens with a satisfying snap. The PET window is precision die-cut and edge-polished for distortion-free product visibility. The sleeve adds an extra layer of protection during transit while doubling as a branding canvas — print your logo, pattern, or messaging on the sleeve, the box lid, or both for layered brand storytelling. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV offset presses across our 18,000 sqm Foshan factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory). Daily output capacity of 1.7 million boxes (post-2025 expansion). ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Candle Box with Window Display Custom Size Scented
item.description:
Magnetic Closure Candle Box with Window Display

Premium custom magnetic closure candle box with window display by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a 23-year ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified packaging enterprise (founded 2003). Our magnetic closure candle boxes combine rigid 2.0mm greyboard construction with a precision die-cut clear PET or anti-fog PVC window, giving customers a direct, unobstructed view of your scented candles while the N52 neodymium magnetic closure delivers a satisfying premium unboxing experience — rated for 5,000+ open/close cycles without strength degradation. The window-to-board bonding uses ultrasonic or solvent-free adhesive with 72-hour peel testing to ensure zero delamination through temperature cycling and humidity exposure. Available with soft-touch matte lamination, hot foil stamping (gold, silver, rose gold, copper, holographic), blind embossing, and custom die-cut EVA foam inserts for multi-candle gift sets. Produced on German-engineered KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses with Bobst flatbed die-cutting across 18,000 sqm of factory space (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, expanded 2025). Daily output of 1.7 million color boxes plus 220,000+ rigid gift boxes. MOQ 500 with free pre-production samples in 5–7 working days.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Cube-Shaped Gift Box with 360° Design Print — Premium Brand Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Magnetic Closure Cube Gift Box is a statement piece — a perfectly proportioned six-panel wrap-around canvas where every face (front, back, top, bottom, left, right) is printed in full-color CMYK as a continuous seamless wrap. This 360° design freedom is unmatched by conventional rigid boxes (which typically leave sides blank or printed separately), enabling brands to create immersive packaging that tells a story from every angle — from a lush botanical pattern wrapping all six faces of a luxury candle box to a continuous cityscape panorama encircling a premium tech accessory gift set. The magnetic lid (NdFeB N35 magnets in all four corners) snaps closed with a satisfying, premium “thunk” that becomes part of the unboxing ritual. At the core is a 1600gsm greyboard structure built on Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA Rapida 105 press lines, produced by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified, with 23 years of premium packaging mastery delivering 220,000+ boxes daily.

item.description:

Applications

The Bincai Magnetic Closure Lipstick Gift Box serves luxury beauty brands across multiple product categories:

item.title: Magnetic Closure Luxury Candle Gift Box with Satin Interior & Custom Foam Tray
item.description:
Premium magnetic closure gift box with satin-lined interior and custom foam tray — purpose-built for luxury candle gift sets. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). 18,000 sqm integrated factory with KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses. Daily output 1.7 million boxes.

Applications

Industry Application Key Feature
Luxury Candle Brands Single or multi-candle gift sets Custom-cut foam tray secures each candle — no rattling or wax damage during transit
Home Fragrance Diffuser, candle, and room spray sets Multi-compartment foam tray organizes all components
Hotel & Hospitality VIP guest amenity candle boxes Satin interior elevates perceived value for 5-star properties
Corporate Gifting Branded candle gift for clients/employees Full-wrap CMYK printing + gold foil logo on lid
Wedding Favors Personalized candle gift boxes Custom ribbon color, monogram foil stamping, batch numbering
Seasonal Collections Holiday, Mother’s Day, Valentine’s limited editions Quick-change foam tray tooling for seasonal SKU variations
Subscription Boxes Premium candle-of-the-month club Magnetic closure supports repeated opening; foam tray reusable as candle storage

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Box Structure Single-door magnetic, book-style, magnetic flip-top, or drawer-slide magnetic
Greyboard Core 1000gsm, 1200gsm, 1600gsm — 1200gsm standard for candle weight
Wrap Material 157gsm art paper, 128gsm coated, textured linen, leatherette, or velvet paper
Printing CMYK offset (KBA 1050), Pantone spot, full bleed
Hot Stamping Gold, silver, rose gold, holographic, matte black foil — Heidelberg cylinder
Embossing Blind emboss, foil-over-emboss, multi-level sculpted emboss
Magnet Strength N35 (standard), N48 (stronger hold), or N52 (maximum hold) — 2, 4, or 6-magnet configuration
Satin Interior Black, white, ivory, champagne, navy, burgundy, or custom-dyed satin
Foam Tray EVA, PE, or PU foam — density 30-60kg/m³ — in black, white, or grey
Foam Cutouts Custom CNC-routed cavities for any candle shape: jar, pillar, votive, tealight, or irregular artisanal
Additional Features Ribbon pull tab, satin ribbon closure, card slot for gift message, integrated matchbox compartment
Custom Sizes 120×120×80mm to 400×250×150mm — custom tooling available
MOQ 500 units (standard), 1000+ (custom foam tooling or custom satin color)

Production Specifications

Specification Detail
Offset Press KBA 1050 4-color — high-registration CMYK with smooth gradient reproduction
UV Press Heidelberg 7+1 UV — specialty coatings for luxury candle market sheen
Magnet Insertion Automated magnet placement machine — N48 discs (10-15mm diameter) embedded into greyboard
Magnet Poles Polarity verification at insertion station — prevents reversed-pole rejects
Box Assembly Semi-automated hand-wrap line — precise corner mitering and edge folding
Satin Lining Die-cut satin sheets applied with water-based PVA — wrinkle-free tensioning jig
Foam Tray CNC 3-axis CNC router — ±0.5mm cavity precision for snug candle fit
Hot Stamping Heidelberg cylinder with foil-registration sensors — consistent impression at 80-120°C
Embossing Copper die + hydraulic press — relief depth 0.3mm–1.5mm
Adhesives Water-based PVA (no VOC), hot-melt for foam-to-board bonding
ISO 9001 Documented process at each station — receiving through pack-out final audit

Quality Assurance

Inspection Point Method Standard
Board grammage Digital scale ±1gsm Within spec tolerance
Moisture content Pin-type moisture meter ≤8%
Magnet strength Gauss meter at 5mm gap ≥1200 Gauss (N48, 15mm)
Magnet polarity Polarity checker — 100% in-line All magnets aligned N-S correctly
Lid closure alignment Visual jig — closed position ±0.5mm lateral, full magnetic engagement
Foam cavity fit Insert/remove candle — 10 cycles No tearing, cavity retains shape
Satin adhesion Manual peel test No lifting at edges or corners
Satin wrinkle check Visual under D50 lighting Wrinkle-free across entire surface
Foil adhesion Tape test per ASTM D3359 5B — no flaking
Print registration Overlay template ±0.15mm
Color consistency Spectrophotometer ΔE ≤2.0 from target
Surface inspection Visual under D50 lighting No scuffs, glue marks, or ink smudges

Why This Magnetic Candle Box vs Standard Rigid Box

The candle gift market has unique packaging requirements that standard rigid boxes don’t address. Here’s how Bincai’s magnetic candle box stacks up:

item.title: Magnetic Closure Round Gift Box with Satin Lining — Cylindrical Premium Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s cylindrical magnetic closure gift box stands apart from standard rectangular packaging with its elegant 360°-printable round silhouette. The rigid 2.0mm greyboard tube is precision-rolled to ±0.5mm diameter tolerance with a seamless exterior wrap in 157gsm art paper — full CMYK offset printing covers the entire cylinder in a single continuous image. A precision-fit lid with embedded N42 neodymium magnets (≥8N pull force) provides invisible magnetic closure with a satisfying snap. The interior is lined with your choice of satin, velvet, suede, or electrostatic flocking. Available in 7 standard diameters from 80mm to 250mm with custom heights from 40mm to 300mm. Manufactured on KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset with Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV and Bobst SP 102 BMA foil stamping at our 18,000 sqm ISO 9001:2015 & FSC certified facility in Foshan Guangdong. 23 years of rigid box craftsmanship since 2003 — 220,000+ boxes daily output.

A gentle tug on the satin ribbon releases the concealed neodymium magnets with a satisfying resistance — then the lid swings open like a fine book cover, revealing the velvet-flocked interior. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — an ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified factory with 23 years of rigid box expertise (founded 2003) — each box is hand-assembled by our 80+ skilled craftspeople using precision CNC-wrapped greyboard (1200-1600gsm), art paper (157gsm), and 3M-grade neodymium magnets rated for 10,000+ open/close cycles. Printing runs on KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press (15,000 sheets/hour) for mass-volume production and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV press for specialty coatings and foil stamping. Our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory) with the 2025 8,000 sqm smart factory expansion produces 220,000+ rigid gift boxes daily.

Sustainability & Compliance

Aspect Detail
Paper Sourcing FSC Chain-of-Custody certified — full traceability from forest to finished box

Adhesive Water-based PVA adhesive — biodegradable, VOC-free, GB/T and EU compliant
Magnet Recovery Neodymium magnets removable for separate recycling stream — box body remains fully recyclable
Factoring Waste Closed-loop recycling program diverts 95%+ of production paper waste from landfill
Carbon LED factory lighting and optimized Heidelberg press scheduling minimize energy consumption

item.description:
Product Overview

The Magnetic Lid Paper Box with Embossed Pattern and Velvet Liner by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. represents the pinnacle of tactile luxury packaging for premium jewelry, cosmetics, fragrance, and high-end gift products. Established in 2003 and recognized in China Print & Packaging News among the top rigid-box manufacturers in South China, Bincai combines two decades of craftsmanship with a production capacity of 1.7 million color boxes and 220,000+ gift boxes daily across an 18,000 sqm dual-facility campus.
