item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Pharmaceutical Folding Carton is engineered for compliance with global pharmaceutical packaging regulations including FDA 21 CFR Part 211, EU Falsified Medicines Directive (2011/62/EU), and ISO 15378. Each carton integrates tamper-evident tear strips, Braille text embossing for accessibility compliance, child-resistant locking mechanisms, and serialization-compatible surfaces for track-and-trace systems. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. in a dedicated GMP-compliant production zone within our ISO 9001:2015 and FSC-certified facility, these cartons undergo pharmaceutical-grade QA including extractables testing, microbial limits verification, and batch-level traceability. Our 18,000 sqm Foshan factory produces 1.7 million folding cartons daily on KBA 1050 and Heidelberg 7+1 UV press lines.

item.title: Premium Leather-Look Jewelry Set Box 3-Tier Velvet Display
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Premium Leather-Look Jewelry Set Box is the ultimate all-in-one jewelry presentation and storage solution. Three independently-accessible tiers organize a complete jewelry collection: Tier 1 — necklace hooks with anti-tangle channel dividers; Tier 2 — ring rolls (12 slots) and earring cards (16 pairs); Tier 3 — bracelet cushion and watch pillow plus a hidden document compartment. The leather-look PU exterior with contrast stitching delivers the visual impact of genuine leather at a fraction of the cost, while the magnetic closure ensures all three tiers stay securely aligned. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — an ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified factory with 23 years of packaging expertise — each set box undergoes rigorous tier-alignment QC, hinge cycle testing, and velvet adhesion verification. Our dual-factory Foshan operation produces 1.7 million+ boxes daily.

item.title: Premium Leather-Look Magnetic Velvet Jewelry Box Set — 3-Piece Nesting Gift Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

This premium 3-piece leather-look magnetic velvet jewelry box set from Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) combines sophisticated PU leather-look exterior with plush velvet flocking interior for luxury jewelry presentation. The nesting design includes a large necklace box (180×120×50mm), medium bracelet box (120×80×40mm), and small ring box (60×60×35mm) — ideal for jewelry brands, retail counters, e-commerce unboxing, and special occasion gifting. Each box features dual N35-grade neodymium magnetic closure and is wrapped in premium PU leather-look paper with gold foil logo stamping. With 23 years of manufacturing excellence and 18,000 sqm integrated facility, Bincai produces 220,000+ gift boxes daily on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses.

item.title: Premium Luxury Gift Box for Health Supplement Packaging
item.description: Pharmaceutical-grade luxury rigid gift box for health supplements, nutraceuticals, and wellness products — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). Engineered with dual-wall 2.5mm greyboard for crush resistance during international shipping, this box meets the elevated expectations of premium supplement brands. Optional tamper-evident seal, child-resistant closure, and pharmaceutical-grade printing create trust at point of sale. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across Bincai’s 18,000 sqm dual factory (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory). Daily output capacity 1.7 million boxes. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified. Serving 200+ global brands from Foshan, Guangdong, China.

item.title: Premium Shoulder-Neck Rigid Gift Box with Magnetic Closure for Luxury Spirits Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Premium Shoulder-Neck Rigid Gift Box redefines luxury spirits gifting with a sculpted architectural silhouette — the recessed shoulder-neck construction creates a striking two-tier profile that cradles premium whiskey, cognac, or baijiu bottles with museum-grade presentation. The magnetic snap closure (4× NdFeB N35 magnets) delivers a satisfying, authoritative close that signals quality to the recipient before the box is even opened. Inside, a velvet-flocked cavity precisely die-cut to the bottle’s base diameter with a 2-glassware side compartment transforms retail liquor packaging into a complete gift experience. At Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified with 23 years of packaging leadership — every shoulder-neck box is produced on Heidelberg 7+1 UV or KBA Rapida 105 presses, delivering 220,000+ gift boxes daily across our dual-factory 18,000 sqm production campus.

item.title: Printed Corrugated Box Custom Logo Mailer Packaging
item.description: Printed corrugated box with custom logo for mailer and e-commerce packaging — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). Available in B-flute (3mm), C-flute (4mm), E-flute (1.5mm), or double-wall BC-flute (6mm) for optimal protection during transit. Custom flexographic or offset litho-laminated printing for crisp logo reproduction. FBA-compliant construction meets Amazon’s 6-foot drop test and ISTA 3A transit testing standards. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across 18,000 sqm of factory space. For complete design guidance — including flute type selection, board grade engineering, and ISTA testing standards — see our Corrugated Mailer Design Guide. Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Printed Toy Gift Box with Insert Cardboard Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Printed Toy Gift Box with Insert delivers everything a toy brand needs in one cost-effective folding carton: vibrant shelf appeal, secure product protection, and an unboxing experience that delights children and parents alike. The die-cut cardboard insert cradles the toy — whether it’s an action figure, a board game, or a puzzle set — preventing shifting during transit while presenting the product at its best angle when the lid is opened. Printed in full CMYK on Heidelberg Speedmaster 7+1 UV and KBA Rapida 105 4-color presses, your artwork comes to life with crisp detail that makes toys jump off the shelf.

item.title: Recyclable Kraft Paper Magnetic Gift Box — Eco-Luxury Sustainable Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Recyclable brown kraft paper rigid gift box with magnetic closure — designed by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) for brands that demand luxurious presentation without compromising on sustainability. Made from 100% FSC-certified recycled greyboard and wrapped in natural unbleached kraft paper, the entire box is fully recyclable in standard paper waste streams — no delamination, no mixed materials. Printed with soy-based inks (VOC ≤ 0.5%, heavy-metal free) and assembled with water-based PVA adhesive (FDA 21 CFR 175.105 compliant), every component is chosen for end-of-life circularity. The N35 neodymium magnetic closure delivers the premium unboxing experience customers expect, while the natural kraft aesthetic with subtle embossed branding creates an authentic, artisanal feel that resonates with eco-conscious consumers. Produced across 18,000 sqm on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses with 1.7 million daily box output.

item.title: Recycled Kraft Paper Gift Box with Soy Ink Printing 100% Biodegradable
item.description:
Product Overview

The 100% biodegradable recycled kraft paper gift box with soy ink printing — the definitive eco-luxury packaging solution for brands that refuse to compromise between sustainability and premium presentation. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified with 23 years of manufacturing excellence — this box is constructed from 100% post-consumer recycled (PCR) kraft paper (200–400gsm), printed with soy-based offset inks (VOC ≤ 0.5%, heavy metal-free, EN 71-3 compliant), bonded with water-based PVA adhesive (FDA 21 CFR 175.105 food-contact compliant), and finished with aqueous recyclable coating — every material chosen for end-of-life biodegradability without sacrificing structural integrity or print vibrancy. Certified to ASTM D6400 for industrial composting, this box breaks down within 6–12 weeks in commercial facilities (3–6 months home compostable in uncoated configuration) — returning safely to the earth, unlike conventional boxes with petroleum-based inks and plastic laminations that persist for centuries. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 4-color and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility — delivering 1.7M+ boxes daily with a dedicated eco-grade material inventory and segregated production workflow for genuine sustainability integrity.

item.title: Recycled Kraft Paper Window Gift Box with FSC Certification
item.description:
Product Overview

This recycled kraft paper window gift box combines eco-conscious materials with product visibility — the perfect packaging for brands that want to showcase their product while demonstrating sustainability commitments. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (established 2003, Foshan, China), the box uses 350gsm post-consumer recycled kraft board with FSC Chain-of-Custody certification. The die-cut window can be fitted with crystal-clear recyclable PET or compostable PLA film for fully biodegradable packaging. Soy-based ink printing delivers crisp, low-VOC branding on the natural kraft surface. With daily capacity of 1.7 million boxes from our 18,000 sqm integrated facility, Bincai supports brands scaling from boutique craft runs to high-volume retail production.

item.title: Rigid Drawer Box with Custom EVA Insert for Premium Stationery Sets
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Rigid Drawer Box is designed for premium stationery brands, corporate gift programs, and luxury pen manufacturers seeking an elegant slide-out presentation format. The drawer mechanism — pulled by a satin ribbon tab and secured with a hidden magnetic catch — creates a ceremonial unboxing that elevates even a simple pen set into a memorable gift. Inside, a CNC-machined EVA foam insert cradles each pen, USB drive, or accessory in its own precision cavity (±0.5mm tolerance), preventing shifting during transit while presenting each item at the optimal viewing angle. For a complete comparison of rigid vs. folding construction — and when each is appropriate for your product — see our Rigid vs. Folding Carton Packaging Guide. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified with 23 years of packaging expertise — every drawer box passes 10-point QC including slide-force consistency (3-5N ideal range), magnet catch engagement verification, and lamination adhesion cross-hatch testing. Our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory, 2025) delivers 1.7M+ boxes daily on Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 press lines.

item.title: Rigid Gift Box with Ribbon Closure Custom Print Luxury Packaging
item.description:
Elegant rigid gift box with satin ribbon closure custom print luxury packaging — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory) with KBA and Heidelberg presses. Daily output 1.7 million boxes.

Applications

Satin ribbon closures add a tactile, luxurious finish that customers love. Perfect for:

  • Gourmet Food & Confectionery: Premium chocolates, macarons, artisanal biscuits, tea collections
  • Luxury Cosmetics: Skincare gift sets, perfume collections, bath and body gift boxes
  • Apparel & Accessories: Silk scarves, ties, leather goods, designer accessories
  • Corporate Gifts: Executive welcome kits, employee appreciation gifts, holiday corporate presents
  • Wedding & Events: Bridal party favors, guest gifts, table centerpiece boxes
  • Jewelry & Watches: Bracelet boxes, pendant cases, luxury watch presentation

Customization Options

  • Materials: 1200-1800 gsm greyboard wrapped in 157-250 gsm art paper, textured paper, kraft, or leatherette
  • Printing: Full-color CMYK offset on KBA 1050 4-color press; up to 7 colors + UV on Heidelberg 7+1 press
  • Finishing: Gold/silver/copper hot foil stamping, blind embossing/debossing, spot UV varnish, matte/gloss lamination, soft-touch coating, metallic foil accents
  • Closure: Satin ribbon tie in custom colors (Pantone matched), double-ribbon bow, magnetic flap backup, or elastic band
  • Ribbon: 10mm–25mm satin, grosgrain, or velvet ribbon in any color; double-sided or single-sided tie
  • Interior: Custom die-cut foam, velvet/satin lining, cardstock dividers, ribbon pull-tabs, elastic loops
  • Size: Fully customizable from 80×80×30mm (jewelry) to 400×300×100mm (apparel/corporate)

Production Specifications

  • Press: KBA 1050 4-color offset + Heidelberg Speedmaster 7+1 UV
  • Die-Cutting: Automatic Bobst-style die-cutting with ±0.5mm precision
  • Ribbon Attachment: Precision ribbon-insertion station with tension control for consistent bow appearance
  • Gluing: Automatic rigid box forming lines with inline corner taping
  • Assembly: Hand-finishing station for ribbon threading, insert placement, and final QC
  • Daily Capacity: 220,000+ rigid gift boxes per day
  • Lead Time: 10–15 working days for new orders; 7–10 days for repeats
  • MOQ: 500–1000 units; trial orders of 100–300 units accepted

Quality Assurance

  • ISO 9001:2015 certified quality management system
  • FSC Chain of Custody certified — responsible forest sourcing
  • Incoming Inspection: Paper weight (±3%), thickness (±0.05mm), moisture content (5–7%) verified
  • Inline QC: Color density checked every 500 sheets; glue bond tested every hour
  • Final Inspection: AQL 2.5 sampling; dimensional tolerance ±1.5mm; color delta E < 2.0
  • Ribbon QC: Ribbon color pantone match ±1.0 ΔE; knot tension tested for consistency
  • Drop Testing: ISTA 1A simulated drop tests for structural integrity
  • Free pre-production sample with full finishing (freight collect)

Factory

  • 23 years of manufacturing excellence
  • 18,000 sqm production facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory) in Foshan, Guangdong, China
  • KBA 1050 4-color + Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses
  • Fully automatic die-cutting and gluing lines
  • Daily capacity: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes
  • Export to 40+ countries across Europe, North America, Middle East, and Southeast Asia

FAQ

Q: Can the ribbon color match my brand’s Pantone color? A: Yes. We stock 50+ satin ribbon colors and can custom dye any Pantone shade with a minimum 500m ribbon order. The dyeing adds 3–5 working days to lead time.

item.title: Rigid Gift Box with Single Tray Telescopic Lid — Watch Collector Display Packaging
item.description:
Premium rigid gift box with telescopic lid and single removable tray — designed for luxury watch collector display. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). 18,000 sqm integrated factory with KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses. Daily output 1.7 million boxes.

Applications

Industry Application Key Feature
Luxury Watch Brands Collector edition watch packaging Velvet-flocked tray cradles watch securely; telescopic lid reveals product dramatically
Corporate Gift Sets Executive watch gifts, retirement presents Gold foil logo on lid projects premium brand image
Watch Retail In-store display and gift-with-purchase Removable tray doubles as countertop display
Limited Edition Drops Numbered collector series boxing Custom sequential numbering via foil stamping
E-Commerce Luxury Direct-to-consumer luxury watch unboxing Telescopic lid creates unboxing anticipation; 1600gsm core protects during transit
Jewelry & Watch Shows Trade show sample presentation Professional rigid construction withstands repeated handling

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Box Structure Telescopic lid with single tray, telescopic lid with dual tray, book-style magnetic, or drawer-slide
Greyboard Core 1200gsm, 1600gsm, or 2000gsm — 2000gsm recommended for heavy watch collections
Wrap Material 157gsm art paper, 128gsm coated, premium textured paper, leatherette, or linen fabric
Printing CMYK offset (KBA 1050), Pantone spot colors, full bleed
Hot Stamping Gold, silver, rose gold, copper, holographic, or matte foil — Heidelberg cylinder press
Embossing Blind emboss, foil-over-emboss, or multi-level sculpted emboss
Tray Flocking Velvet flocking in black, grey, navy, burgundy, cream, or custom Pantone
Tray Configuration Single watch cutout, 2-watch, 4-watch, 6-watch, or custom layout
Tray Material Flocked EVA, flocked cardboard, molded pulp, or suede-laminated board
Lid Interior Satin-lined, velvet-flocked, or printed with brand story/certificate
Custom Sizes 100×100×60mm to 400×300×120mm — custom tooling available
MOQ 500 units (standard), 1000+ (custom tray tooling or custom flocking color)

Production Specifications

Specification Detail
Offset Press KBA 1050 4-color — precise registration on art paper wrap
UV Press Heidelberg 7+1 UV — hybrid UV + conventional for specialty coatings
Greyboard Core 1200-2000gsm FSC-certified greyboard — structural rigidity for luxury weight
Box Assembly Automated rigid box line — hand-wrap finishing for corners and edges
Die-Cutting Bobst automatic flatbed die-cutter — ±0.3mm precision for tray cavities
Tray Flocking Electrostatic flocking machine — uniform 0.5mm velvet pile, no shedding
Hot Stamping Heidelberg cylinder — foil-on-demand with registration sensors
Embossing Copper die etching + hydraulic press — 0.3mm–1.5mm relief depth
Corner Wrapping CNC corner-wrapping machine — miter-fold precision ±0.2mm
Adhesives Water-based PVA (no VOC), hot-melt for tray assembly
ISO 9001 Full in-line QC at each station — material receiving through final pack-out audit

Quality Assurance

Inspection Point Method Standard
Board grammage Digital scale ±1gsm Within spec tolerance
Moisture content Pin-type moisture meter ≤8%
Lid-to-base fit Slip gauge 0.5–1.0mm clearance — smooth telescopic action
Telescopic lid parallelism Digital caliper — 8-point measurement ±0.3mm all corners
Flocking density Pile height gauge 0.5mm ±0.1mm uniform across surface
Flocking adhesion Tape test per ASTM D3359 5B — no fiber pull-off
Foil adhesion Tape test on foil stamp 5B — no flaking
Embossing registration Overlay template ±0.2mm
Print registration Overlay template ±0.15mm
Color consistency Spectrophotometer ΔE ≤2.0 from target
Lid drop test 1.2m free-fall with watch simulator No structural failure, tray intact
Surface inspection Visual under D50 lighting No scuffs, wrinkles, glue marks, or foil bleed

FAQ

Q: Can the tray be designed for a specific watch model with precise cavity dimensions?

item.title: Silver Rigid Book-Shaped Cosmetic Gift Box with Blue Velvet Insert
item.description:
Premium custom silver rigid book-shaped cosmetic gift box with blue velvet insert manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier with 23 years of experience.

Applications

  • Luxury Cosmetics: Premium packaging for high-end skincare sets, serums, creams, and beauty collections — the sleek silver aesthetic communicates sophistication
  • Perfume & Fragrance: Elegant gift boxes for eau de parfum bottles, fragrance discovery sets, and limited-edition perfume launches
  • Beauty Gift Sets: Complete beauty regimen kits — cleanser, toner, moisturizer, and serum in coordinated presentation
  • Jewelry & Watches: Book-style presentation for luxury timepieces, bracelets, and designer accessories with velvet display interior
  • Spa & Wellness: Premium packaging for spa gift certificates, aromatherapy sets, and wellness product collections
  • Corporate Beauty Branding: OEM/ODM packaging for beauty brands launching premium product lines with custom brand identity

Customization Options

  • Exterior Finish: Metallic silver art paper (mirror, brushed, or matte silver), pearlescent white, holographic, or full Pantone color flexibility
  • Book-Style Opening: Hinged spine with magnetic side flap closure — opens like a luxury book for dramatic product reveal
  • Interior Lining: Velvet flocking in 100+ Pantone colors (deep blue, royal purple, black, champagne, rose), satin, or suede fabric
  • Insert Configuration: Custom die-cut EVA foam tray with precision cavities for each product; flocked vacuum tray; or cardboard grid with satin pull ribbons
  • Decoration: Hot foil stamping (silver, gold, rose gold, holographic) on spine and lid; embossed/debossed logo; spot UV contrast on matte silver; full-color CMYK offset print
  • Additional Features: Magnetic side flap with hidden N35 neodymium magnets, satin pull ribbon, mirror insert in lid, LED lighting strip, or PET window panel
  • Size Range: From compact 120×90×30mm to large 350×250×80mm — fully custom dimensions

Production Specifications

  • Press: KBA 1050 4-color offset press with inline aqueous coating for exterior art paper printing
  • Heidelberg 7+1 UV: Premium spot UV effects, high-gloss accents, and metallic ink simulation
  • Rigid Box Line: Fully automatic production — greyboard cutting, corner wrapping, inner liner mounting, magnet embedding
  • Greyboard Core: 1200gsm–2000gsm rigid greyboard for book-style structural integrity and long-term shape retention
  • Surface Wrapping: 157gsm–250gsm metallic art paper, specialty textured paper, or soft-touch laminated stock
  • Velvet Flocking: Electrostatic flocking process — uniform 0.5mm pile height, 100+ Pantone colors, rub-resistant
  • Magnets: N35–N52 grade neodymium, 8mm–12mm diameter, 2–4 magnets per box for secure book closure
  • Hinge Engineering: Reinforced spine with 157gsm hinge paper, tested to 500+ open/close cycles

Production Quality & Testing

  • Color Accuracy: Heidelberg Prinect Inpress spectrophotometry — ΔE ≤ 2.0 across full production; metallic silver consistency batch-to-batch
  • Velvet Quality: Rub-fastness testing to ISO 105-X12; pile density ≥ 80 fibers/mm²; no shedding after vibration test
  • Magnet Testing: Pull-force verification at 3.5–5.5N per magnet pair; 500+ open/close cycle without magnet dislodgement
  • Hinge Durability: Repeated open/close testing — 500+ cycles with zero hinge paper tear or delamination
  • Surface Inspection: 100% visual inspection under D50 standard lighting (ISO 3664:2009); metallic surface checked for scratches, fingerprints, and color uniformity
  • Drop Testing: ISTA 1A certified — 0.8m drop on all 6 faces, 4 edges, and 4 corners
  • ISO 9001:2015: Full quality management system from raw material receiving through finished goods inspection
  • FSC Certified: Chain-of-custody certified paperboard sourced from responsibly managed forests

Seven-Stage QC Gates

Stage Inspection Point Standard
Gate 1 — Raw Material Intake Greyboard thickness, moisture content, art paper color consistency, velvet pile height, magnet pull-force ISO 9001:2015 incoming material sampling plan; greyboard ±5% caliper tolerance; magnet ≥3.5N per pair
Gate 2 — Pre-Press Rip Review Artwork file integrity, trap/overprint settings, color separation accuracy, hot-foil die registration Heidelberg Prinect preflight; trapping ≥0.08mm; spectrophotometric proof matched to GRACoL 2013
Gate 3 — Print Run Inline Color density, dot gain, register (±0.1mm), metallic silver consistency across full run Heidelberg Prinect Inpress spectrophotometry; ΔE ≤ 2.0; inline aqueous coating coverage ≥95%
Gate 4 — Post-Print Surface Check Scratches, fingerprints, foil adhesion, lamination bubbles, spot UV alignment 100% visual under D50 lighting (ISO 3664:2009); tape-test foil adhesion — zero lift; no surface defect >0.3mm
Gate 5 — Box Assembly & Structure Greyboard corner wrap precision, magnet embedding depth, hinge gap tolerance, inner liner flushness Corner wrap tolerance ±0.5mm; magnet flush ≤0.2mm; hinge gap 0.8–1.2mm; inner liner zero peeling
Gate 6 — Finished Goods AQL Box closure alignment, velvet insert fit, lid/book opening smoothness, overall aesthetic AQL 2.5 Level II (major); AQL 4.0 Level II (minor); 500-cycle hinge endurance pass; velvet rub-fastness ISO 105-X12 Grade 4+
Gate 7 — Pre-Shipment Audit Carton drop test, pallet stacking stability, humidity protection, barcode scannability, label accuracy ISTA 1A drop test pass (0.8m, all faces/edges/corners); barcode Grade B or above (ISO 15416); packaging moisture barrier intact

FAQ

Q: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ) for this silver book-shaped cosmetic box?

item.title: Square Rigid Gift Box with Magnetic Lid Matte Lamination Custom Logo
item.description:

Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — an ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified factory with 23 years of luxury rigid box expertise — each box features precision mitered corners (±0.3mm gap), concealed neodymium magnet closure, and Heidelberg 7+1 UV offset printing for flawless brand reproduction. item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Straight Tuck End (STE) Folding Carton with Soft-Touch Lamination delivers the tactile luxury that premium skincare brands demand — the velvet-soft matte surface begs to be touched, creating an instant sensory connection that elevates perceived product value by 30-40% in consumer studies. Double-wall BC-flute construction with reflective metallized PET thermal liner, water-resistant adhesive bonding, tamper-evident tear strip, and integrated gel-pack compartments. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). 18,000 sqm integrated factory with KBA 1050 4-color, Heidelberg 7+1 UV, and Bobst automatic die-cutters. Daily output 1.7 million boxes.

item.title: Tri-Wall Corrugated Heavy-Duty Shipping Box with Pallet-Ready Design for Export Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Tri-Wall Corrugated Heavy-Duty Shipping Box is engineered for the most demanding export and industrial logistics — where a single box may need to protect 50kg+ of precision machinery, automotive components, or bulk consumer goods across 12,000km of ocean freight. With three layers of A-flute corrugated medium laminated into a formidable 10mm-thick AAA combined board, this box achieves stacking strengths exceeding 1,500kg — equivalent to stacking 30 fully-loaded boxes without collapse. The pallet-optimized footprint (1200×1000mm standard) eliminates wasted airspace on EUR/ISO pallets, maximizing container cube utilization and slashing per-unit freight costs by 15-25% versus standard RSC boxes. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015, FSC certified, ISTA 3E validated — with 23 years of corrugated expertise, every tri-wall box passes compression, drop, vibration, and humidity testing before shipment. Our dual-factory setup delivers tens of thousands of heavy-duty boxes daily.

Two-piece telescopic rigid boxes provide unmatched structural integrity for heavy or delicate items. The base and lid separate cleanly, revealing a perfectly fitted foam interior. Ideal for:

item.title: Two-Tone Velvet Bracelet Gift Box with Magnetic Closure — Custom Logo Embossing
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s two-tone velvet bracelet gift box elevates jewelry presentation with contrasting interior velvet colors and a plush satin display pillow. The magnetic flap closure opens flat to a 180° display angle, revealing the bracelet on a sculpted cushion. Manufactured with KBA 1050 4-color offset printing and precision die-cutting in our 18,000 sqm Foshan factory. 23 years of luxury packaging expertise.

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Size Range 80×80×40mm to 200×150×60mm
Exterior Material 157gsm/250gsm art paper, textured paper, leatherette, linen
Print Method CMYK offset, Pantone spot, hot foil stamping, embossing, debossing

Velvet Colors 20+ colors — mix any two for interior contrast

MOQ 500 units (standard cushion), 1,000+ (custom cushion tooling)

Industry Applications

Jewelry Type Box Configuration Key Feature
Bracelet / Bangle Formed bracelet pillow Two-tone contrast presentation
Cuff / Wide Bracelet Flat velvet bed + strap Adjustable securing band
Charm Bracelet Compartmented insert Separate charm display slots
Anklet Slim-profile box Compact retail footprint

Production Quality

Test Method / Standard Acceptance Criteria
Lid Alignment Digital caliper, 100% inline Gap ≤1.0mm
Velvet Bond Cross-hatch tape test (ISO 2409) ≥2.5 N/cm² peel strength
Magnetic Hold Force gauge, 100% test Closure force ≥3.0N
Print Registration Heidelberg Prinect inline ±0.15mm color-to-color
Color Consistency X-Rite eXact — ΔE vs. master ΔE ≤2.0
Velvet Colorfastness Rub test, 500 cycles No visible transfer
Drop Test ISTA 1A — 10 drops from 760mm No structural failure or magnet release
Foil Adhesion Tape pull test, 3M 810 No lifting or peeling
AQL Sampling ISO 2859-1 Level II AQL 2.5 (major), AQL 1.0 (critical)

7-Stage QC Gate

  1. Incoming Material Inspection — greyboard density, velvet pile height, magnet grade N35, satin fabric GSM
  2. In-Process Printing — spectrophotometer color check every 500 sheets on Heidelberg/KBA press
  3. Die-Cutting & Creasing — ±0.15mm tolerance, 100% panel alignment verification
  4. Velvet Flocking Application — electrostatic fiber deposition, pile uniformity, dual-color registration check under D65
  5. Assembly & Cushion QC — magnet recess depth, hinge range of motion, pillow form fit, elastic retention band tension
  6. Finished Goods Audit — AQL 2.5 (major), AQL 1.5 (critical) per ANSI/ASQ Z1.4
  7. Pre-Shipment Inspection — random sample pull, full functional test, cosmetic review under D65 lighting

Why Choose Bincai

Guangdong Bincai Color Printing specializes in luxury jewelry packaging with 23 years of rigid box manufacturing expertise. Our dual-tone velvet bracelet boxes benefit from vertical integration — electrostatic velvet flocking, precision die-cutting, and foil stamping all happen under one roof in our 18,000 sqm ISO 9001:2015 & FSC certified factory. With KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses, we deliver consistent print quality at 1.7M boxes daily. Every bracelet box undergoes 7-stage QC from material inspection through pre-shipment audit, ensuring luxury brand standards for retail and e-commerce.

item.title: Velvet Lined Jewelry Pendant Box with LED
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Velvet Lined Jewelry Pendant Box with LED transforms jewelry presentation with integrated illumination. A warm LED activates when the box opens, highlighting the pendant against the velvet backdrop. Manufactured in our Shunde facility with 2.0mm rigid greyboard construction and German-engineered precision printing.

Applications

Industry Product Type Typical Use
Fine Jewelry Pendant necklaces, medallions Premium retail display, e-commerce unboxing
Luxury Accessories Brooches, pins, cufflinks Branded gift packaging for boutiques
Bridal Wedding jewelry sets Bridesmaid gifts, bridal suite presentation
Watch & Timepiece Small watches, pocket watches Illuminated display for collector pieces
Corporate Gifting Service awards, milestone gifts Embossed logo, LED reveal for executive gifting
Museum & Gallery Replica jewelry, artifacts Museum gift shop illuminated display boxes
Direct Sales Home-party jewelry brands Compact, lighted presentation for in-home demos
E-Commerce Subscription box inserts Premium branded unboxing with LED wow factor

Features

  • Built-In LED: Warm white LED (2700K) with magnetic reed switch — activates on open, deactivates on close. Battery-powered (CR2032, replaceable), rated 50+ hours continuous
  • Velvet Interior: 1.5mm black flocked velvet with die-cut pendant cavity and chain channel
  • Display Window: Clear PVC or PET window option for retail shelf visibility
  • Magnetic Closure: Hidden neodymium magnets in lid and base for clean snap-lock
  • Custom Sizes: Standard 120×80×40mm, customizable to fit pendants, brooches, and cufflinks
  • Finishing: Matte lamination, gold/silver foil stamping, embossing available

Manufacturing Specifications

  • Press: Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 4-color — rich solids on dark velvet wraps, ±0.15mm precision
  • Board: 2.0mm rigid greyboard core (1200–1600gsm) wrapped in 157gsm art paper
  • LED System: Warm white 2700K LED, magnetic reed switch activation, CR2032 battery (replaceable), 50+ hour continuous runtime
  • Interior: 1.5mm black flocked velvet with die-cut pendant cavity and chain channel (2.5mm depth)
  • Window: Clear PVC or PET display window, ultrasonically welded for dust-proof seal
  • Magnetic Closure: Hidden N35 neodymium magnets in lid and base, 5,000-cycle durability
  • Daily Output: 220,000+ gift boxes + 1.7M color boxes
  • Certifications: ISO 9001:2015, FSC Chain-of-Custody; LED components CE/RoHS compliant

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Size Range 80×60×30mm to 200×150×50mm
Wrap Material 157gsm/250gsm art paper, soft-touch, leatherette, linen-textured
Velvet Color Black, navy, charcoal, burgundy, cream, white
LED Color Warm white 2700K, cool white 6000K, RGB (upgrade)
Window Style Clear PVC, tinted PET, frosted, no window
Foil Colors Gold, silver, rose gold, copper, holographic
Finish Matte lamination, gloss lamination, soft-touch, spot UV
Interior Layout Single pendant, pendant + chain channel, dual pendant, brooch/pin
MOQ 500 units (standard), 1000+ (custom LED/electronics)

Production Quality

Test Standard Specification
LED Activation Internal 100% QC — reed switch triggers within 15° lid angle
Battery Life Internal ≥50 hrs continuous, leak-test per batch
Window Clarity ASTM D1003 Haze ≤3%, transmittance ≥88%
Lid Alignment Internal ≤0.8mm gap tolerance
Drop Test ISTA 1A 10-drop sequence, 760mm
Print Registration Internal ±0.15mm

Why This Jewelry Box

Most jewelry boxes are passive containers — they hold your product but do nothing to enhance the presentation moment. The Bincai LED Pendant Box is engineered as an active selling tool that creates an emotional reveal every time the lid opens.

item.title: Biodegradable Kraft Paper Box Eco-Friendly Cosmetics Packaging
item.description:
Biodegradable kraft paper box engineered for eco-conscious cosmetics brands — by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003), a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of manufacturing excellence. 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory) equipped with KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses, daily output 1.7 million boxes. FSC Chain-of-Custody certified with soy-based inks and 100% recyclable materials.

Applications

  • Organic skincare and natural cosmetics product packaging
  • Eco-friendly soap, candle, and bath bomb gift sets
  • Zero-waste beauty subscription box outer packaging
  • Sustainable brand retail countertop display boxes
  • Green beauty e-commerce mailer-ready product boxes
  • Refillable cosmetics packaging with reusable kraft construction
  • Plastic-free personal care and wellness product boxes

Customization Options

  • Material: 200–400gsm recycled kraft paper in natural brown, bleached white kraft, or custom-dyed kraft; 100% post-consumer recycled (PCR) options
  • Printing: Soy-based CMYK offset printing — VOC-free, REACH compliant; single-color kraft aesthetic for minimalist brands
  • Structure: Straight tuck end (STE), reverse tuck end (RTE), auto-lock bottom, crash-lock bottom, gable-top, or drawer-slide
  • Window: Die-cut window with FSC-certified clear PLA (compostable) film or traditional PET window
  • Coatings: Aqueous coating (water-based, fully recyclable); matte or gloss biodegradable lamination
  • Add-Ons: Jute twine, cotton pull handle, kraft paper ribbon tie, embossed FSC/recycle logo, soy-based foil stamping
  • Size Range: Compact 60×60×30mm (lip balm) to 350×250×100mm (gift set)

Production Specifications

  • KBA Rapida 105 4-color: High-speed offset press running soy-based inks at 15,000 sheets/hour
  • Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV: Specialty aqueous coatings and instant curing for eco finishes
  • Die-Cutting: Bobst SP 102 flatbed with ±0.15mm registration; custom cutting dies for unique silhouettes
  • Gluing: Bobst Ambition automatic folder-gluer with water-based cold glue; 40,000 boxes/hour
  • Greyboard: FSC-certified recycled greyboard 800–1200gsm; double-ply lamination for structural rigidity
  • Ink System: Soy-based offset ink — VOC ≤ 0.5%, heavy metal free, EN 71-3 and ASTM F963 compliant
  • Lead Time: 10–15 working days new tooling; 7–10 days repeat orders

Quality & Sustainability

  • ISO 9001:2015 quality management — documented inspection at each production stage
  • FSC Chain-of-Custody — certified sustainable fiber from forest to finished box
  • Biodegradability: ASTM D6400 industrial composting certified (kraft + soy ink + aqueous coating only)
  • Adhesive: Water-based PVA emulsion — no solvent residue, food contact compliant (FDA 21 CFR 175.105)
  • Recyclability: 100% repulpable in standard paper recycling streams (non-PET configurations)
  • Color Consistency: Delta E ≤ 2.5 across production runs even on uncoated kraft surface
  • Moisture Resistance: Optional water-based barrier coating for humidity-prone environments
  • Free pre-production sample with 5–7 day turnaround

Factory

  • 23 years of manufacturing excellence since 2003 in Foshan, Guangdong, China
  • 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory, expanded 2025)
  • 80+ skilled employees across design, prepress, printing, and finishing
  • KBA 1050 4-color + Heidelberg 7+1 UV + Bobst die-cutting + automatic folder-gluer
  • FSC-certified material sourcing with dedicated eco-grade inventory
  • Daily capacity: 1.7 million boxes (50,000+ kraft eco boxes dedicated)
  • Export to 40+ countries with sustainable packaging as a strategic product category

Eco Claims That Hold Up

In an era of greenwashing scrutiny, every sustainability claim on this box is backed by a named standard, a certificate number, or a measurable metric:

Why Bincai

Unlike trading companies that source from third-party factories, Bincai owns the entire production chain. Our in-house corrugator lets us control board quality from the first flute — no middlemen, no markup, no quality uncertainty. We run B-flute, C-flute, E-flute, and BC double-wall on-demand, with white top kraft liners for photo-quality print on brown board. Most mailer suppliers take 3-4 weeks; our integrated factory delivers in 10-15 working days. For e-commerce brands scaling fast, our 1.7M daily capacity means we keep up when your order sizes jump from 5K to 500K overnight.

item.title: Custom Printed Rigid Box with Embossed Logo Gold Foil Stamping
item.description:
Product Overview

This custom printed rigid box combines the tactile prestige of embossed logo detailing with the brilliance of gold foil stamping — a premium packaging format trusted by luxury brands worldwide. Rigid set-up boxes (also called “hard boxes” or “turn-edge boxes”) are constructed by wrapping printed paper over dense greyboard, creating a substantial, non-collapsible structure that conveys quality from the first touch. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing, every box passes through 15 precision QC checkpoints across our 18,000 sqm integrated facility. With Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses for exceptional color fidelity, KBA 1050 offset for volume production, and over 23 years of rigid box expertise (founded 2003), Bincai delivers over 220,000+ gift boxes daily — all under ISO 9001:2015 quality management and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.description:
Overview

Designed for fragrance brands that demand shelf impact without compromising product protection, this box combines a precision die-cut viewing window (PET or biodegradable PLA film) with rigid 1.5–3.0mm greyboard construction, hidden N42/N52 neodymium magnetic closure, and velvet or custom-fit foam interior cushioning. Recognized in Chinese manufacturing media for completing an 8,000 sqm smart-factory expansion in 2025, Bincai now operates across 18,000 sqm of ISO 9001:2015 & FSC Chain-of-Custody certified production space with daily output of 1.7 million color-printed boxes and 220,000+ luxury rigid gift boxes. item.title: Custom Shape Rigid Paper Box with Die-Cut Window Display
item.description:
The Bincai Advantage — Why Custom Shape Rigid Boxes Set Your Brand Apart

Custom shape rigid boxes are the ultimate packaging statement — they announce that what’s inside isn’t ordinary. Unlike standard rectangular boxes that fade into the retail shelf, a custom die-cut silhouette immediately signals design intent. At Bincai, we’ve engineered over 200 unique custom shape projects for clients across perfume, luxury cosmetics, premium electronics, and limited-edition collectibles. Our in-house tooling department produces custom steel-rule dies in 48 hours (standard shapes) to 5 working days (complex contours), with interchangeable window inserts so a single die base can serve multiple product SKUs. Every custom shape box passes through our 15-point QC system where ±0.2mm window precision, ±1mm lid gap uniformity, and corner-wrapped seam integrity are verified against the CAD-approved sample before mass production begins. This is packaging that doesn’t just protect — it performs on shelf, in hand, and in the unboxing moment.

Research shows window-packaged cosmetics achieve 24–37% higher in-store purchase intent compared to fully opaque cartons. KBA 1050 4-color offset press and Heidelberg 7+1 UV press deliver vibrant, batch-consistent printing across our 18,000 sqm (10,000+8,000 smart factory) ISO 9001 & FSC certified factory. The folding carton structure is engineered for flat shipping (reducing freight cost by up to 60%) and easy assembly on automated or manual packaging lines. Daily output capacity of 1.7 million boxes with fully automatic folder-gluer lines and integrated window-patching systems.

item.title: Eco Kraft Paper Rigid Box with Embossing Soy-Based Ink
item.description:
Eco Kraft Paper Rigid Box with Embossing & Soy-Based Ink

An uncompromisingly sustainable rigid gift box that proves eco-friendly packaging can be premium — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., an ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). Designed for brands committed to sustainable packaging without sacrificing luxury presentation, this rigid box combines the natural, tactile aesthetic of FSC-certified kraft paper (128–200gsm, natural brown, black kraft, or white kraft) with precision blind embossing and debossing that creates sophisticated brand texture purely through pressure — zero ink, zero foil, zero plastic. When color is needed, we print with environmentally responsible soy-based inks that emit less than 10% of the volatile organic compounds (VOCs) of petroleum-based inks while delivering brighter, more intense colors on uncoated kraft surfaces. Every box is fully biodegradable, recyclable in single-stream systems, and meets EU EN 13432 and US ASTM D6400 compostability standards. Produced on German-engineered KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses with Bobst flatbed die-cutting across our 18,000 sqm dual factory (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, commissioned 2025) in Foshan, Guangdong. Daily output of 1.7 million color boxes plus 220,000+ rigid gift boxes. MOQ 500 with free pre-production samples in 5–7 working days.

item.title: Heavy-Duty Corrugated Shipping Box with Foam Insert for Fragile Items
item.description:
Overview

Guangdong Bincai Color Printing’s heavy-duty corrugated shipping box with custom die-cut foam insert provides military-grade protection for fragile, high-value items during transit, courier handling, and international freight. Double-wall BC flute corrugated board (6–7mm thickness, ECT 44–55 lb/in, BCT 400–800 lbs) combined with precision die-cut EVA, PE, or PU foam cradles each item individually — eliminating internal movement and absorbing shock, vibration, and impact forces. ISTA 1A and 3A drop-tested and vibration-validated for real-world courier conditions. Self-locking bottom eliminates assembly tape; optional tear strip enables frustration-free recipient opening. Available with anti-static ESD-safe foam for electronics, medical devices, and precision instruments. Manufactured in our ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, expanded 2025) in Foshan, Guangdong — 23 years of corrugated packaging expertise (founded 2003), KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset + Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses, Bobst flatbed die-cutting, 1.7M boxes daily output, 220+ skilled workers. MOQ 500 units with free pre-production samples in 7–10 working days.

Option Available Choices

Production Specifications

Specification Detail
Offset Press KBA 1050 4-color — high-speed precision on kraft stock with natural color retention
UV Press Heidelberg 7+1 UV — for specialty finishes on kraft
Die-Cutting Bobst automatic flatbed die-cutter — ±0.3mm precision
Drawer Assembly Automated rigid box line with drawer slide mechanism
Board Core 800gsm–1600gsm greyboard, FSC-certified
Kraft Wrap 120gsm–200gsm natural kraft, bleached white kraft, or recycled grey kraft
Inks Soy-based, water-based, or UV — all certified for food-safe indirect contact
Cotton Handle 3mm braided cotton cord, tensile-tested at 5kg+ pull strength
Handle Attachment Reinforced grommet or knot-through with interior washer

ISO 9001 Full process documentation at each station — material receiving through pack-out audit

Quality Assurance

Inspection Point Method Standard
Board grammage Digital scale ±1gsm Within spec tolerance
Moisture content Pin-type moisture meter ≤8%
Drawer slide tolerance Gap gauge ±0.5mm — smooth, no binding
Cotton handle pull strength Tensile test machine ≥5kg before failure
Handle attachment Manual pull test 100% No grommet tear-out, no knot slip
Soy ink adhesion Tape test per ASTM D3359 5B (no removal)
Print registration Overlay template ±0.15mm
Color consistency Spectrophotometer ΔE ≤2.0 from target
Surface inspection Visual under D50 lighting No scuffs, ink smudges, or water spots
Recyclability verification Material audit 100% recyclable — no mixed materials, no plastic lamination
FSC chain of custody Document audit per shipment FSC-STD-40-004 compliance
Compostability (PLA window) EN 13432 certification Home compostable within 180 days
AQL sampling ISO 2859-1 Level II AQL 2.5 (major), AQL 1.0 (minor)

Why This Kraft Drawer Box

  • Cotton pull handle vs. plastic — 3mm braided cotton cord tensile-tested at 5kg+; biodegradable and tactile, replacing nylon or grosgrain ribbon tabs
  • FSC-certified kraft board — 350gsm recycled kraft with full chain-of-custody traceability; accepted in standard curbside recycling without separating components
  • Flat-ship drawer design — ships knocked-down for 60% freight volume savings; assembles in under 20 seconds with pre-scored crease lines, no adhesive required
  • Reuse-first engineering — drawer mechanism designed for 200+ open/close cycles; customers repurpose as desk organizers, jewelry storage, or seed boxes
  • Soy-based inks only — zero petroleum-based solvents; prints remain vivid on uncoated kraft with ΔE ≤2.0 color consistency batch-to-batch
Factor Generic Gift Box Bincai Kraft Drawer Box

Output from Bincai’s 18,000 sqm integrated facility using KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses. Daily capacity: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes. Ideal for corporate gifts, luxury product launches, wedding favors, and premium cosmetic sets.

item.title: Recyclable Kraft Cardboard Box with Soy Ink Printing
item.description:
Overview

Guangdong Bincai Color Printing’s recyclable kraft cardboard box with soy ink printing represents the purest expression of sustainable packaging. Every component — from the FSC certified kraft paperboard and recycled greyboard core to the soy-based inks and water-based adhesives — is chosen for end-of-life recyclability and biodegradability. Zero plastic. Zero solvent emissions. Full compostability in industrial facilities.

Manufacturing Excellence & Equipment

Manufactured in our ISO 9001:2015 certified 18,000 sqm dual-factory (10,000 sqm main plant + 8,000 sqm smart factory commissioned 2025), every kraft box is printed using soy-based vegetable inks on the Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV with inter-deck UV curing for instant-dry, scuff-resistant output — or the KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press running at 15,000 sheets/hour for high-volume CMYK production. Blind embossing and debossing (maintaining full recyclability without foil) is executed on the Bobst SP 102 BMA with ±0.15mm registration precision.

item.title: Recyclable Kraft Folding Carton Eco-Friendly Food Packaging
item.description:

Manufactured in our ISO 9001:2015 certified 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory) with KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses — 23 years of experience, daily output 1.7 million boxes.

item.title: Recyclable Kraft Rigid Box with Soy Ink Printing Eco Luxury
item.description:
Fully recyclable kraft rigid box with soy-based ink printing — combining luxury rigid box construction with uncompromising environmental responsibility. No plastic lamination, no solvent-based adhesives, no mixed-material construction that prevents recycling. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., FSC Chain-of-Custody certified.

Applications

  • Sustainable Brands: Organic skincare, natural cosmetics, eco-friendly fashion, zero-waste lifestyle products
  • Premium Food: Artisan chocolate, specialty coffee, organic tea, craft honey, small-batch granola
  • Corporate Eco Kits: Sustainable employee welcome kits, eco-conference materials, green initiative launch boxes
  • Subscription Boxes: Monthly eco-lifestyle boxes, farm-to-table produce boxes, sustainable beauty subscriptions
  • Gift Packaging: Eco-conscious holiday gifting, wedding favors, baby shower gifts, housewarming presents
  • Product Launches: Limited-edition sustainable product releases, brand collaboration boxes

Customization Options

  • Kraft Paper Grade: Natural brown kraft (unbleached), white kraft (bleached), black kraft, colored kraft (earth tones); recycled content 30%–100% post-consumer waste
  • Printing: Soy/vegetable-based ink in 1–4 colors; single-color minimalist branding, two-color logo + pattern, full CMYK for photographic designs
  • Finishing (Plastic-Free): Blind debossing, embossing without foil, laser engraving on kraft surface, water-based matte coating (compostable), natural twine/jute string tie
  • Box Structure: Standard rigid (lid + base), book-style with kraft hinge, drawer slide, pillow box shape, fold-flat rigid for shipping efficiency
  • Interior: Kraft paper lining, unbleached cotton padding, shredded kraft crinkle paper, molded pulp insert (100% recycled), corrugated cardboard dividers
  • Closure: Jute string tie, cotton ribbon, kraft paper belly band, cardboard latch, magnetic closure with kraft-covered magnets
  • Add-Ons: Kraft hang tag with jute string, seed-embedded paper insert card (plantable), kraft tissue paper with soy-ink logo, cardboard thank-you card
  • Size: Fully custom — from 80×80×40mm to 400×300×120mm

Production Specifications

  • Board Stock: 100% recycled greyboard 1200–1800gsm; FSC Recycled certified; no virgin fiber in board construction
  • Kraft Wrap: 120–200gsm kraft paper; natural brown or custom-dyed with water-based dyes (heavy metal-free)
  • Soy Ink: 100% soy/vegetable-based offset ink; VOC-free, low migration; certified compostable ink residues
  • Adhesive: Water-based PVA adhesive (solvent-free, formaldehyde-free); starch-based adhesive for paper-to-paper bonds
  • No Plastic Policy: Zero plastic lamination, zero synthetic coatings, zero PVC windows, zero foam inserts (molded pulp or corrugated board only)
  • KBA 1050: Soy ink printing at 15,000 sheets/hour
  • Lead Time: 10–15 working days; 5–7 days for repeat orders
  • Daily Capacity: 30,000–50,000 kraft rigid boxes

Quality Details

  • ISO 9001:2015 certified quality management
  • FSC Chain-of-Custody (FSC-C147399) — full traceability from forest to finished box
  • Recyclability Verification: 100% paper fiber construction verified per EN 13430; suitable for standard paper recycling streams
  • Compostability: All components (board, paper, ink, adhesive) certified home-compostable by independent lab per EN 13432
  • Soy Ink Certification: American Soybean Association soy seal compliant; heavy metal content below detection limits
  • Adhesive Safety: EN 71-3 (toy safety) and FDA 21 CFR 175.105 (indirect food contact) compliant
  • Drop Test: ISTA 1A protocol — rigid board construction provides equivalent protection to traditional non-eco boxes
  • Free pre-production sample — 5–7 working days

Factory

  • 23 years manufacturing experience (founded 2003)
  • 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart facility
  • Dedicated eco-packaging line with soy ink press setup and water-based adhesive systems
  • KBA 1050 4-color press optimized for kraft paper and soy ink
  • Export to 40+ countries worldwide
  • Daily output: 1.7 million boxes total

FAQ

Q: Is this box truly 100% recyclable and compostable? A: Yes. All components — greyboard (100% recycled fiber), kraft paper wrap, soy-based ink, and water-based PVA adhesive — are certified home-compostable per EN 13432 and recyclable per EN 13430. Zero plastic lamination, zero synthetic coatings, zero PVC.

Applications

Customization Options

  • Foil Stamping: Silver, champagne silver, brushed silver, matte silver, holographic silver, or custom metallic Pantone; single or multi-level foil registration
  • Structure: Two-piece lid-and-base, magnetic flap, book-style hinge, or drawer-slide with ribbon pull

Production Specifications

  • KBA Rapida 105 4-color: High-speed precision offset at 15,000 sheets/hour
  • Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV: Specialty metallic coatings and instant UV curing
  • Bobst SP 102 BMA: Hot foil stamping with ±0.15mm registration accuracy and multi-zone temperature control

Quality Details

  • ISO 9001:2015 certified — documented quality gates from material receiving through final packaging
  • FSC Chain-of-Custody — certified sustainable paper throughout the supply chain
  • Foil Adhesion: Tape test (3M #810 + 3M #600) — zero foil lift; Sutherland rub test — 50 double rubs, no visible wear
  • Foil Registration: 100% inspection — ≤0.15mm deviation on all axes
  • Corner Integrity: Four-corner drop test (1m onto concrete) — no corner splitting or delamination
  • Lid Fit: ±0.5mm tolerance on lid-to-base clearance; smooth open/close action
  • Color Consistency: Delta E ≤ 2.0 across production runs for brand color matching
  • Silver Tarnish: Accelerated aging test (72h at 57°C / 95% RH) — no discoloration or oxidation
  • Free pre-production sample with full decoration — 5–7 working day turnaround

Factory

item.title: Velvet Earring Display Box Magnetic Flip Lid Custom Logo
item.description:
Custom velvet earring display box with magnetic flip lid — the go-to packaging format for jewelry brands selling earrings, studs, and small accessories. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. with over two decades of expertise in luxury rigid and jewelry packaging.

Applications

  • Stud Earrings: Single pair display; foam insert with pre-cut slits for secure earring post insertion; mirror-finish interior card for product reflection
  • Hoop Earrings: Custom-cut cavity with elasticized retainer strap; prevents hoop deformation during shipping
  • Drop & Dangle Earrings: Layered insert with separate compartments for each earring; anti-tangle design
  • Earring Sets: Multi-cavity foam insert for 3/5/7-pair sets; color-coded cavities for organization
  • Jewelry Gift Sets: Earring + necklace combination boxes; earring + bracelet duo packaging
  • Retail Display: Shelf-ready presentation with clear window lid option; designed to sit upright or flat
  • E-Commerce: Compact profile optimized for shipping cost efficiency; crush-resistant rigid board construction

Customization Options

  • Exterior Velvet: 12+ standard colors (black, navy, burgundy, cream, grey, champagne, royal blue, emerald, blush pink, chocolate, white, charcoal) plus custom Pantone-matching for orders 3,000+
  • Interior Lining: Contrast or matching satin, velvet, or suede; printed brand pattern interior for premium feel
  • Insert Configuration: Die-cut velvet-covered foam with earring card slots, ring groove, necklace hooks, or flat padded surface; layered removable trays for multi-piece sets
  • Magnetic Closure: Invisible N52 neodymium magnets embedded in lid and base; silent close, secure hold; 1–3 magnet pairs per design
  • Logo Application: Gold/silver/rose gold foil stamping on lid exterior, interior base, or both; debossed/blind emboss for minimalist branding; full-color UV inkjet on velvet for photographic designs
  • Lid Style: Full flip-lid (opens 180°), half-flip with exposed product display, magnetic flap with tuck-end closure
  • Ribbon Accessories: Satin ribbon pull-tab for easy opening; ribbon tie closure as alternative to magnets; grosgrain ribbon for textured look
  • Size: Earring boxes from 50×50×25mm (minimal stud box) to 150×100×40mm (multi-pair display)

Production Specifications

  • Velvet Application: Precision-cut velvet with hot-melt lamination onto 1200gsm greyboard; temperature-controlled roller system for bubble-free, wrinkle-free adhesion
  • Die-Cutting: CAD knife cutting for foam inserts with ±0.2mm cavity tolerance; laser cutting available for intricate cavity shapes
  • Magnet Insertion: Automated magnet placement between board layers during lamination; invisible from exterior
  • Edge Finishing: Folded and tucked velvet with clean 90° edges; gold/silver edge gilding available
  • KBA 1050: Outer card printing at 15,000 sheets/hour
  • Heidelberg 7+1 UV: Multi-color plus UV coating for premium outer card designs
  • Lead Time: 10–15 working days for new tooling; 5–7 working days for repeat orders
  • Daily Capacity: 80,000+ jewelry boxes

Quality Details

  • ISO 9001:2015 certified — full traceability from material lot to finished carton
  • FSC Chain-of-Custody — board and paper from certified sustainable sources
  • Magnet Strength: 100% pull-force verification; ±10% tolerance against specification
  • Velvet Abrasion: Martindale rub test — no pile shedding or color transfer after 1,000+ cycles
  • Insert Fit: 100% product-fit verification with customer-supplied sample before production
  • Odor Test: VOC/residual solvent testing per GB/T standards; jewelry-safe (no tarnish reaction)
  • Color Consistency: D50 5000K light booth inspection; Delta E ≤ 1.5 across production batches
  • Free pre-production sample — 5–7 working day turnaround with full decoration

Factory

  • 23 years manufacturing experience (founded 2003)
  • 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart facility
  • Specialized jewelry box assembly line with velvet lamination, foam fabrication, and magnet insertion
  • Export to 40+ countries worldwide
  • Daily output: 1.7 million boxes total

Quality Assurance

Test Method/Standard Acceptance Criteria
Velvet pile density Digital microscope, ISO 1763 Spec ±5% pile count per cm²
Velvet color consistency X-Rite eXact spectrophotometer ΔE ≤ 1.5 vs master swatch
Velvet abrasion resistance Martindale rub test, ISO 12947-2 No pile shedding or color transfer after 1,000+ cycles
Velvet adhesion Cross-cut tape test, ASTM D3359 Classification 4B min at edges and corners
Magnet pull force Force gauge, N52 ≥ 8 N per pair
Foam insert cavity tolerance Digital caliper, CAD comparison ±0.2 mm per cavity
Hinge cycle test Automated rig, 2,000 open-close No magnet dislodgement, hinge integrity maintained
Odor / VOC test GC-MS headspace analysis, GB/T standard Below detection limit; jewelry-safe (no tarnish)
Drop test ISTA 1A, 10 drops from 760 mm No structural failure or insert displacement
AQL sampling ISO 2859-1 Level II AQL 2.5 major / AQL 1.0 minor

Production Quality — Seven-Stage QC Gates

Stage Checkpoint Standard
1 — Raw Material Velvet roll pile density & color batch, greyboard grammage, N52 magnet certification, satin fabric inspection ISO 1763, ISO 534, FSC-STD-40-004
2 — Velvet Lamination Hot-melt application temperature, roller pressure, bubble-free adhesion, edge wrap quality Temperature-controlled roller system, Internal QA-SOP-VELVET-002
3 — Foam Die-Cutting Cavity dimensions ±0.2 mm, clean cut edges, insert base flatness CAD knife cutting / laser cutting, ISO 2768-m
4 — Magnet Insertion Magnet placement between board layers, polarity orientation, pull force ≥ 8 N Automated placement, Internal QA-SOP-MAG-005
5 — Box Assembly Velvet wrapping tension, corner sharpness, edge fold quality, gold/silver gilding uniformity Internal QA-SOP-JEWEL-008
6 — Insert Fit Verification 100% cavity fit test with customer product sample, insert removal/insertion ease, product retention Internal QA-SOP-FIT-003
7 — Final Audit AQL 2.5 Level II, full functional test, D65 visual inspection, jewelry-safe odor test, packaging integrity ISO 2859-1, GB/T jewelry safety standards

FAQ

Q: What velvet colors are available for this earring box?

item.title: Velvet Jewelry Display Box with LED Light Ring Earring Packaging
item.description:
Overview

Guangdong Bincai Color Printing’s velvet jewelry display box with integrated LED light transforms jewelry presentation. As the magnetic flip lid opens, a soft LED illuminates the velvet interior, making rings and earrings sparkle with gallery-quality lighting. Premium velvet flocking, gold foil branding, and rigid construction create a luxury unboxing experience. Manufactured in our ISO 9001:2015 certified 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory) — 23 years, Heidelberg 7+1 UV + KBA 1050 presses, 1.7M daily output.

item.title: Velvet Jewelry Gift Box with Magnetic Closure & Gold Foil for Ring Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

This luxurious velvet jewelry gift box combines a magnetic flap closure with gold hot foil stamping — the quintessential packaging for fine jewelry brands that demand an unforgettable unboxing experience. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (established 2003, Foshan, China), the rigid box is constructed from 800–2000gsm greyboard wrapped in premium art paper with 0.8–1.5mm velvet flocking interior. The hidden magnetic closure ensures the flap seats flush every time, while the satin ribbon pull tab provides an elegant opening gesture. Produced on KBA 1050 and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm factory with 1.7 million boxes daily capacity, Bincai serves jewelry brands from boutique artisans to international retailers with consistent luxury quality.

item.title: Velvet Lined Pendant Necklace Gift Box with Magnetic Flip Lid
item.description:
Product Overview

Premium velvet-lined pendant necklace gift box with magnetic flip lid, manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, Foshan, Guangdong). This elegant jewelry box features a soft velvet interior, hidden magnetic closure, and custom die-cut insert to cradle pendants and necklaces securely during retail display and shipping. Built with 2mm rigid greyboard, wrapped in 157gsm art paper with matte or soft-touch lamination. Output from Bincai’s 18,000 sqm integrated facility with KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses. Daily capacity: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: White Corrugated E-Commerce Box with Tear Strip Subscription
item.description:
Product Overview

White corrugated e-commerce box with integrated tear strip for subscription and direct-to-consumer shipments — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). Built on B/E/BC flute corrugators with KBA and Heidelberg offset presses for vibrant exterior printing across an 18,000 sqm integrated campus in Foshan, Guangdong. Daily output 1.7 million boxes + 220,000+ rigid gift boxes (post-2025 expansion). ISO 9001:2015, FSC Chain-of-Custody, and ISTA 1A transit-tested. Designed for e-commerce fulfillment centers, subscription brands, and DTC shippers requiring unboxing excellence with carrier-grade durability.

item.title: White Corrugated Shipping Box for Cosmetic Apparel Delivery
item.description: Premium white corrugated shipping box engineered for cosmetic and apparel e-commerce delivery — by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003), a 23-year full-chain packaging manufacturer. 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory) with KBA 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses, integrated corrugated production line. Daily output 1.7 million boxes. ISO 9001 & FSC certified. Custom sizes, branded printing, and ISTA-tested structural integrity. See our complete corrugated mailer design guide for size selection, flute matching, and structural optimization.

item.title: Wooden Look Rigid Jewelry Box Gold Foil Interior LED Light
item.description:
Premium woodgrain-texture rigid jewelry box with gold foil interior and integrated LED ring light — the ultimate presentation format for high-value jewelry pieces. The warm LED illumination highlights product brilliance while the woodgrain exterior conveys natural luxury. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd.

Applications

  • Engagement Rings: Dramatic illumination for diamond presentation; creates a retail-counter experience in the customer’s hands
  • Wedding Bands: His-and-hers ring presentation; dual-ring cavity with individual LED zones
  • Luxury Necklaces & Pendants: Layered display with necklace form and pendant spotlight; anti-tangle storage design
  • High-End Bracelets & Bangles: Curved foam insert with LED accent lighting; bangle form with secure grip
  • Designer Earrings: Multi-pair display with individual compartments and shared LED ring illumination
  • Limited Edition Collections: Numbered edition boxes with LED-illuminated collector’s plaque; premium brand experience
  • Retail Store Display: Counter-top display boxes that double as packaging; customer takes home the display-quality box

Customization Options

  • Exterior Woodgrain Texture: 20+ woodgrain patterns (walnut, oak, mahogany, teak, rosewood, ash, cherry, bamboo); embossed texture paper (tactile grain) or smooth printed wood-look; matte, satin, or gloss finish
  • Gold Foil Interior: Full-surface gold foil laminated interior base and lid; gold-on-black contrast for dramatic effect; silver or rose gold foil alternatives; brushed metal-look foil (brushed gold, satin nickel)
  • LED Module: Warm white (2700K–3500K) for gold jewelry, cool white (5000K–6500K) for silver/platinum; RGB multi-color with remote control; motion-activated (lights on when box opens); battery-operated (button cell CR2032 × 2, 200+ hours) or rechargeable via USB-C
  • Light Configuration: Full lid ring LED, base perimeter LED, spotlight LED focused on product, internal shelf edge LED; dimmable options with touch sensor
  • Logo Application: Gold foil stamping on exterior lid (woodgrain + gold = classic luxury); debossed logo with gold fill; laser engraving through woodgrain layer to reveal gold underlayer
  • Interior Insert: Black velvet with gold contrast stitching, cream velvet, or custom color; die-cut foam with gold foil-wrapped cavity walls; floating product display with transparent acrylic riser
  • Size: Ring boxes from 80×80×50mm to multi-piece collection boxes at 300×250×100mm

Production Specifications

  • Woodgrain Texture Paper: 150–200gsm specialty embossed paper with registered woodgrain pattern; laminated to 1200–1800gsm greyboard
  • Gold Foil Interior: Hot-stamped gold foil on 120gsm coated paper; wrinkle-free lamination with temperature-controlled roller; edge-to-edge coverage
  • LED Integration: Pre-assembled LED module with integrated battery housing and magnetic reed switch (lights on when lid opens); IP20 rated; CE and RoHS certified components
  • Magnet Closure: N52 neodymium magnets in lid and base; invisible from exterior; satisfying snap-close action
  • Velocity Lamination: Precision corner wrapping with miter-fold edges; 90° sharp corners; gold edge gilding on board edges
  • KBA 1050 + Heidelberg 7+1 UV: Multi-color printing for exterior graphics
  • Lead Time: 15–20 working days (LED integration); 7–10 days for repeat orders
  • Daily Capacity: 15,000–25,000 LED jewelry boxes

Quality Details

  • ISO 9001:2015 certified
  • FSC Chain-of-Custody certified
  • LED Reliability: 100% illumination test on every unit; LED lifespan rated 50,000+ hours; battery contact corrosion test (salt spray per ASTM B117)
  • Gold Foil Adhesion: 3M 610 tape test — no foil lift-off; accelerated aging (72h at 57°C / 95% RH) — no delamination
  • Woodgrain Registration: Registered embossing within ±0.5mm; consistent grain direction across all panels
  • Drop Test: ISTA 1A protocol — LED module must remain functional after drop; battery must stay in housing
  • Product Safety: CE, RoHS, and REACH compliance; battery compartment meets IEC 62133 safety requirements
  • Free pre-production sample — 7–10 working days with full LED integration

Factory

  • 23 years manufacturing experience (founded 2003)
  • 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory)
  • KBA 1050 + Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses
  • Dedicated jewelry box assembly line with LED module integration station
  • Export to 40+ countries globally
  • Daily output: 1.7 million boxes total

Why This LED Wooden-Look Jewelry Box

This box isn’t just packaging — it’s the presentation stage that sells the jewelry before the customer touches it. Five engineering decisions separate it from standard velvet jewelry boxes:
